faqs.question: Is it expensive to study BTech at DPG Institute of Technology and Management?
faqs.answer: DPG Institute of Technology and Management offers the flagship Bachelor of Technology (BTech) programme in a variety of specializations. The course is a popular programme for students seeking to build a career in Engineering. The total tuition fees for DPGITM BTech is INR 2.68 L - 3.58 L. Students can also check out the various scholarship schemes offered by DPGITM Gurgaon.

college_info.intro: DPG Institute of Technology and Management provides various undergraduate and postgraduate programs in four departments which include the Department of Engineering, Computer Applications, Management, and Applied Science and Humanities. The courses provided by the institute include BTech, MTech, BBA, and BCA. Below are the DPG Institute of Technology and Management popular programmes:

placements.overview: DPG Institute of Technology & Management offers placement assistance to students. The institute offers 100% placement to students. Further, some of the top recruiters at DPG Institute of Technology & Management include Infosys, TCS, Psychotropic India Ltd, Gabriel, Snapdeal, Jindal Steel & Power, HSBC, PNB MetLife, Policybazaar.com, Magneti Marelli, NIIT Technologies, Theobroma, Reliance Retail, GrapeCity, Nagarro, Honda, IBM, and many more.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: The mode of DPG Institute of Technology and Management course admissions is online. Admission to various courses is based on merit and scores of entrance exams. At the UG level, the college offers three to four-year BE/BTech courses and three-year BBA and BCA courses to the students. At the PG level, the DPG Institute of Technology and Management offers two-year MTech to the students. BTech is offered in seven specialisations and MTech in two specialisations. Below are some of the courses offered by the DPG Institute of Technology & Management and their respective eligibility and fee:

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: The college is good and I am extremely satisfied.

review_content.Placements: There are 100% of placements for B.Tech in computer science students, and for any other branches, I am not sure about that. The highest package ranges from 5-7 LPA. The lowest package ranges from 2-3 LPA. There are internship chances from 1st year, which is good.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is not very good. There is no ground. There are no music or dance classes. There is no sports ground. Classes are like school classes. Even school classes are better than college classes. Washrooms are in the worst condition. But all classes have AC facilities. It has a library, hostel, labs and a canteen.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: The college is very good and has decent fees. The placement rate is 100%.

review_content.Placements: The placement rate of DPGITM is reported to be 100%. The highest salary package is 5 LPA. The minimum salary package is 3.5 LPA. The lowest salary package is 2 LPA. Recruiting companies are IT and tech, e-commerce and startup, finance and insurance, manufacturing and core industries. Companies offering internships and notable programs are there.
review_content.Infrastructure: We have an air-conditioned classroom with library and good labs for study. The quality of food is very good in mess and canteen. The medical facilities are very decent. The sports and games are good play for students. The way they teach is extremely good, and they prepare for the exam for a better future.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Very good facilities and 100% placements.

review_content.Placements: 100% placements in good companies. The highest package is 10 LPA. The lowest package is 3 LPA. Top recruiting companies are TCS, etc. Good packages are given. Best companies hire students. Best packages are given by companies like TCS, Mahindra, Bajaj, and many more.
review_content.Infrastructure: There is a well-maintained building. We have Wi-Fi on campus. There are air-conditioned and well-maintained rooms on campus. We have a good canteen at affordable rates. The food is good. There is a good mess. The food is very tasty. There are very good greenery plants.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Our college has a good infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: I am a B.Tech student. I am in the DPG Institute of Technology and Management. In my batch, there are around 60 students. All students are serious about their studies. Nearly 50 students come regularly and attend their classes according to their subjects. All students are good here.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college and hostel is good. Bus service is available for long-distance students. Security guards are available in this college for the security of students. The mess of the hostel is also good.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: College and placements are good.

review_content.Placements: There is a 100% placement rate and a good environment. Some of the top recruiting companies of our college are Google, IBM, Goldman Sachs, Intel, Microsoft, Azure, Cognizant, Amazon, and many others. The placements are perfect for the CSE department but average for Electrical and Mechanical department, which is similar across other colleges in Bangalore. Not many good companies visited the campus for industrial training.
review_content.Infrastructure: Food is nice, and the hostel facilities are good. College is vast, with libraries, labs, and seminar halls.
review_content.Faculty: Faculty members are very helpful and good. They are professionals and graduated from top NITs.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Review of DPG Institute of Technology and Management.

review_content.Placements: Around 50% of students got placed from our course. The highest salary package offered is 5 LPA, and the average salary package offered is 3 LPA. The lowest salary package offered is 2 LPA by top recruiting companies. About 30% of students secured internships.
review_content.Infrastructure: There are various facilities and infrastructure available in our course such as Wi-fi, labs, classrooms, and library. The quality of food available in the mess and canteen is good. There is a paid facilities for sports and games. The quality of facilities in a hostel is also good.

fees_overview.description: Students getting admitted in any of the programme of DPG Institute of Technology and Management must pay fees for admission into the programme. The fee structure at DPG Institute of Technology and Management is bifurcated into various components, namely tuition, security deposit, and hostel fee. Certain fee elements are one-time payments to be made at the time of DPG Institute of Technology and Management admission, whereas others are recurring as per the norms of the institution fee policy. The fees vary anywhere between INR 1,66,500 - 3,58,000 depending upon the course chosen. Below is a table comprising the fee structure for different programs available at DPG Institute of Technology and Management.

admission_overview.title: DPG Institute of Technology and Management Admission Overview 2025
admission_overview.description: DPG Institute of Technology and Management admissions 2025 for Engineering courses are done based on the entrance exam score, i.e., JEE Main, GATE, etc. The institute offers a BTech, MTech, BBA and BCA courses. Candidates must complete Class 12 as the basic eligibility criteria. To get admission at DPG Institute of Technology and Management, candidates must meet the eligibility criteria set by the college. The application process at DPG Institute of Technology and Management is conducted online. Read the following article to know more about the DPG Institute of Technology and Management course admission 2025.

eligibility_selection.title: DPG Institute of Technology and Management Eligibility & Selection 2025
eligibility_selection.description: DPGITM admissions are based on entrance exams/merit-based. The basic eligibility for UG courses is Class 12. For Second Year (LEET): Candidate should complete diploma examination from an AICTE approved institution with at least 45% aggregate (40% in case of reserved category candidate) in the appropriate branch of Engineering/Technology or passed B Sc. Degree from a recognised University as defined by UGC with at least 45% aggregate (40% in case of a reserved category candidate). Admission will be according to LEET ranking. The following table mentions the eligibility and selection for some of the popular DPGITM courses:

admission_process.title: DPG Institute of Technology and Management Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: DPG Institute of Technology and Management admissionsare based on entrance/merit-based. Candidates can register online for admission to their preferred course. The admission process at DPG Institute of Technology and Management is as per the steps below:
STEP 1: DPG Institute of Technology and Management Application Process 2025

The mode of application is online. Aspirants need to apply at the official website, i.e.,https://dpgitm.ac.in/apply-online/ for admission to the various programme. Candidates can fill out the application form on the institute's official website.
The institute admits students based on the entrance exam/merit. It also considers the candidates' academic performance for final selection.

The university also releases a merit list based on the composite score of the candidates for admission. Shortlisted aspirants need to come for document verification and pay theDPGITM feeto confirm their seats at the institute.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility for BBA admission at DPG Institute of Technology and Management?
faqs.answer: For admission in a BBA programme at DPG Institute of Technology and Management, the aspirant must fulfil the course-specific eligibility criteria. Thus, only the aspirants who have passed Class 12 with at least 45% aggregate are eligible for admission. In addition, students should have passed the qualifying examination from a recognised board. Candidate must also hold the Class 12 mark sheet during application form filling and at the time of admission for verification purposes.

faqs.answer: In order to apply for M.Tech CSE course at DPG Institute of Technology and Management the candidate need to meet the last educational qualification. (Physics) with at least 50% (45% for SC candidates of Haryana) marks in aggregate alongwith valid GATE score in Computer Science & Engineering /IT.The GATE qualified candidates will not be required to appear in the Entrance Test.

description: DPG Institute of Technology and Management cutoff 2025 is available on this page for admission to the BTech program. The cutoffs are available in the form of ranks for different categories of students belonging to the AI and HS quotas. Candidates interested in taking admission at DPG Institute of Technology and Management can check out the sections below to view the exam, course, and category-wise cutoff details. A few more updates are below:

DPG Institute of Technology and Management cutoff 2025 was released via HSTES entrance exam for admission to the B.E. / B.Tech course. For the General AI category students, the last round cutoff range was between 710708 and 896795 for B.E. / B.Tech admission. Considering the lowest cutoff rank of 710708, B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering turned out to be the most competitive branch for admission. In the first round, the cutoff rank for the same branch was 1160387.
Considering the JEE Main last round cutoff 2025 for the General AI category students, the top most competitive course for admission was B.E. / B.Tech, with a cutoff rank closing at 710708.

During the last round, DPG Institute of Technology and Management B.E. / B.Tech cutoff 2025 ranged between 710708 and 896795 for students in the General AI quota. According to this cutoff list, B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering proved to be the toughest to get a seat for, with the cutoff rank being 710708 in 2025, while in 2024, the same specialisation had the cutoff rank of 715482, and in 2023, it was 846878. hostel_campus.college_name: DPGITM Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: The college is good and I am extremely satisfied.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is not very good. There is no ground. There are no music or dance classes. There is no sports ground. Classes are like school classes. Even school classes are better than college classes. Washrooms are in the worst condition. But all classes have AC facilities. It has a library, hostel, labs and a canteen.

reviews.review_heading: The college is very good and has decent fees. The placement rate is 100%.
reviews.review_text: We have an air-conditioned classroom with library and good labs for study. The quality of food is very good in mess and canteen. The medical facilities are very decent. The sports and games are good play for students. The way they teach is extremely good, and they prepare for the exam for a better future.

reviews.review_heading: Very good facilities and 100% placements.
reviews.review_text: There is a well-maintained building. We have Wi-Fi on campus. There are air-conditioned and well-maintained rooms on campus. We have a good canteen at affordable rates. The food is good. There is a good mess. The food is very tasty. There are very good greenery plants.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has a good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college and hostel is good. Bus service is available for long-distance students. Security guards are available in this college for the security of students. The mess of the hostel is also good.

reviews.review_heading: College and placements are good.
reviews.review_text: Food is nice, and the hostel facilities are good. College is vast, with libraries, labs, and seminar halls.

reviews.review_heading: Review of DPG Institute of Technology and Management.
reviews.review_text: There are various facilities and infrastructure available in our course such as Wi-fi, labs, classrooms, and library. The quality of food available in the mess and canteen is good. There is a paid facilities for sports and games. The quality of facilities in a hostel is also good.

reviews.review_heading: This college is very good, and nobody would be dissatisfied with this college.
reviews.review_text: There is no Wi-Fi in classrooms. Labs are okay, but classrooms have only one air conditioner. Library is good. Hostel is satisfactory, and canteen provides good services. Sports facilities like tennis and basketball are available, and medical facilities in the college are good.

reviews.review_heading: No infrastructure at all, no sports at all, just good enough environment to survive.
reviews.review_text: I personally don't live in the hostels, but according to my friends who do, the hostel is pretty average. They have a Wi-Fi connection in each room. Food at the mess is good depending on the day, and in the canteen, some items are good enough, while others are inedible. There are no sports facilities at all. All the stuff built in the name of sports is just for show and fake.

reviews.review_heading: Good facility and faculty members with average infrastructure and normal placement.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure of our college are not so good; it is average. Our library is also normal. Talking about classes and labs, they are in good condition, but there is no Wi-Fi facility there. All the quality and facilities in our hostel are good, and the mess and canteen are also satisfactory.

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied because of the campus and facilities .
reviews.review_text: The laboratory is not good. Our college does not provide good water. The food served in the canteen is expensive and below average. The infrastructure of our college is average. It's an average college, but it is good for business students. Classrooms are good.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty members are good, but not the facilities that should be provided to the students.
reviews.review_text: There are labs for various departments, like AI/ML, DBMS, etc. But the condition of PCs is bad; few works and others don't. Few have the required application and Ethernet connection, and a few don't. Hostel facilities is above average, food quality is good and there is security for girls in hostels. Sports were not much pushed, except for some occasions like annual sports day, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure and helpful faculty.
reviews.review_text: The campus is very big so you can do whatever you want. Infrastructure also have Wi-Fi facility, labs, AC rooms, etc. There is also a hostel on campus for students from outside areas. The food quality of the mess is good—not perfect but decent. Sports are also present because of the big campus.

reviews.review_heading: Campus placements is not good in this college.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is very good compared to any other college campus because my campus has all facilities for students, including air-conditioned classrooms and libraries. A big playground is also present on the university campus. The quality of canteen food is also good.

reviews.review_heading: Don't take admission without knowing about the college .
reviews.review_text: I study B.Tech., but the teachers are not so good and experienced; they don't know how to teach. Our college campus is very small; there is no play ground and sports facilities. The library is very small and there is only one canteen, which I didn't like the taste of.

reviews.review_heading: DPGITM is the best college in Gurugram, Haryana .
reviews.review_text:
This college has a big building and hostels are available for boys and girls. 
The hostels are also provided with AC or non-AC. 
Hostels have the best facilities. 
There was also a big cricket, basketball, and tennis field. 
Wi-Fi is also available in all buildings and in hostel, there was 24*7 Wi-Fi available .

data.description: DPG Institute of Technology and Management (DPGITM) provides modern amenities with state-of-the-art infrastructure to its students. The campus is spread across 23 acre of land. DPG Institute of Technology & Management has a big library with over 19,000 books. DPG Institute of Technology & Management has hostels, a medical room, a transportation facility, a cafeteria, and a canteen. The lecture halls in the DPG Institute of Technology and Management are equipped with LCD projectors. The college provides various facilities like admin offices, a seminar hall, and others.

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about DPG Institute of Technology and Management

The best Part is that the students are allowed to receive multiple job offers which is not the case in many other colleges.

highlights.summary:
Indian Institute of Information Technology, Manipur admissions 2026 are open. Candidates can apply online on the official website to apply for their desired programme.

A few more updates are given below:

faqs.question: Is IIIT Manipur worth joining?
faqs.answer:
The major concern for students looking for admission is the placement they will receive after the course completion. The 2024 placements concluded with 85.20% of the batch placed. Earlier, 81.50% of students were placed during the 2023 placements. Take a look at the table below elaborating on the IIIT Manipur placement rate trends:
Particulars Placement Statistics (2022) Placement Statistics (2023) Placement Statistics (2024)
Placement rate 100% 81.50% 85.20%

college_info.intro:
Let us not state the obvious that BTech is the flagship programme of IIIT Manipur; rather, aspirants will be interested to know why BTech is the flagship course at this institute. As per the Shiksha verified reviews, IIIT Manipur has been rated 3.7 and 3.9 for the Placements and Value for Money criteria, respectively. The institute offers BTech across three dynamic specialisations, namely Computer Science & Engineering, CSE (AI & DS), Electronics & Communication Engineering, and ECE (VLSI & Embedded System).
IIIT Manipur aims to create an ambience in which new ideas and research flourish and from which the leaders, innovators, and IT entrepreneurs of tomorrow emerge. Check the in-depth details regarding IIIT Manipur's popular programmes, along with the eligibility criteria and the total IIIT Manipur course fee in the table provided below:
Check out more details in the video below:

faqs.answer: A:    IIIT Manipur BTech eligibility requires the candidates to pass Class 12 from a recognised board with Physics, Chemistry and Mathematics as compulsory subjects and a minimum of 75% aggregate. Additionally, students must appear for the JEE Main exam and secure above the IIIT Manipur cut-off. Seats to the course are alloted through JoSAA counselling. The institute fills in the leftover seats through CSAB counselling.

faqs.question: What is the JEE Main 2026 exam date for Session 2 ?

faqs.answer: A:    NTA has not announce the JEE Main 2024 form fill up date. However, it is expected that the application forms will be released in December. The tentative JEE Main 2024 application form date session 1 is December first week. JEE Main application form 2024 will be available online on the website jeemain.nta.nic.in 2024. Interested candidates will be able to apply from the official website. JEE Main 2024 registration last date will be last week of December or January first week. As the exam will be conducted in two sessions, NTA will release separate application forms for both the sessions.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Average college. Decent placements. Basic infra. The hostel/mess is below average. Will have to work

review_content.Placements: About 70-80% of students are getting placements. If you are well-prepared, then you will most likely get a good internship and placement. The highest PPO till now is 18 LPA; for the previous year, it was around 40 LPA. The average is around 7-10 LPA. Companies like Slice, Microsoft, Wipro, TCS, Nvidia, Deloitte, etc., and other startups come for placement, including roles like data analyst, software developer, and many others.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college campus is very small (temporary), and the new campus is under construction, but it never seems to get finished. The college and mess staff are rude sometimes; the food is of average quality, and the hostel and mess are below average for the amount of money you are paying. You will just have to survive for 4 years in the hostel and mess. Classrooms and labs are fine. You will find most of the equipment here, but it is not much of use. The library is small, with only one ground for all students. No big fests, only one throughout the whole year. No medical facilities.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Data Science) - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Review of IIIT Manipur - Indian Institute of Information Technology.

review_content.Placements: The placement season has started for the 28th batch, and the training and placement cell is active as they are posting on LinkedIn to companies to come for the placement drive. Last year’s stats showed a placement rate of 70-80%, and the highest was 45 LPA, which was off.
review_content.Infrastructure: Hostels have nearly all the facilities needed by students daily, like Wi-Fi, a gym table, a bed, a chair, and an almirah in rooms, although washing machines are chargeable. The campus is temporary with limited, basic facilities; a new campus is in Senapati.

overview_faqs.question: Is IIIT Manipur a good college?
overview_faqs.answer: Yes, IIIT Manipur is a good college. The college offers placement assistance to students. According to the verified Shiksha reviewer, "Labs are extremely good; there are all kinds of labs, like computer labs, VLSI signal and system labs, etc. You can compare the quality in a computer lab. You will get computers with 32GB of RAM and Intel i7 processors. The library and mess are average. The hostel and canteens are good; we are getting 27x7 electricity and there is Wi-Fi with normal speed." Hence it is a good college.

overview_faqs.question: What is the application fee for B.Tech at IIIT Manipur?
overview_faqs.answer: IIIT Manipur BTech admissions are entrance-based. Students need to apply through JEE Main followed by registering for the JoSAA counselling. The application fee for JEE Mains is INR 1000 (Male unreserved/OBC/EWS category) INR 800 (Female unreserved/OBC/EWS category) INR 500 (SC/ST/PwD/Transgender category). Students should note that the fee is taken from official sources/sanctioning body and is subject to change.

individual_reviews.title: Absolutely dissatisfied and disappointed.

content.Placements: There are no placement here. Off campus is gonna happen, but not on campus. Companies don't even come to this college. Only a few students got placed. There are a lot of branches, but no space to take classes. Everybody wants to leave, but none can. Rs. 10,000 is the minimum fine here.
content.Infrastructure: The college has very old infrastructure. There is a lot of corruption. Very small classrooms and lab equipment are defective. They provide the same equipment in exams also. No facilities here. Not good food, not good teaching. There are 4 students in a room, 4 toilets and 4 bathrooms over 120 students. Just a shame on the name of an Indian institute.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Data Science) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: The worst management of IIIT Manipur.

content.Placements: There are no placements at all. Seniors said that they have not gotten any help from the placement cell of the college. Not even a single time. They have struggled to get even an internship. All the claims are just false here; companies don't come, and those 2-3 companies that are interested don't pick students. This is the harsh reality.
content.Infrastructure: As for now, residing in the temporary campus, there is nothing good to say about the infrastructure. They have no better classrooms, nor do they have good hostels. The library is also not a better place to study; actually, you can't. The director doesn't care a bit. Even though in recent times he has been charging students for everything.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Average college. Decent placements. Basic infra. The hostel/mess is below average. Will have to work

content.Placements: About 70-80% of students are getting placements. If you are well-prepared, then you will most likely get a good internship and placement. The highest PPO till now is 18 LPA; for the previous year, it was around 40 LPA. The average is around 7-10 LPA. Companies like Slice, Microsoft, Wipro, TCS, Nvidia, Deloitte, etc., and other startups come for placement, including roles like data analyst, software developer, and many others.
content.Infrastructure: The college campus is very small (temporary), and the new campus is under construction, but it never seems to get finished. The college and mess staff are rude sometimes; the food is of average quality, and the hostel and mess are below average for the amount of money you are paying. You will just have to survive for 4 years in the hostel and mess. Classrooms and labs are fine. You will find most of the equipment here, but it is not much of use. The library is small, with only one ground for all students. No big fests, only one throughout the whole year. No medical facilities.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Data Science) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Review of IIIT Manipur - Indian Institute of Information Technology.

content.Placements: The placement season has started for the 28th batch, and the training and placement cell is active as they are posting on LinkedIn to companies to come for the placement drive. Last year’s stats showed a placement rate of 70-80%, and the highest was 45 LPA, which was off.
content.Infrastructure: Hostels have nearly all the facilities needed by students daily, like Wi-Fi, a gym table, a bed, a chair, and an almirah in rooms, although washing machines are chargeable. The campus is temporary with limited, basic facilities; a new campus is in Senapati.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: It is good and I am enjoying it.

content.Placements: Last year placement statistic was about 75%. The highest salary is about 45 LPA, This year placement season has started. Many seniors have already taken off-campus placement. Institute is allowing only high CGPA students to seat in placement drive.
content.Infrastructure: There are all basic and needed facilities available in the hostel like Wi-Fi, geyser, chargeable washing machines, table, chair, almirah, and bed. While the college is running in the temporary campus, our hostel is also outside the campus but girls ones are inside.

admission_process.title: IIIT Manipur Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Indian Institute of Information Technology Manipur admissionis primarily entrance-based. The candidates are selected through national-level examinations conducted by different authorities. Currently,IIIT Manipuroffers undergraduate and doctoral programmes, such as BTech and PhD. Applications for the programmes are accepted online. Prior to applying for a course, students should carefully check the course-specific eligibility criteria. Interested students can read the following article to learn more about IIIT Manipur admissions.

IIIT Manipur course admissionis based on the student's performance in the selection rounds. to the BTech programme is based on JEE Main rank, followed by Joint Seat Allocation Authority (JoSAA) Counselling. Additionally, the institute also offers PhD programmes in two research specialisations; Engineering and Humanities and Basic Sciences to regular, sponsored, self-financed, part-time, project staff, external, visiting and quality improvement programme candidates. Students seeking admission toIIIT Manipur coursescan refer to the following table to know about the eligibility and selection criteria for the offered programmes:
MTech in the relevant field with a minimum aggregate of 60% from a recognised university

IIIT Manipur course feehas multiple components, out of which some are paid one-time while others are paid semester-wise. For instance, candidates seeking admission to BTech are required to pay a one-time fee ofINR 15,000to secure admission. Below isIIIT Manipur feefor offered programmes:
NOTE:The above-mentioned fee is taken from an official source/sanctioning body. It is subject to changes.

IIIT Manipur offers a limited number of seats for its BTech and PhD programmes. The seat allocations are done on candidates' performance in the selection rounds and admission finalisations. Students are required to participate in the counselling process conducted by the respective authority for seat allocations. Students can find below the course-wiseIIIT Manipur seat intake:
NOTE:The information is taken from an official source/sanctioning body. It is subject to changes.

Candidates seeking admission to the IIIT Manipur must visit the official website of the Institute and check the eligibility and selection process of the desired programme. For admission to the PhD programme, the candidates need to fill out the application form available on the official website and mail it toacademic@iiitmanipur.ac.in. The admission process for BTech at IT Manipur starts with theJEE Main Applicationand ends with payment of the acceptance fee. The detailed admission process of IIIT Manipur BTech is mentioned below:

Students seeking to apply for the BTech programme offered at the institute must fulfil the admission criteria. As admissions are entrance-based, students need to appear and clear JEE Mains to be eligible for the course. Students need to pick IIIT Manipur as their preferred institute while registering for JoSAA.

IIIT Manipur selectionis based on candidate's valid score inJEE Mainfor BTech orGATE/ SLET/ UGC NET for. Candidates must have a valid score in the mentioned exams for admission to the programme. Students also have to clear theIIIT Manipur cut-off. Seats are offered after participating in the counselling conducted by the respective authority for admissions.
The shortlisted candidates need to get their documents verified and pay the admission fee to finalise the admission.
For more information about IIIT Manipur check out the below video:

faqs.answer: IIIT Manipur is an integral part of the IIITs. The institute offers a full-time undergraduate degree in BTech course across multiple specialisations. The right approach and a preparation plan for admission to BTech at IIIT Manipur is all that is needed to ace JEE Main. faqs.answer: At IIIT Manipur students can pursue the BTech programme across four major specialisations. This cut off changes every year. Keep visiting the official website for the latest cut off information.

courses_data.description: IIIT Manipur providesPhDdegree in the fields of Engineering and Basic Science in full-time or part-time. The duration of the programme varies depending on the method and speciality selected. However, the maximum duration of aPhD at IIIT Manipuris six years. Students seeking to pursue the course must fulfil the admission criteria specified by the institute prior to applying for the programme.

faqs.question: What is the fee for Ph.D at IIIT Manipur?
faqs.answer: IIIT Manipur PhD fee includes a lot of components such as tuition fees, security deposits, hostel fees, mess fees, and more. Some of these parameters like the security fee need to be paid only once. PhD fees at IIIT Manipur is INR 52,200. Candidates should note that the fee is taken from the official sources and is subject to change. For further fee related information, students can visit the official website of the institute.

faqs.question: What is the cutoff rank for IIIT Manipur?
faqs.answer: IIIT Manipur offers a four-year BTech programme at the UG level. Admission to the programme is based onJEE Mainrank, followed by Joint Seat Allocation Authority (JoSAA) Counselling. The institute-specific qualifying cutoff is announced after the declaration ofJEE Main resultto manage the seat allotment process. The seat allotment process is based on the college cutoff and the candidate's preference for courses and colleges. The cutoffs are generally declared in seven rounds ofJoSAA Counsellingba

faqs.question: How do I get a seat at IIIT Manipur?
faqs.answer: IIIT Manipur provides various programmes and specialisations to students. These courses are available in different streams. For obtaining IIIT Manipur admission, candidates are selected on the basis of entrance tests. For further details, candidates may visit the official website and learn more regarding the eligibility details for their preferred course choice. Accepted exams include JEE Main and GATE.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission to IIIT Manipur?
faqs.answer: No, there is no provision for direct admission to IIIT Manipur. Candidates have to go through the admission process predefined by the institute.  IIIT Manipur offers BTech and PhD programmes, admissions to which are based on performance of the candidate in the entrance exam accepted. The selection criteria for both programmes are mentioned below:CourseSelection CriteriaBTechJEE MainsPhDAcademic Performance + GATE/ NET/ SLET+ Interview

faqs.question: What is the admission procedure for IIIT Manipur?
faqs.answer: IIIT Manipur admissionis a multi-step process that is conducted in online mode. Aspirants have to apply for their desired courses by fillng out the online application form for the course-specific entrance exam. After appearing for the respective entrance exams, candidates have to apply for the counseling process for the final seat allotment. For IIIT Manipur BTech admission, students need to appear for JEE Main exam followed by JoSAA counselling. Once the application rounds are completed candidates have to go through the selection rounds where candidates are shortlisted based on their entrance exam's score. Than candidates have to register for the counselling rounds. The cutoff for BTech courses is released by the respective counseling bodies.The shortlisted candidates are then required to pay the admission fee to confirm their seats.

faqs.question: What is it like to study in IIIT Manipur?
faqs.answer: According to students reviews on the official website of Shiksha, students can expect an amazing experience at the institute. IIIT Manipur is one of the newly opened institutes, and is rapidly becoming one of the esteemed institutes when it comes to the courses. Students are provided with good facilities and infrastructre, including clean hostels, library, mess, etc. IIIT Manipur also has decent sport facilities. The placements rates have been improving every year with students bagging anaverage package of INR 9.9 LPAand athe highest package of INR 45.64 LPA. As it is still relatively new compared to other top IIITs, there's a long way to go before it can be considered as one of the ivy league institutes. The cut-off is also low compared to other IIITs. Students can go throughShiksha reviewsand decide whether IIIT Manipur is worth taking admission to.

faqs.question: What is the JEE Main 2026 exam date for Session 2 ?
faqs.answer: NTA has announced the JEE Main 2026 exam date for Session 2. JEE Main 2026 Session 2 exam will be held from2nd April 2026to9th April 2026. The JEE Main Application Form 2026 for Session 2 will be available on the website.

description: IIIT Manipur cutoff 2025 for BTech, MTech, and other courses are available on this page. Candidates preparing for the next academic session can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the IIIT Manipur JEE Main cutoff 2025 along with other exams for different courses, rounds, and categories. Further exam-related updates are below:
Important: Top IIITs Cutoff for JEE Main: Past Years Cutoff Ranks and Trends

In this section, candidates can view the last 8 years of IIIT Manipur JEE Main cutoff ranks for various courses and categories by clicking on the download now links provided below to understand the past years' trends.

IIIT Manipur JEE Main cutoff 2025 for the first and last rounds are tabulated below for the General AI category students. In the last round, the IIIT Manipur CSE cutoff 2025 was 115760 in the General category belonging to the AI quota. For other core branch, such as ECE, the JEE Main last round closing ranks for admission was 181376, for the General category. The cutoff ranks for core BTech branches are usually on the lower side, indicating competitive cutoff rank for admission.

For the General AI category students, the IIIT Manipur B.E. / B.Tech cutoff 2025 ranged between 115760 and 207984 in the last round. Considering the lowest cutoff ranks of 115760 and 119721, B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Data Science) and B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering were the top two most competitive branches for admission among the students belonging to the General category.

JEE Main is the accepting exam for admission to the BTech and other UG courses. Qualified candidates are then eligible for the JoSAA and CSAB counselling process for final seat allocation. In this section, aspirants can find out all the important JEE Main 2026 dates to be eligible for admission.

JoSAA counselling 2025 is now over for admission to the Engineering courses offered at IIIT Manipur. In 2025, the JoSAA counselling was conducted for up to six rounds. Further counselling rounds were conducted by CSAB to fill the vacant seats. Students who appeared for the JoSAA and CSAB counselling rounds can refer to the table below to view or download the round- and year-wise JEE Main cutoff lists for BTech admission at IIIT Manipur to understand the cutoff trends.

Tabulated below are the BTech specialisations available for admission based on the last round closing ranks of JEE Main. This will help students to make an informed decision to get the right college and specialisation for admission. The options below are available for students belonging to the General AI quota and are in the range of the most competitive BTech specialisation of IIIT Manipur. hostel_campus.college_name: IIIT Manipur Infrastructure Details & Reviews

facilities: Wi-Fi Campus: The campus is equipped with 24x7 high-speed internet access
Hostel: The institute has its own hostels for both boys and girls. All rooms are two-seater and the catering is outsourced. DTH TV service is available in both the hostels
Clubs: The students can actively participate in co-curricular clubs and activities along with their campus regular study
Library: The library of IIIT Manipur has a good collection of technical books with subscriptions to newspapers, magazines, and journals

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied and disappointed.
reviews.review_text: The college has very old infrastructure. There is a lot of corruption. Very small classrooms and lab equipment are defective. They provide the same equipment in exams also. No facilities here. Not good food, not good teaching. There are 4 students in a room, 4 toilets and 4 bathrooms over 120 students. Just a shame on the name of an Indian institute.

reviews.review_heading: The worst management of IIIT Manipur.
reviews.review_text: As for now, residing in the temporary campus, there is nothing good to say about the infrastructure. They have no better classrooms, nor do they have good hostels. The library is also not a better place to study; actually, you can't. The director doesn't care a bit. Even though in recent times he has been charging students for everything.

reviews.review_heading: Average college. Decent placements. Basic infra. The hostel/mess is below average. Will have to work
reviews.review_text: The college campus is very small (temporary), and the new campus is under construction, but it never seems to get finished. The college and mess staff are rude sometimes; the food is of average quality, and the hostel and mess are below average for the amount of money you are paying. You will just have to survive for 4 years in the hostel and mess. Classrooms and labs are fine. You will find most of the equipment here, but it is not much of use. The library is small, with only one ground for all...

reviews.review_heading: Review of IIIT Manipur - Indian Institute of Information Technology.
reviews.review_text: Hostels have nearly all the facilities needed by students daily, like Wi-Fi, a gym table, a bed, a chair, and an almirah in rooms, although washing machines are chargeable. The campus is temporary with limited, basic facilities; a new campus is in Senapati.

reviews.review_heading: It is good and I am enjoying it.
reviews.review_text: There are all basic and needed facilities available in the hostel like Wi-Fi, geyser, chargeable washing machines, table, chair, almirah, and bed. While the college is running in the temporary campus, our hostel is also outside the campus but girls ones are inside.

reviews.review_heading: It is good not that much bad.
reviews.review_text: Institute is running in its temporary campus, which is good compared to other colleges' temporary campus. It has well-maintained grounds but some classrooms are old and need repair. Hostel has Wi-Fi, geyser but washing machines are chargeable.

reviews.review_heading: Everyone has their review.
reviews.review_text: New campus is under construction, and temporary campus is there. Once new campus starts, the infrastructure will be at peak in hostels. There is a charge for using washing machines, and no medical facility there, but a charge is taken. Limited sports.

reviews.review_heading: Based on my JEE rank, best college.
reviews.review_text: Temporary campus is there, and a new campus is under construction. Once the new campus starts, the infrastructure will be on par with the hostels. There is a charge for using washing machines, and no medical facility is available, but a charge is taken for limited sports.

reviews.review_heading: Good as per my JEE score.
reviews.review_text: There is a temporary campus, and a new campus is under construction. Once the new campus starts, the infrastructure will be state-of-the-art. In the hostels, there is a charge for using washing machines, and there is no medical facility, but a charge is taken for medical services. Sports facilities are limited.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with college.
reviews.review_text: There is a temporary campus, and the new campus is under construction. Once the new campus starts, the infrastructure will be excellent. In the hostels, there is a charge for using washing machines, and there is no medical facility, but a limited charge is taken for it. Sports facilities are limited.

reviews.review_heading: Good as per my JEE rank.
reviews.review_text: The temporary campus is well-maintained, but the resources are limited. Some classrooms are new, while others are old. Many times, classes merge with other sections. Also, the playground facilities are limited, with only a football ground and a basketball court.

reviews.review_heading: Very bad experience, it's a waste.
reviews.review_text: The college has poor infrastructure as it is temporary. A new campus is under construction, and once it starts,  infrastructure will improve. This temporary campus lacks resources, classrooms, and grounds. No medical facilities are provided, not even ambulance service.

reviews.review_heading: Review of IIIT Manipur.
reviews.review_text: There is temporary campus and the facilities are limited. Everything is with limited facility. About hostels, some hostels are new and some are old ones, so no mix of comment, for 1st year there is a rented one. Medical facilities is not available on the campus.

reviews.review_heading: Based on my rank, a  good one.
reviews.review_text: It is a temporary campus with limited resources. Some classrooms are old, and some are new. For playgrounds, it also varies as the campus is small. For football, there is a ground, and we also have a basketball court, and nothing else.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with college.
reviews.review_text: As the college is running on a temporary campus, everything is with limited resources. There is a sports ground for table tennis and basketball; for other sports, there is no such facility. Classes mostly merge with other sections, which is good.

data.description: IIIT Manipur offers various facilities to students. The college has a library, canteen, play ground, and provides transportation facilities to students. The college environment is quite good. The college even has a big conference room. The classrooms are modern. Overall the college experience is quite thrilling and good.

highlights.summary:
Symbiosis Institute of Technology, Nagpur admissions 2026 are open. Other latest updates are as follows:

The JEE Main 2026 registration for session 2 has closed for Symbiosis Institute of Technology, Nagpur admission to BTech, BArch and BPlan courses. The session 2 exams will be conducted from Apr 2 to Apr 9, 2026.

Here are some additional updates regarding the Symbiosis Institute of Technology, Nagpur:

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Symbiosis Institute of Technology, Nagpur offers a wide range of programmes to students at the UG level. The college is mainly concerned with stream such as Engineering. At the UG level, the college offers courses such as B.E. / B.Tech. Symbiosis Institute of Technology, Nagpur courses are offered to students in Full Time mode. Further, the fees structure for Symbiosis Institute of Technology, Nagpur courses stands around INR 12,00,000.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: I will highly recommend our juniors to take admission in this college.

review_content.Placements: As Symbiosis Institute of Technology is one of the best institutes in the Nagpur region, it is basically known for business studies. Our batch is the first batch of CSE in SIT Nagpur, so our batch is the first to get placements. In SIT Pune, there is around 75 percent placement. The top recruiting companies are Deloitte, Amazon, and others.
review_content.Infrastructure: The hostel infrastructure is well-classed. The hostel rooms are clean, and the hostel food is good. Hygiene is also maintained in the mess area. The classrooms are well-equipped with Wi-Fi at a very decent speed, and the classrooms are air-conditioned.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: According to me, this college is one of the best colleges in Nagpur.

review_content.Placements: As I am in my first year, my batch doesn't have any placements yet, but the fourth-year students got really good packages, like 44 LPA. This is our first batch, and the selection process is still ongoing, so I don't have any exact numbers for the average package and all, but from what I hear, all packages are good.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is very good and beautiful. We have a huge campus of 75 acres, and the facilities this college provides are unimaginable. The college is very large and beautiful. The mess is also big, allowing all students to sit simultaneously (which is significant considering there are around 3000 people overall on our campus).

faqs.answer: Symbiosis Institute of Technology, Nagpur admission is both entrance and merit-based for programmes offered at UG levels. A few popular exams accepted by the institution for admission are JEE Main and MHT CET, etc. Admissions to Symbiosis Institute is a bit difficult as it is on the scores of the JEE Mains examination or the state government engineering entrance exam along with a good class 12 marks percentage.
faqs.question: Q: Is it easy to get admission in Symbiosis Institute of Technology, Nagpur?

faqs.answer: Not only in Symbiosis Institute of Technology, Nagpur but in many other colleges a student can get direct admission via 'Management Quota' which means you will get direct admission if and only if your relative or family member is related to the college administration or management. One opting for management quota has to meet the eligibility criteria as well but will get certain relaxations as well.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Review of Symbiosis Institute of Technology, Nagpur.

content.Placements: Many companies visit the college for placements, and some of them are HCL, TCS, Tech Mahindra, Accenture, Fendahl Technology, Global Logic, etc. The highest package is 44 LPA and the average package is 6 LPA. Most of the companies are also hiring for internships. The role offered is a software engineer.
content.Infrastructure: We have Wi-Fi and AC in all the rooms across campus and the library. The infrastructure of our college is top notch and so are the amenities. The hostel facilities are also good. The food available in the mess and canteen is great as well. There are also facilities for sports in the sports complex.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: SIT NAGPUR REVIEW. This is.

content.Placements: The college is new to the town and this is the first placement season for the college now. So, there isn’t much accurate data or records according to which you can judge the college. Maybe in future years, the data will be available to everyone so that they can benefit from it.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is excellent and the best in Nagpur. You won’t find such infrastructure anywhere in Nagpur. The college has a mess, auditorium, separate hostels for girls and boys, and a dedicated sports facility. The quality of the food and everything is top-notch.

The top recruiting companies are Deloitte, Amazon, and others.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: According to me, this college is one of the best colleges in Nagpur.

content.Placements: As I am in my first year, my batch doesn't have any placements yet, but the fourth-year students got really good packages, like 44 LPA. This is our first batch, and the selection process is still ongoing, so I don't have any exact numbers for the average package and all, but from what I hear, all packages are good.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is very good and beautiful. We have a huge campus of 75 acres, and the facilities this college provides are unimaginable. The college is very large and beautiful. The mess is also big, allowing all students to sit simultaneously (which is significant considering there are around 3000 people overall on our campus).

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: I personally recommend my juniors to take admission in this college.

content.Placements: Currently, I am a final year student at this college, and I am glad to inform you that our batch is the first batch of B.Tech students to graduate from SIT Nagpur. Of course, there is no past placement ratio or record, but in our Pune campus, approximately 70% of students got placed in the previous year. The recruiting companies include Cognizant, Amazon, and some local companies. Overall, 80% of students receive internships from the 7th semester onwards. The top roles are hardware developer and app developer.
content.Infrastructure: The academic facilities are outstanding. The campus is fully Wi-Fi enabled with good internet speed. The classrooms have projectors, which help us visualize concepts and understand them easily through presentations. The hostel facilities are awesome, the food is excellent, and they maintain hygiene. Most sports activities are available within the campus.

reviews.review_text: The hostel and campus life is a great experience for the students. The hostel has all the facilities for a comfortable stay. All the rooms have AC and attached washrooms, bathrooms and shower. The mess food is good and the menu is decided by the students themselves. The medical facilities are open at all times. We have a gym and sports department with various kinds of indoor and outdoor sports - basketball, volleyball, futsal, badminton, table tennis, snooker, chess, carrom - to name a few. The ...

reviews.review_heading: Good placements make it a commendable college.
reviews.review_text: The campus is impressive, featuring a spacious layout with a canteen. Wi-Fi is available throughout the campus, along with CCTV security. Classrooms and labs are well-equipped and digitally updated, especially the computer labs. There are two boys' hostels and two girls' hostels within the campus. Sporting facilities include a volleyball court, tennis ball court, badminton court, and a cricket ground.

reviews.review_heading: Everything this college has to offer you is superb.
reviews.review_text: Amazing, just amazing. What to say about that? I mean, I don’t have any words about how well-maintained they are. Everything from the hostel to the washroom is hygienic, and they clean it on a regular basis. The best thing is you don’t need to clean your room; the support staff does all that cleaning. Then we got an amazing sports faculty. The only sport which we don’t have currently is swimming, but we will have it soon. The mess food is also pretty good.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Netaji Subhas University of Technology (West Campus) offers diverse programmes at UG and PG levels in Full Time mode. The offered programmes can be chosen from streams such as Engineering, IT & Software and Architecture & Planning. At the UG level, candidates have the provision to opt from courses such as B.E. / B.Tech and B.Arch. Whereas, at PG level, Netaji Subhas University of Technology (West Campus) offers courses such as M.E./M.Tech. Netaji Subhas University of Technology (West Campus) fee structure for all the courses is around INR 94,000 to 4,46,000.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Geoinformatics Engineering - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Everything you need to know about NSUT.

review_content.Placements: A big chunk of the students were placed this year from my branch. The highest placement was taken by a student who got placed for 40 Lacs per annum. Also, many students were placed in big companies like Apple, Zomato, Google, etc. Also, students took off campus placements too.
review_content.Infrastructure: The classrooms at the West campus of NSUT are just renovated and are very good, with central air conditioning and white boards and auditorium-like seats and screens for teaching. The library is also very decent; it has all the necessary books, and one can issue it with ID cards.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: Great placement, strong curriculum and good infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: About 92% of students are placed for the B.Tech program. Packages range from 12 LPA to 1.25 crores, with top recruiters including Google, Microsoft, Amazon, and Deloitte. For M.Tech, placements stand at 77%, and around 80% of students secure internships at companies like Adobe and Microsoft. Common roles offered include Software Engineer, Data Analyst, and Product Manager.
review_content.Infrastructure: NSUT offers reliable Wi-Fi, modern labs, smart classrooms, and a well-stocked library. Hostels are decent, with good medical care, although the mess food is average. The campus includes sports facilities such as football, basketball, and cricket grounds, and hosts regular events. These facilities are useful and contribute to the overall student experience.

individual_reviews.title: Good placement record and infrastructure.

content.Placements: As I saw, the placement record is pretty much good as compared to any private college's average package, around 8 LPA, and the placement record is almost 95%. Most students always go for government competitive exams through civil engineering, but also another branch called GI (Geo-informatics Engineering), which has a very good placement rating. The highest package is around 32 LPA, and some students are also placed in Microsoft and many top companies that also visited there.
content.Infrastructure: The official hostel isn't provided by the college; that's why you have to find accommodation on your own. The infrastructure of the college is very good compared to other colleges. The lab facilities are too good, with daily lab sessions conducted and many more activities performed during the session.

content.Infrastructure: The classrooms at the West campus of NSUT are just renovated and are very good, with central air conditioning and white boards and auditorium-like seats and screens for teaching. The library is also very decent; it has all the necessary books, and one can issue it with ID cards.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Great placement, strong curriculum and good infrastructure.

content.Placements: About 92% of students are placed for the B.Tech program. Packages range from 12 LPA to 1.25 crores, with top recruiters including Google, Microsoft, Amazon, and Deloitte. For M.Tech, placements stand at 77%, and around 80% of students secure internships at companies like Adobe and Microsoft. Common roles offered include Software Engineer, Data Analyst, and Product Manager.
content.Infrastructure: NSUT offers reliable Wi-Fi, modern labs, smart classrooms, and a well-stocked library. Hostels are decent, with good medical care, although the mess food is average. The campus includes sports facilities such as football, basketball, and cricket grounds, and hosts regular events. These facilities are useful and contribute to the overall student experience.

content.Placements: This year, 70% of students got placed in top companies like Google, Sprinklr, ABP Network, CISCO, and JP Morgan. The highest package was 63 LPA this year. content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is very good. hostel_campus.college_name: Netaji Subhas University of Technology (West Campus) Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: Good placement record and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The official hostel isn't provided by the college; that's why you have to find accommodation on your own. The infrastructure of the college is very good compared to other colleges. The lab facilities are too good, with daily lab sessions conducted and many more activities performed during the session.

reviews.review_heading: NSUT is my dream college.
reviews.review_text:
The classrooms are really nice and clean. Every class has a smart board and is very modern and equipped with new technology, and libraries have a really big collection of books. The sports ground is really big, and the college has every game. 
There are sports clubs and sports meets.

reviews.review_heading: Everything you need to know about NSUT.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms at the West campus of NSUT are just renovated and are very good, with central air conditioning and white boards and auditorium-like seats and screens for teaching. The library is also very decent; it has all the necessary books, and one can issue it with ID cards.

reviews.review_heading: Great placement, strong curriculum and good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: NSUT offers reliable Wi-Fi, modern labs, smart classrooms, and a well-stocked library. Hostels are decent, with good medical care, although the mess food is average. The campus includes sports facilities such as football, basketball, and cricket grounds, and hosts regular events. These facilities are useful and contribute to the overall student experience.

reviews.review_heading: Not that much satisfied with the faculty but yet good college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is very good. All the classrooms in APJs as well as in the departments and blocks are affiliated with interactive smart classrooms, fully air-conditioned rooms, and well-finished furniture. A suitable Wi-Fi connection has been provided that is available 24/7, all day and night.

reviews.review_heading: Peaceful life at NSUT, West campus.
reviews.review_text: There is no hostel facility on the west campus. Canteen food is not so good; it is average. All the equipment is available on campus and is needed by the students. The hostel plan is in process; there would be a college hostel around 2026. The medical facility is very good on campus.

reviews.review_heading: Best crowd, the best environment study and coding but the worst thing is strictness.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure at our college are top-notch. The Wi-Fi speed is currently 1 Gbps, and the management is planning to increase it to 10 Gbps from next year. The labs for ECE, mechanical, biotech, and electrical are well-equipped with the latest equipment, including collaborations with Texas Instruments.

reviews.review_heading: Good placement first year, awesome infrastructure, and campus life is nice.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good, and I can say that it was awesome for the first year, but after the first year, the infrastructure was from 1984, so it was average. Hostels are really strict but good; food is, as usual, boring, but snacks are nice; and time restrictions for the hostel are really strict.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Netaji Subhas University of Technology.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is excellent. We have special classrooms called APJ Abdul complex. All facilities are available. Sports are conducted in this college. Our campus is huge. There is a central library. Several books are available in the library. Our campus has greenery all around. The hostel is well-maintained. Our campus is Wi-Fi enabled. There are strict rules to ensure safety on campus. Drinking water facility is available. The food quality is very good.

reviews.review_heading: Nsut West Campus: pros and cons.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good but hostel facility for west campus is not available. AC installation is currently in process and will be completed by this month. Labs for every subject are there except for fluid mechanics, whose lab is not in working condition and students have to visit main campus for that.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Netaji Subhas University of Technology (West Campus).
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure and hostel are not good. Actually, there is no hostel yet in west campus. Also, the new building being built for architecture students is not done yet. Classrooms are upgraded with air-conditioning. Construction work takes time, but it'll be upgraded in upcoming years.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Netaji Subhas University of Technology (West Campus).
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good. The classes are big and spacious. New air-conditioners are installed in rooms. The library is also decent. Different sports are also available like basketball, gym, volleyball, cricket, and table tennis. The canteen is average, and the hostel facility is not available.

reviews.review_heading: It provides good placements and students will get good opportunities from this college.
reviews.review_text: Hostels are good in this college. Facilities like Wi-Fi and mess are available. Classrooms are very high standard. The quality of food is decent. Sports facilities like cricket ground, badminton court, and tennis court are available. It provides an open gym and a closed gym.

reviews.review_heading: The college was purely worth it when it was with IPU, but now, NSUT charges high fees.
reviews.review_text: The campus is very small. It has a small building, with trapezium-shaped classes (close to) and also a canteen. Don't get your hopes high as the food is as bad here, but you can get many options outside the campus at walking distance.

reviews.review_heading: The infrastructure and the teachers are bad but who needs that when you get good placements.
reviews.review_text: Labs condition are average as the equipment are kinda old, library contains decent amount of books but frankly speaking you won't be reading them. Classrooms are in average conditions as well, they give you government school vibes actually not good infrastructure.

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about Netaji Subhas University of Technology (West Campus)

likes.text: Our college got affiliated with NSUT the previous year, So placements are not fixed this year, but because of NSUT, we may have good placements in this college.

faqs.answer: A:    Marathwada Mitra Mandal's College of Engineering has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityPh.D.Candidate must have completed master degree from a recognised university.B.E. / B.TechCandidate who have passed Diploma in Engineering & Technology & obtained at least 45% marks (40% marks for Backward class, EWS & PWD candidates belonging to Maharashtra State only) can also apply.M.E./M.TechSponsored candidate must have minimum of two years of full time work experience in a registered firm/ company/ industry/ educational and/ or research institute/ any Government Department or Government Autonomous Organization in the relevant field in which admission is being sought.MBA/PGDMCandidate must have completed a minimum three-year Bachelor's Degree in any discipline or its equivalent with the above-mentioned marks (45% in case of reserved category students) from any of the Universities recognised by UGC or AIU.

reviews_list.review_title: An autonomous SPPU-affiliated college.

review_content.Placements: I am currently in the computer branch, and according to what I've heard, my branch has around 70% placement, and the highest package I know for my branch is 27 LPA. Students can apply for companies from the 6th semester itself till the last semester. The average package is around 5 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: Hostel facilities are great, and the mess is very good, especially for vegetarians. Good quality of food provided. Sports facilities are limited, though they are good. Wi-Fi is available mostly throughout the campus, but requires a login to use it. Labs are well-equipped.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Good place to grow overall and make great friends.

review_content.Placements: According to what I know, there were 78 students placed from a batch of 100 students, and the others mostly went to higher studies. The highest package was 23 LPA. The average package was around 6 LPA. The placement cell is helpful and trained.
review_content.Infrastructure: There are well-equipped labs with all the required equipment. Wi-Fi is available throughout the campus, and students need to register for it. Wi-Fi can open only the allowed websites and social media, and other websites are restricted. Classrooms have digital boards or projectors and whiteboards.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: A place fit for cultivating yourself without any external disturbance (unnecessary drama, etc).

review_content.Placements: I am pursuing B.Tech in computer engineering and am currently in 2nd year. Although my batch is yet to graduate, I have observed that the percentage of students getting placed is rather good (around 70-80%). The highest package was 51 LPA, and the average one was around 4.8 LPA in the year 2023. Top recruiting companies include Amazon, Infosys, Wipro, etc. Around 60-65% of students secured internships in companies like Wipro, TCS, etc. Top roles offered are software engineer, QA engineer, system analyst, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure available for CS are satisfactory. Things like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, library, etc., are all well-maintained and looked after. Apart from the department-specific library, there is also a general library available. Plenty of high-end PC's are available for various applications. Classrooms have good sunlight entry as well. Hostel facilities are satisfactory as well. All the necessary things are provided by the hostel. The food provided in the mess and canteen is also of good quality. There is also the availability of sports and games which will help the students.

individual_reviews.title: Artificial Intelligence and Data Science at MMCOE, Karvenagar, Pune.

content.Placements: As Artificial Intelligence and Data Science is a relatively new branch, there is no placement data yet since the first batch has yet to graduate. However, if we take into consideration the placements of CS/IT batches, we can infer that around 70% of students typically get placed, with salaries between 4.5-5.5 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: The college has all the relevant facilities, such as Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and a library have been provided for and are well-maintained. The hostel is satisfactory, as it provides items such as bulbs, rugs, pillows, bedsheets, and other necessities. The food consists of only vegetarian dishes and is available in a large variety. You can also find a gym on campus, along with an indoor sports room, which has games like chess and carrom.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Good faculty support, strong placements, and well-equipped infrastructure.

content.Placements: In our BE computer engineering 2025 batch around 85-90 percent of students are placed successfully. The highest package offered is 18 LPA the lowest is 3.5 LPA and the average package is 6 LPA to 7 LPA. Top recruiters included TCS Infosys Capgemini Cognizant Accenture Wipro and few product based firms like Amazon and ZS Associates. Nearly 70 percent of students received internships in reputed companies such as Infosys Persistent and Capgemini. The most offered roles are software engineer full stack developer data analyst and system engineer.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: An autonomous SPPU-affiliated college.

content.Placements: I am currently in the computer branch, and according to what I've heard, my branch has around 70% placement, and the highest package I know for my branch is 27 LPA. Students can apply for companies from the 6th semester itself till the last semester. The average package is around 5 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: Hostel facilities are great, and the mess is very good, especially for vegetarians. Good quality of food provided. Sports facilities are limited, though they are good. Wi-Fi is available mostly throughout the campus, but requires a login to use it. Labs are well-equipped.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Good place to grow overall and make great friends.

content.Placements: According to what I know, there were 78 students placed from a batch of 100 students, and the others mostly went to higher studies. The highest package was 23 LPA. The average package was around 6 LPA. The placement cell is helpful and trained.
content.Infrastructure: There are well-equipped labs with all the required equipment. Wi-Fi is available throughout the campus, and students need to register for it. Wi-Fi can open only the allowed websites and social media, and other websites are restricted. Classrooms have digital boards or projectors and whiteboards.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: A place fit for cultivating yourself without any external disturbance (unnecessary drama, etc).

content.Placements: I am pursuing B.Tech in computer engineering and am currently in 2nd year. Although my batch is yet to graduate, I have observed that the percentage of students getting placed is rather good (around 70-80%). The highest package was 51 LPA, and the average one was around 4.8 LPA in the year 2023. Top recruiting companies include Amazon, Infosys, Wipro, etc. Around 60-65% of students secured internships in companies like Wipro, TCS, etc. Top roles offered are software engineer, QA engineer, system analyst, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure available for CS are satisfactory. Things like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, library, etc., are all well-maintained and looked after. Apart from the department-specific library, there is also a general library available. Plenty of high-end PC's are available for various applications. Classrooms have good sunlight entry as well. Hostel facilities are satisfactory as well. All the necessary things are provided by the hostel. The food provided in the mess and canteen is also of good quality. There is also the availability of sports and games which will help the students.

paragraphs: Marathwada Mitra Mandal's College of Engineering admissions are based on merit. The institute considers applications of candidates meeting the eligibility criteria.Marathwada Mitra Mandal's College of Engineeringoffers courses at UG, PG and Doctorate levels. Some of the courses include B.E. / B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech and MBA/PGDM. Candidates can apply online for the preferred course.
The total tuition fees for UG courses isINR 2,79,476. Aspirants may also need to pay one-time caution deposit at the time of admission.
The institute offers UG courses for 4 years. PG courses are offered for 2 years.

faqs.question: What can students do after JEE Main session 2 result?
faqs.answer: After JEE session 2 is completed, only those candidates who are aiming for IITs need to start preparing for JEE Advanced after clearing JEE Main. Those who are above the 98th percentile should start preparing for JEE Advanced as soon as possible. Those below this, between the 95th and 98th percentile, should focus on attempting more mock tests and previous year question papers so that they have a better chance of clearing JEE Advanced

faqs.question: What is the eligibility to get admission in Marathwada Mitra Mandal's College of Engineering for UG/PG courses?
faqs.answer: Marathwada Mitra Mandal's College of Engineering has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:CoursesEligibilityPh.D.Candidate must have completed master degree from a recognised university.B.E. / B.TechCandidate who have passed Diploma in Engineering & Technology & obtained at least 45% marks (40% marks for Backward class, EWS & PWD candidates belonging to Maharashtra State only) can also apply.M.E./M.TechSponsored candidate must have minimum of two years of full time work experience in a registered firm/ company/ industry/ educational and/ or research institute/ any Government Department or Government Autonomous Organization in the relevant field in which admission is being sought.MBA/PGDMCandidate must have completed a minimum three-year Bachelor's Degree in any discipline or its equivalent with the above-mentioned marks (45% in case of reserved category students) from any of the Universities recognised by UGC or AIU.
