hostel_campus.college_name: Marathwada Mitra Mandal's College of Engineering Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: Artificial Intelligence and Data Science at MMCOE, Karvenagar, Pune.
reviews.review_text: The college has all the relevant facilities, such as Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and a library have been provided for and are well-maintained. The hostel is satisfactory, as it provides items such as bulbs, rugs, pillows, bedsheets, and other necessities. The food consists of only vegetarian dishes and is available in a large variety. You can also find a gym on campus, along with an indoor sports room, which has games like chess and carrom.

reviews.review_heading: Good faculty support, strong placements, and well-equipped infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Our computer engineering department has well-equipped computer labs with high-speed Wi-Fi, modern classrooms, a digital library, and access to research resources. Hostel facilities are decent with spacious rooms, purified drinking water, and study-friendly environment. The mess and canteen provide hygienic food with both vegetarian options. Medical facilities are available on campus along with tie-ups with nearby hospitals. Sports grounds for cricket, football, basketball, and indoor games ensur...

reviews.review_heading: An autonomous SPPU-affiliated college.
reviews.review_text: Hostel facilities are great, and the mess is very good, especially for vegetarians. Good quality of food provided. Sports facilities are limited, though they are good. Wi-Fi is available mostly throughout the campus, but requires a login to use it. Labs are well-equipped.

reviews.review_heading: Good place to grow overall and make great friends.
reviews.review_text: There are well-equipped labs with all the required equipment. Wi-Fi is available throughout the campus, and students need to register for it. Wi-Fi can open only the allowed websites and social media, and other websites are restricted. Classrooms have digital boards or projectors and whiteboards.

reviews.review_heading: A place fit for cultivating yourself without any external disturbance (unnecessary drama, etc).
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure available for CS are satisfactory. Things like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, library, etc., are all well-maintained and looked after. Apart from the department-specific library, there is also a general library available. Plenty of high-end PC's are available for various applications. Classrooms have good sunlight entry as well. Hostel facilities are satisfactory as well. All the necessary things are provided by the hostel. The food provided in the mess and canteen is als...

reviews.review_heading: Placements are nice in average with 5-6 LPA package and the highest package is 51 LPA (in 2020). .
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi internet is available in the hostel, and facilities are provided in the classrooms and library. Food is available in the mess and canteen, with nice food and snacks. The hostel is very clean, and hostel life is nice and beautiful, with a great campus environment. The hostel for girls and boys is separate, and there is security with more guards.

reviews.review_heading: Let me know if you would like a deep dive into one of these colleges' specific streams.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure rating is average around 3.4/5, with positive reviews for classrooms, labs, libraries, and sports facilities. Some reviews suggest room for improvement in spaces like classrooms and seating areas. Several students appreciate the modern amenities, canteen, Wi-Fi, and overall hygiene.

reviews.review_heading: Good placement every year, strong academics, and skilled faculty.
reviews.review_text: Our department offers smart classrooms, high-speed Wi-Fi, modern labs, and a rich library. Hostel has clean rooms, decent mess & canteen food, medical support, and sports facilities including indoor & outdoor games, fostering a comfortable and engaging campus life.

reviews.review_heading: Got better after getting autonomy.
reviews.review_text: The campus is very small, but I won't consider it very bad. The labs are very well-equipped and have decent PCs. The library has many useful books you could borrow, and the hostel is clean, but the hostel building is a bit outdated. Still, it is well maintained and very livable; hostel rooms are bigger than most other hostels in Pune.

reviews.review_heading: Great infrastructure, supportive faculty, and promising placement opportunities.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is also nice. The labs of mechanical engineering, the classrooms of mechanical engineering, and the overall library infrastructure are all very nice. However, the Wi-Fi is not that great. The canteen's available food quality is also really nice, and the medical faculty members are very nice. Sports and games are conducted regularly.

reviews.review_heading: It is one of best college in Pune as far I know.
reviews.review_text: The hostel and mess facility, as well as canteen, are good. Wi-Fi is also available in the college and in the hostel. There is also a playground where students can play football, cricket, and basketball. Every lab is attached to Wi-Fi and PCs.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure, decent faculty, and strong placements for AI/this.
reviews.review_text: The department has well-maintained labs with high-speed Wi-Fi, modern classrooms with projectors, and a digital library with access to research journals. The hostel is decent, with 2/3 seater rooms, 24/7 water & electricity, and regular cleaning. Mess food is average, canteen food is better and affordable. There's a medical facility on campus with basic care and tie-ups with a nearby hospital. Sports ground, gym, indoor games, and open-air theatre are also available.

reviews.review_heading: Great place to make connections.
reviews.review_text: Hostel facilities, first-year students are allotted a separate hostel building, while from the second year onward, a different hostel is assigned. The hostel is very budget-friendly and offers great value for money. One highlight is the presence of washing machines, which makes daily chores more manageable for students.

reviews.review_heading: A place where you can grow with your peers.

reviews_list.review_title: It is an absolutely average college because of infrastructure, crowd, high exam form, etc.

review_content.Placements: Placements in the Diploma IT course are average. Around 20-25% of students get placed this year in my batch. Top recruiting companies are TCS, Aspirations, and some local IT start-ups. The highest package is 3.6 LPA and the average package ranges from 1.5-2 LPA. Roles offered are junior developer, technical support executive, and intern position.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of ASOIT is average and it's like we are entering society (apartment type). There is no playground and no sports activities in college. It has a basic Wi-Fi facility but not for students. The computer lab is good and classrooms are also good. The library is good but has limited resources.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Amazing faculty members are there in the college.

review_content.Placements: About 70% of students get placements in the college. The highest package in college is 13 LPA. The lowest package is 1.5 LPA and the average package is 3.5 LPA. Various companies visit our college for placements. Various students got internships in my class. Roles offered are web developer, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: Various facilities are provided to the college students. There are AC labs and full internet labs in our college. There is no hostel for boys in the college. Only girl's hostels are available in our college.
review_content.Faculty: Teachers are very helpful in the college. They help students in every possible manner. The computer engineering course makes students industry-ready for the various roles in the IT industry. Semester exams are moderate, not very difficult, and not very simple. The course is really amazing. We have various things to learn in our course.

faqs.answer: Aditya Silver Oak Institute of Technology (ASOIT) was founded in 2014 and is part of the Silver Oak Group of Institutes (SOGI). The institute is located in Gujarat and is accredited by the AICTE. The Times of India ranked it seventh among India's top ten engineering institutes. admission_process.title: Aditya Silver Oak Institute of Technology Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Aditya Silver Oak Institute of Technology admission 2025 is expected to begin soon. The institute offers admission to BTech and After 10th Diploma courses across various specialisations. It is a constituent college ofSilver Oak University. Admission to a full-time UG programme atAditya Silver Oak Institute of Technologyis done as per Admission Committee for Professional Courses (ACPC) regulations. More details around Aditya Silver Oak Institute of Technology admissions are given in the article below.

Admission to Aditya Silver Oak Institute of Technology is merit-based for both BTech and Diploma courses. Candidates must fulfil the minimum eligibility criteria before applying for their desired programme. Check below theAditya Silver Oak Institute of Technology courseeligibility and selection criteria:
Aditya Silver Oak Institute of Technology admissions begin with online registrations. Check below the detailed steps for Aditya Silver Oak Institute of Technology admission process:
To apply for admission to BTech course at Aditya Silver Oak Institute of Technology must register on the official website of ACPC.

Admission to BTech course at Aditya Silver Oak Institute of Technology is regulated as per Admission Committee for Professional Courses (ACPC) norms. Candidates must register for ACPC counselling process based on their last qualifying exam scores of Class 12. Whereas, the institute grants direct admission for Diploma courses based on candidates' past academic records.
After registration on the ACPC counselling portal, candidates must appear for the counselling round and pay the final fee to confirm admission.

faqs.question: What will happen if someone misses the internal exams at Silver Oak University, Aditya Silver Oak College of Technology?
faqs.answer: If someone misses the internal exams at Silver Oak University, Aditya Silver Oak College of Technology, they'll get the backlog and they must have to clear their backlog through out taking exam in next year. He/she will be allowed to give retest or he should bring necessary marks to Pass the End Sem exam to clear the semester, the sole alternative is to repeat the course or improve if the grade is D.

faqs.question: What happens if a student fails in the internal exams at Silver Oak University, Aditya Silver Oak College of Technology?
faqs.answer: If a student fails in the internal exams at Silver Oak University, Aditya Silver Oak College of Technology, they'll get the backlog. They can apply for makeup exams if there is a real cause, the sole alternative is to repeat the course or improve if the grade is D. If a student misses an internal exam, they may repeat it if their leave letter is approved by the professor.

placement_data.title: Aditya Silver Oak Institute of Technology Placement Overview 2023
paragraphs: Aditya Silver Oak Institute of Technology placement report is yet to be released for the batch passing out in 2023. However, the institute has released the NIRF report 2023 on its official website. According to the NIRF report 2023, 347 BTech students were placed during Aditya Silver Oak Institute of Technology placements 2022. Further, the median package offered to BTech students during the 2022 placements was INR 5.3 LPA. The top recruiters of Aditya Silver Oak Institute of Technology during the past years included TCS, Infosys, Hitech Group, Maruti Construction, Synoverge, Accenture, Wipro, Cognizant , etc.

data: Final Placements 2022: The median package offered to BTech students during 2022 placements increased by nearly 4% when compared with 2021 The number of BTech students placed in 2022 increased by 3% when compared with 2021

faqs.question: Does Aditya Silver Oak Institute of Technology have a placement cell?
faqs.answer: Yes, Aditya Silver Oak Institute of Technology has a placement cell that ensures placement assistance to every student. It is also responsible for conducting on-campus placement drives and organises a wide range of activities such as industry visits, live projects, workshops, guest lectures and seminars.

average_package.title: Aditya Silver Oak Institute of Technology Average Package 2023

faqs.question: What was the average package offered to BTech students during Aditya Silver Oak Institute of Technology placements 2023?
faqs.answer: Aditya Silver Oak Institute of Technology average package is yet to be released on the official website. However, the median package offered during 2022 placements has been disclosed in the NIRF report 2023. The median package offered to BTech students during Aditya Silver Oak Institute of Technology placements 2022 was INR 5.3 LPA. Earlier, the median package offered to both BTech students during 2021 placements was INR 5.1 LPA.

faqs.question: What is the fee structure for B.E. in Electrical Engineering at Aditya Silver Oak Institute of Technology, Silver Oak University?
faqs.answer: The following describes the cost of the B.E. in electrical engineering programme at Silver Oak University's Aditya Silver Oak Institute of Technology: The entire cost of tuition for the four-year B.E. in Electrical Engineering programme is INR 2.52 lakh. On the Silver Oak University website, you can see the cost breakdown for international students.

faqs.question: What is the fee for various courses at Aditya Silver Oak College of Technology?
faqs.answer: Aditya Silver Oak Institute of Technology ASOIT offers a 4-year BE programme in several specialisations, including aeronautical, chemical, civil, computer, electrical, information technology, and mechanical. The college also offers a 3-year Diploma programme in chemical and information technology. The fee structure for various courses at Aditya Silver Oak Institute of Technology is listed below for the candidate's reference. BTech: INR 2.5 lakh - INR 3.6 lakh After 10th Diploma: INR 1.2 lakh The fee structure varies according to the courses taken. The aforementioned tuition fee is based on an approximate range.

faqs.question: What is the fee for PG courses at Aditya Silver Oak College of Technology?
faqs.answer: Silver Oak University's postgraduate tuition fee structure ranges from INR 45 Lacs to INR 1 lakh. According to the college's and Shiksha's official information, Aditya Silver Oak College of Technology provides undergraduate and Diploma programmes in BE. Aeronautical Engineering, Chemical Engineering, Civil Engineering, Computer Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Information Technology, Mechanical Engineering, Science & Humanities, and Administrative Staff are among the nine departments at ASOIT. Silver Oak University, on the other hand, offers postgraduate programmes such as M.Tech, MBA, M.Sc., and MCA. Engineering, management, information technology, science, commerce, social work, and vocational education are among the specialisations available at Silver Oak University.

hostel_campus.college_name: Aditya Silver Oak Institute of Technology Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied with college placement, inside infrastructure and more.
reviews.review_text: Some blocks are designed and renovated for new students orientation lectures but then they shift them to old and normal classrooms with old benches and theme. Lack of lies we have to face while using the elevator and in summer there are huge types of suffocation due to the student crowd.

reviews.review_heading: It is a nice college with qualified and helpful faculty members.
reviews.review_text: Aditya Silver Oak Institute of Technology (ASOIT) offers a well-structured and modern infrastructure that supports both academic learning and comfortable hostel living. The institute provides well-equipped classrooms with smart boards, projectors, and comfortable seating that create a conducive learning environment. The computer labs are updated with the latest software and high-speed internet, which is essential for IT and engineering students. Additionally, the library is well-stocked with aca...

reviews.review_heading: It is an absolutely average college because of infrastructure, crowd, high exam form, etc.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of ASOIT is average and it's like we are entering society (apartment type). There is no playground and no sports activities in college. It has a basic Wi-Fi facility but not for students. The computer lab is good and classrooms are also good. The library is good but has limited resources.

reviews.review_heading: Amazing faculty members are there in the college.
reviews.review_text: Various facilities are provided to the college students. There are AC labs and full internet labs in our college. There is no hostel for boys in the college. Only girl's hostels are available in our college.

reviews.review_heading: Silver Oak University and Aaditya Silver Oak University both colleges give us good placements.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are very good in this college. The food quality of canteen is superb. The hostel facilities are good. This college also have medical facilities, sports, and games. This college provides good facilities like labs, classrooms, library, and good Wi-Fi.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, it is a good college for students.
reviews.review_text: Hostel and college infrastructure are good because the college is newly designed and developed. It is only 10 years old and is still developing its infrastructure year by year. It is a very large college with many students.

reviews.review_heading: Balanced learning experience at ASOIT.
reviews.review_text: This college provides decent infrastructure for the B.Tech IT course. Classrooms are equipped with basic facilities such as projectors and smart boards. Computer labs are functional and equipped with the necessary software. The library has a good collection of resources, but, some students feel that more digital content could be added. I am not living in a college hostel, so I do not have any idea about it.

reviews.review_heading: My overall experience with this university is average.
reviews.review_text: Huge class sizes with the best seating arrangements for students, as well as a lab for practical classes, a large canteen area, and social activities organized by university management, college farewell is also good, and they offer a variety of fests.

reviews.review_heading: Top-notch college experience.
reviews.review_text: Our college boasts state-of-the art infrastructure, equipped with facilities to foster learning and innovation. The hostel provides comfortable living and academic growth. From well-equipped labs to spacious recreation areas, every aspect enhances.

reviews.review_heading: The University has a good placements ratio and it is approved by many national boards.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms are fully ventilated and the computer labs are AC occupied. The university has a hostel facility in which 2-3 sharing rooms are provided with AC/non-AC facilities. The canteen food is very tasty and is prepared with proper hygiene. Especially, chole puri of the mess is the most favorite dish of all the students.

reviews.review_heading: A place where the students can develop all rounder skills.
reviews.review_text: College provides both girls and boys hostels which are very good and have a developed infrastructure. Students also have option to avail food court facilities where they get different kinds of food items. And if they want to have homely food, they can have the mess food where we get chole puri and pulav which taste like home food. College also provides a library where the students can issue books for free along with a seating area which is fully air conditioned.

reviews.review_heading: High facilites and good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Students are provided with high learning resources by the college. We are also provided computers and free Wi-Fi. There is also an option for canteen and mess available where the students can have their interested items to eat. Classrooms are also fully air conditioned.

reviews.review_heading: I had a good experience in this college.
reviews.review_text: The faculty members in my course are not only friendly and helpful, but they also possess impressive qualifications, with some of them currently pursuing their Ph.D. degrees. Additionally, the campus provides separate hostels for girls and boys, along with a canteen that serves delicious food.

reviews.review_heading: Poor Campus Life and Management.
reviews.review_text: There are no facilities like wi-fi and AC in college campus. Infrastructure and management of my branch is the worst than even seen. College doesn't have a single playground in campus. There are only studies and lectures. Hostel is not so big. Canteen food is good but college does not have medical facilities, sports and games.

reviews.review_heading: Detailed Review (real hidden truth) of ASOIT.
reviews.review_text: There is no Wi-Fi facility available on campus. The computer labs are okay, but the computer lab A.C. is generally not used. Still, the computers are equipped with old software like Dev C+, DOSBox, and VS Code, which hangs on them very often. The classrooms are large, and the last benchers can't hear any words when the professors speak. All classes have these weird-looking range benches, which are really bad to sit on. The college campus is always overcrowded due to that. It's always so noisy in...

admissions 2026 are open. Students can apply for the respective courses by visiting the official website of the college.

table.details: Indian Institute of Information Technology Una

college_info.intro:
Candidates willing to get admission to various courses must apply online on the official website of IIIT Una. IIIT Una's most popular programmes are BTech and MTech. BTech is provided in three specialisations with a total seat intake of 198, 66 per specialisation. Some of the specialisations in which BTech is provided are Computer Science and Engineering (CSE), Electronics and Communication Engineering (ECE), and Infomation Technology.
BTech and MTech are the top programmes as these course students are placed in top companies such as LinkedIn, Apache, Amazon, C-DoT, and others. The highest and average package offered during IIIT Una placement 2025 was INR 30 LPA and INR 11.02 LPA, respectively. The college also provides PhD courses to students. Check out the below video to know more about courses offered by IIIT Una:

faqs.answer: A:    There is no such provision for direct admission to the BTech programme at IIIT Una. IIIT Una accepts admission for the BTech programme based on a valid rank in JEE-Main. Candidates aspiring to take admission to the BTech programme at IIIT Una must take the JEE-Main exam conducted by NTA by filling out the its application form through JEE official website. Candidates having JEE-Main rank above the closing rank specified in the cut-off list released by the college can apply for the counselling process where they can fill their branch preferences followed by document verification and fee payment.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: A decent college to join - With IIIT #tag.

review_content.Placements: The placements when I joined the college are good as per the 4th year batch but the current batch of 4th year is not doing well on placements. Although the placement percentage is good but the average and median packages have dropped from last year. Probably due to low potential students in a certain batch. The off-campus placements are good though, and many seniors are getting internships from 2nd year instead. So, it is a well-to-do college in terms of placements as compared to tier-II and tier-III colleges.
review_content.Infrastructure: Although due to lesser number of branches and lower number of students, the student intake is less and the crowd is also less. So, it affects the overall campus size. The campus size is small and compact but they provide almost all facilities. It lacks the following, no proper auditorium (only an indoor big size lecture hall is treated as an auditorium), and the area is not so developed. It is located outside the city. But we can reach the city easily.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: The overall experience in this college will be really good.

review_content.Placements: The placement states of this college are good. 87% of the students were placed in the CSE batch of 2024-2025. The highest package is 30 LPA, and the average package of the CSE course is 12.38 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Amazon, Microsoft, Grow, Google, Byju's, Jio, etc. Due to the recession, the placement states are low but are better than other colleges.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure and facilities are really good. The infrastructure is new, and the condition of the rooms is better than the holder colleges. Classrooms are small and good for focusing on the quality content taught during the lectures. Wi-Fi, labs, and library are good. The quality of food in the mess is satisfactory. The medical facilities, sports, and games are very good than the other colleges.

overview_faqs.answer: At the undergraduate level, IIIT UNA offers BTech courses to students. The total tuition fee for all BTech courses is INR 7.6 LPA. This is only the tuition fee. Students may also have to pay for the Hostel Fee of INR 2.99 lakh. Additionally, a one-time Security Deposit of INR 5,000 must also be paid. However, this information is sourced from the official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

overview_faqs.question: What is the campus life like at IIIT Una?
overview_faqs.answer: The campus life at IIIT Una is very vibrant. The college has a big campus and provides numerous facilities to students. The institute also has a number of sports facilities: a cricket ground/ a football field/ a tennis court/ a badminton court etc. Visit the campus and see all facilities that are being provided by the college for a great study experience after schooling or after graduation.

review_summary.college_name: IIIT Una Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Life at the Indian Institute of Information Technology, Una, Himachal Pradesh.

content.Placements: The placement statistics of IIIT Una are as follows. The highest package is 30 LPA, and average is 11 LPA. Branch-wise placements are CSE-12.38 LPA, ECE-10.79 LPA, and IT-9.9 LPA. Top recruiters include Microsoft, Google, Amazon, Infosys, TCS, etc. Many students are also hired as interns in companies for the role of SDE.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the Indian Institute of Information Technology, Una, is good compared to other IIITs constructed at the same time. There are 4 hostels, 2 basketball courts, 3 badminton courts, 1 lawn tennis court, and 1 football court. All years have hostel accommodation, and the permanent campus spans across 100 acres. However, the upcoming batch faces an accommodation issue, as only 100 to 150 students will be allotted hostels within the campus on a first-come, first-served basis.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Growing Institute with good infrastructure and decent placement opportunities.

content.Placements: I am a final-year student of the 2025 batch from electronics and communication. The placement scenario has been fairly strong increasing demand for electronics. Approximately 70%-73% of students from our batch have been placed while drives still going on. It would be better in the near future.
content.Infrastructure: Our college is equipped with all the necessary infrastructure to support academic and research activities. The classrooms are well-ventilated, equipped with projects, and fully AC-oriented. High-speed data is provided through Wi-Fi but sometimes power cuts lead to poor quality.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: A decent college to join - With IIIT #tag.

content.Placements: The placements when I joined the college are good as per the 4th year batch but the current batch of 4th year is not doing well on placements. Although the placement percentage is good but the average and median packages have dropped from last year. Probably due to low potential students in a certain batch. The off-campus placements are good though, and many seniors are getting internships from 2nd year instead. So, it is a well-to-do college in terms of placements as compared to tier-II and tier-III colleges.
content.Infrastructure: Although due to lesser number of branches and lower number of students, the student intake is less and the crowd is also less. So, it affects the overall campus size. The campus size is small and compact but they provide almost all facilities. It lacks the following, no proper auditorium (only an indoor big size lecture hall is treated as an auditorium), and the area is not so developed. It is located outside the city. But we can reach the city easily.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: The overall experience in this college will be really good.

content.Placements: The placement states of this college are good. 87% of the students were placed in the CSE batch of 2024-2025. The highest package is 30 LPA, and the average package of the CSE course is 12.38 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Amazon, Microsoft, Grow, Google, Byju's, Jio, etc. Due to the recession, the placement states are low but are better than other colleges.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure and facilities are really good. The infrastructure is new, and the condition of the rooms is better than the holder colleges. Classrooms are small and good for focusing on the quality content taught during the lectures. Wi-Fi, labs, and library are good. The quality of food in the mess is satisfactory. The medical facilities, sports, and games are very good than the other colleges.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Not a good choice to choose this college.

content.Placements: Placements are not very good. Management does not care about it at all no support from them. Few teachers are there who only shout nothing else if you wanna have placement need to go off campus. Internships are even worse. Will get nothing else from the disappointment.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is below average compared to other colleges. The rooms are well cleaned, but the NY mess does not have AC or a cooler, and there are no medical facilities. There is no pest control. There is no auditorium and no proper canteen, and there are insufficient hostels, forcing students to live outside. Overall, it’s not good.

admission_overview.title: IIIT Una Admission Overview 2026
admission_overview.description: IIIT Una admissions 2026 will open soon. The institute offers various UG, PG, and doctoral-level programmes across multiple specialisations in the field of engineering. At the UG level, IIIT Una offers a BTech programme in three specialisations. IIIT Una offers MTech across two specialisations at PG level. Further, PhD course is also offered in full-time and part-time modes. IIIT Una admission is conducted based on the score of JEE Main and GATE scores, followed by JoSAA and CCMT Counselling. Candidates aspiring to take admission at IIIT Una also previously known as IIIT Himachal Pradesh can refer to the following table for admission and other necessary details: IIIT Una Admission Highlights

admission_process.title: IIIT Una Admission Process 2026

paragraphs: IIIT Una admission process includes the application process, selection round, cutoff, merit list and counselling. Find below the complete process around IIIT Una admission 2026:

For IIIT Una BTech admission, candidates must visit the official website of NTA to apply for the JEE Main entrance exam. For MTech admission, candidates need to apply for GATE. Further, candidates have to apply on the institute's official website for MBA admission. Moreover, the aspirant shall ensure that the application form is submitted within the prescribed due date.

After the application process, the counselling bodies release a course-wise cutoff list. The cutoff list indicates the minimum required score in the respective entrance exam for a candidate to become eligible for admission. Candidates with a score equal to or more than the cutoff marks can apply.

Candidates applying for a BTech course further have to go through JoSAA for seat allotment and, for MTech admission, CCMT conducts the counselling round. While the candidates who apply for a PhD may have to go through an interview round.
After the selection rounds and counselling, seats are allotted to the eligible candidates. Selected students can further pay the required fee to confirm their seats.

IIT Una offers over5 coursesunder multiple streams at the UG and PG levels. IIIT Una fees for all these courses include various components, such as the tuition fee, hostel fee, etc. The fee amount varies from one course to another. In the total course fee, some components are paid every semester, while some are one-time.
Also, the IIIT Una seats may differ for each BTech and MTech specialisation. Candidates can check the following table for a detailedIIIT Una feesand seat intake for all the available courses:
Note:The above mentioned fee & seat intake details are sourced from the official website/ sanctioning body and are subject to change.

faqs.question: Does IIIT Una accept direct admission?
faqs.answer: There is no such provision for direct admission at IIIT Una. IIIT Una being a Centrally Funded Technical Institute just like all other IIIT’s across India follow the guidelines established by the Ministry of Education, Government of India. IIIT Una courses are entirely entrance exam based. For admission to the IIIT Una flagship BTech programme, candidates must have valid ranks in JEE-Main based on which they can apply for the counselling process through Joint Seat Allocation Authority (JoSAA) and Central Seat Allocation Board (CSAB). After the completion of counselling process, candidates will be required to report to admission cell at IIIT Una to complete the remaining formalities of document verification and fee payment for final seat allotment.

description: IIIT Una cutoff 2025 for BTech, MTech, and other courses are available on this page. Candidates preparing for the next academic session can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the IIIT Una JEE Main cutoff 2025 along with other exams for different courses, rounds, and categories. Further exam-related updates are below:

In this section, candidates can view the last 9 years of IIIT Una JEE Main cutoff ranks for various courses and categories by clicking on the download now links provided below to understand the past years' trends.

IIIT Una JEE Main cutoff 2025 for the first and last rounds are tabulated below for the General AI category students. In the last round, the IIIT Una CSE cutoff 2025 was 42692 in the General category belonging to the AI quota. For other core branch, such as ECE, the JEE Main last round closing ranks for admission was 60792, for the General category. The cutoff ranks for core BTech branches are usually on the lower side, indicating competitive cutoff rank for admission.

For the General AI category students, the IIIT Una B.E. / B.Tech cutoff 2025 ranged between 42692 and 60792 in the last round. Considering the lowest cutoff ranks of 42692 and 45713, B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering and B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Data Science) were the top two most competitive branches for admission among the students belonging to the General category.

JEE Main is the accepting exam for admission to the BTech and other UG courses. Qualified candidates are then eligible for the JoSAA and CSAB counselling process for final seat allocation. In this section, aspirants can find out all the important JEE Main 2026 dates to be eligible for admission.

Further counselling rounds were conducted by CSAB to fill the vacant seats. hostel_campus.college_name: IIIT Una Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description: Indian Institute of Information Technology, Una mentored by National Institute of Technology, Hamirpur (HP) institute provides hostel accommodation to all the students. There are twelve hostels in this institute. Nine of it are for boys and girls have the separate three. Each hostel has got its own mess, solar heating system, own recreation hall with badminton court and table tennis, gym for the boys and girls with the latest machines for their work out. Internet facility has been provided in every room of each hostel.

library.description: Indian Institute of Information Technology, Una central library is spread in two buildings. The old building, library consist more than 80,000 books. The new building has four floors and is capable of accommodating more than 500 students at a time. It comprises of Reading Rooms, Book Bank, Textbook/ Reference Book Section, Library Staff Cabins and Bound Volume Section. The Reading Rooms also have wi-fi facility to access e-Resources. Also has Online Public Access Catalogue (OPAC) facility to save the access time of the users. In addition, it has membership of DELNET which provide students with the access to Union Catalogue of Books, Union List of Current Periodicals, Database of Periodical Articles, CD-ROM Database, Medical Journals, Engineering and Technology E-Journals.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Basketball Court, Cricket Ground, Football Ground, Tennis Court

reviews.review_heading: Life at the Indian Institute of Information Technology, Una, Himachal Pradesh.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the Indian Institute of Information Technology, Una, is good compared to other IIITs constructed at the same time. There are 4 hostels, 2 basketball courts, 3 badminton courts, 1 lawn tennis court, and 1 football court. All years have hostel accommodation, and the permanent campus spans across 100 acres. However, the upcoming batch faces an accommodation issue, as only 100 to 150 students will be allotted hostels within the campus on a first-come, first-served basis.

reviews.review_heading: Growing Institute with good infrastructure and decent placement opportunities.
reviews.review_text: Our college is equipped with all the necessary infrastructure to support academic and research activities. The classrooms are well-ventilated, equipped with projects, and fully AC-oriented. High-speed data is provided through Wi-Fi but sometimes power cuts lead to poor quality.

reviews.review_heading: A decent college to join - With IIIT #tag.
reviews.review_text: Although due to lesser number of branches and lower number of students, the student intake is less and the crowd is also less. So, it affects the overall campus size. The campus size is small and compact but they provide almost all facilities. It lacks the following, no proper auditorium (only an indoor big size lecture hall is treated as an auditorium), and the area is not so developed. It is located outside the city. But we can reach the city easily.

reviews.review_heading: The overall experience in this college will be really good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and facilities are really good. The infrastructure is new, and the condition of the rooms is better than the holder colleges. Classrooms are small and good for focusing on the quality content taught during the lectures. Wi-Fi, labs, and library are good. The quality of food in the mess is satisfactory. The medical facilities, sports, and games are very good than the other colleges.

reviews.review_heading: Not a good choice to choose this college.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is below average compared to other colleges. The rooms are well cleaned, but the NY mess does not have AC or a cooler, and there are no medical facilities. There is no pest control. There is no auditorium and no proper canteen, and there are insufficient hostels, forcing students to live outside. Overall, it’s not good.

reviews.review_heading: IIIT Una is worth it in 2025.
reviews.review_text: As Una is a newly established college, our hostels are very nice compared to those of IITs or NITs. There is a library and a study room also, with Wi-Fi connectivity. The mess food has improved compared to the first day of college. There are many sports available, like table tennis, badminton, lawn tennis, basketball, football, almost all games except swimming.

reviews.review_heading: Telling about the reality of college.
reviews.review_text: Hostels are incredible as compared to other colleges, and provide Wi-Fi with good internet speed. Quality of mess food is okay. A canteen is also there on campus and for night Nescafe store is also available upto 3:00 AM. There is a well-structured playground for all sports.

reviews.review_heading: A student's point of view.
reviews.review_text: We are provided a room with 3 students each, which has enough space for us. There are 2 lifts in each hostel, even though the building height is only 3 floors. We have an academic block where classes take place and there too we students are allowed to use the lift for classes.

reviews.review_heading: Not absolutely dissatisfied because of its faculty members, average placements, and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms, labs, library, and all are fully equipped with Wi-Fi. We have all the necessary equipments. Infact there is also a new lab that has been set up in coordination with IIT Ropar. Hostels are also well-equipped with Wi-Fi facility. Food has different varieties throughout the day. Food quality is average. Medical facilities are good, and have several sports grounds for various games.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the college. If you get this college in JEE, you can for sure take it.
reviews.review_text: The Wi-Fi provided in the college is good. The infra is one of the best in all the IIIT colleges currently. Library, study rooms, labs, all are there with AC and theater. The hostels are decent, have 3-sharing rooms, hot water for bathing, etc. All kinds of sports, except swimming, are available. Medical rooms are tiered. Two veg messes and one non-veg mess are there. Two canteens are there.

reviews.review_heading: Overall college is good.
reviews.review_text: Hostel facilities are very good. The hostel rooms are big, and the facilities provided to students are good. There are 3 hostels. Each hostel has its own mess and a common room, which is used for playing, club meetings, etc. Messes are clean and completely hygienic. The food provided to students is quite good.

reviews.review_heading: The college is good, if one is good.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is quite good and hostel is also quite good as compared to other IIITs. Various electronics labs and infrastructure is also available for course. We also have department library, microwave lab, etc. Food quality is okayish, one can expect good food sometimes but sometimes the quality is not up to the mark. Canteen is available. Cricket, badminton, table tennis, and football are some of the most prominent sports our institute offers. In general, we can expect a good quality time he...

reviews.review_heading: IIIT UNA: Growing IIIT.
reviews.review_text: At present, IIIT Una campus has three fully furnished and large hostels named Jatharagini, Bhutagni, and Chitagni. The hostels are better than the old hostels present in other IITs, NITs, and IIITs due to its newly-built campus. The hostels have all basic facilities. The rooms are three-seater. Bathrooms and toilets are present on each floor, with a solar water heating system, 2 outdoor badminton courts, an indoor table tennis hall, and a mess on the ground floor. There is also a newly opened ca...

reviews.review_heading: Overall, this college is great for students who are willing to work hard.
reviews.review_text: Labs are in very good condition. They have lots of computer labs with high-speed LAN wires and other labs like the Chemistry lab, Electrical and Electronics lab, Physics lab, all in very good condition. The equipment is new and properly working. Hostels are good, but the food quality is okay; sometimes they cook good food, but sometimes they don’t.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the infrastructure, sports facilities, and placements of 2023.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of IIIT UNA is very good as compared to other IIITs established in the same years. It has its permanent campus,  4 hostels for all years, academic block, admin block, gym, music room, football ground,  2 basketball courts,  2 basketball courts, tennis court, and around 9 badminton courts, 2 in each hostel. All the hostels are well-equipped with Wi-Fi and speed is good; washing facilities are provided in the hostels, which charges no extra cost; a common room is also there for tabl...

data.description: Indian Institute of Information Technology (IIIT) Una has an experienced faculty. Indian Institute of Information Technology (IIIT) Una faculty are degeree, PhD, and diploma holders. Indian Institute of Information Technology (IIIT) Una appoints faculty for various guest lectures and also invites faculty to join the various conferences arranged by the college. Indian Institute of Information Technology (IIIT) Una also arranges faculty and several student exchange programmes.

paragraphs: Indian Institute of Information Technology (IIIT) Una supports meritorious and various other category students through several scholarships. The Top Class Scholarships are offered to various students like SC Students. Indian Institute of Information Technology (IIIT) Una SC students with a total family income (annually) from all sources up to INR 8.00 lakh are offered various scholarships. These students will be provided various scholarships only if they have taken admission to a full-time programme according to the General selection criteria as prescribed by the college. The number of Scholarships decided by the college for 2021-2022 fresh candidates was 1,500.

reviews_list.review_title: Not satisfied but fine.

review_content.Placements: Not aware but the condition of recruitment in our college is very bad according to the seniors. No good companies come to our college for student recruitment and the package offered is also not very good but we can't expect any better from a college like ours.
review_content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are kind of okay and the same goes for the lab. Sometimes all the computers work perfectly fine and sometimes half of them are not working. The library is good enough. No Wi-Fi facilities are provided. I'm not aware of the hostel facilities.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: It is not at all a good college for any degree in 2025.

review_content.Placements: I am currently enrolled in the 2023 batch CSE course. The college is absolutely the worst in every aspect possible with below-average placements. I guess most of the roles offered are consulting, SDE, or SWE. MNCs like TCS and Accenture visit the college for placements, which is not a great thing.
review_content.Infrastructure: Classrooms have school benches and they are very hot in the summers. The infrastructure is not at all comparable to any college nearby. The library is available. Wi-Fi in labs does not work very great. The whole campus is a veg campus which is a downgrade for me with respect to any other colleges.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Detailed Review of MCKV INSTITUTE OF ENGINEERING.

review_content.Placements: Last year, 92% of students in my course got placement. The highest package is 45 LPA, the lowest is 3 LPA, and the average is 5 LPA-6 LPA. Top recruiting companies are TCS, Infosys, and Cognizant. 75% of students got good internships. Roles offered include software engineer, AI & ML specialist, and root engineering, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are totally fine. Projectors or smart boards are available for better understanding. Video lectures are good. Wi-Fi facility available for students in the cafeteria and library. All kinds of books and a digital library are also available. In the canteen, foods are good, and the hostel is average. Medical facilities and first aid are also available. The campus is totally veg. You can't find any non-veg items in the whole campus and canteen, but still, the foods are tasty and hygienic.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Good faculty and library, average placements, but below average canteen.

content.Placements: Around 50% of students get placed through campus drives and rest go for off-campus jobs. Top recruiters include TCS, Wipro and Capgemini. The average package is around 3-4 LPA, while the highest CTC is 10-15 LPA, overall, the placement is good enough.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is available on the campus but works well mainly in labs and the library. Classrooms are average, but the library is very good for studying in a quiet environment. Canteen food is below average, and only pure veg meals are available, the campus area is not so big, so the sports facilities are limited.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: The college has good and helpful faculty, average placements, a good library, and a poor canteen.

content.Placements: About 50% of students are placed through on-campus drives, and the rest take part in off-campus jobs. The CTC is 10-15 LPA, and the average is 3-4 LPA. Top companies are TCS, Wipro, Capgemini, etc. Students easily get internships in several private companies, and several programs are also organized by the college.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is available across the campus, but it does not work. Wi-Fi in the lab and library is good to some extent. The classrooms are average, but the library is really good, and you can study here without any disturbance. The canteen food is below average.

content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are kind of okay and the same goes for the lab. Sometimes all the computers work perfectly fine and sometimes half of them are not working. The library is good enough. No Wi-Fi facilities are provided. I'm not aware of the hostel facilities.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: It is not at all a good college for any degree in 2025.

content.Placements: I am currently enrolled in the 2023 batch CSE course. The college is absolutely the worst in every aspect possible with below-average placements. I guess most of the roles offered are consulting, SDE, or SWE. MNCs like TCS and Accenture visit the college for placements, which is not a great thing.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms have school benches and they are very hot in the summers. The infrastructure is not at all comparable to any college nearby. The library is available. Wi-Fi in labs does not work very great. The whole campus is a veg campus which is a downgrade for me with respect to any other colleges.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Detailed Review of MCKV INSTITUTE OF ENGINEERING.

content.Placements: Last year, 92% of students in my course got placement. The highest package is 45 LPA, the lowest is 3 LPA, and the average is 5 LPA-6 LPA. Top recruiting companies are TCS, Infosys, and Cognizant. 75% of students got good internships. Roles offered include software engineer, AI & ML specialist, and root engineering, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are totally fine. Projectors or smart boards are available for better understanding. Video lectures are good. Wi-Fi facility available for students in the cafeteria and library. All kinds of books and a digital library are also available. In the canteen, foods are good, and the hostel is average. Medical facilities and first aid are also available. The campus is totally veg. You can't find any non-veg items in the whole campus and canteen, but still, the foods are tasty and hygienic.

admission_overview.college_name: MCKV Institute of Engineering Course Admissions 2025: Fees, Eligibility, Dates & Application Process

admission_process.title: MCKV Institute of Engineering Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: MCKV Institute of Engineering admission is both merit and entrance-based. The institute accepts national or state-level entrance exams like JEE Main, WBJEE, MAT, etc., for admission to specific courses.MCKVIEoffers UG and PG courses in the streams of Science and Management. All of its courses are AICTE-approved and offered in affiliation withMaulana Abul Kalam Azad University of Technology(MAKAUT). For MCKVIE admissions, candidates can apply by visiting the official website of the institute. More details around MCKV Institute of Engineering admissions are elaborated in the article below.

MCKV Institute of Engineering coursesare offered across multiple specialisations. Candidates can choose to pursue any of the course at the institute by fulfilling the basic eligibility requirements of the prorgamme they are applying for. Check below the course-wise eligibility and selection criteria for MCKV Institute of Engineering course admissions:
Class 12 in relevant subjects with a minimum 45% aggregate (40% aggregate for SC/ ST/ PwD)
Bachelor’s degree in any discipline (Statistics / Mathematics / Economics / Computer Sc. related subjects preferred)
MCKVIE admission process includes a series of steps. Check below the detailed steps of admission for UG and PG courses:
The mode of application at MCKVIE is online. Candidates need to register and fill out the application form along with an application fee to apply for a course.

The institute shortlists candidates based on national or state-level entrance exams like JEE Main/ WBJEE or MAT/ XAT/ CAT/ JEMAT, etc., for admission to specific courses. After selection candidates need to report with the specified documents for verification.
Shortlisted candidates after completion of the verification process have to pay course fee to confirm their seat in the institute.

The college offers this course in affiliation with Maulana Abul Kalam Azad University of Technology (MAKAUT) through several departments of Engineering. Apart from this, the college also offers admission directly to the second year of BTech through (Lateral Entry).

faqs.question: Which BTech specialisation does MCKVIE offer?
faqs.answer: MCKVIE offes a full-time BTech programme across eight specialisations. Candidates choose among the following specialisations to pursue at MCKVIE:Automobile EngineeringComputer Science & EngineeringElectronics and Communication EngineeringCSE (Data Science)Computer Science & Engineering (AI & ML)Electrical EngineeringInformation TechnologyMechanical Engineering

faqs.question: What is the selection criteria for BTech at MCKV Institute of Engineering?
faqs.answer: For admission to BTech at MCKV, students need to fulfil the minimum eligibility criteria, i.e., to pass Class 12 with 45% aggregate with Physics and Mathematics along with Chemistry / Biotechnology / Biology / Computer Science / Computer Applications / Technical Vocational subjects (in both theory and practical) (40% aggregate for reserved category) and Class 12 with 30% aggregate in English from a recognised board. The selection is based in the qualifying score of entrance exams such as JEE Mai

faqs.question: Is MCKVIE college good for BTech?
faqs.answer: MCKV offers a four-year AICTE- approved BTech course with popular specialisations such as CSE, Automobile, Mechanical Engineering, etc. Apart from imparting theoretical knowledge, the institute provides practical field-related practical knowledge in collaboration with companies such as LOGICZAP, BOSCH, EICHER, etc. Also, as per the placement data of MCKVIE, a total of 93% of placements were witnessed during the 2022 placement drive for BTech (CSE) course. The highest recorded package was INR 18

faqs.question: Does MCKVIE offer BTech Lateral Entry course?
faqs.answer: Yes, MCKV offers a three-year BTech (Lateral Entry) course. In this course, students can get admission directly to the second year of BTech. This course is offered across the same nine specialisations as of BTech course. Admission to this course is entrance-based. courses_data.description: MCKVIE offers a two-year AICTE-approved course of MBA across four specialisations. This course is offered in affiliation with Maulana Abul Kalam Azad University of Technology (MAKAUT).

faqs.question: How can I get admission to MBA at MCKVIE?
faqs.answer: In order to get admission to MBA at MCKV, the minimum eligibility is to Graduate with Statistics/ Mathematics/ Economics/ Computer Science from a recognised university, which is a mandatory step to clear before applying. Admission to MBA at MCKV is entrance-based. Those who want to get admission to this course are required to qualify for either CAT/ GMAT/ MAT/ JEMAT/ XAT entrance exams with a valid score.

faqs.question: What is the fees for MBA at MCKV Institute of Engineering?
faqs.answer: The fee for the two-year MBA programme isINR 4.50 lakh. Candidates need to pay a certain amount of fee at the time of admission. Find below the fee breakup for the MBA for both years:First year:INR 2.30 lakhSecond year:INR 2.20 lakh

faqs.question: Is MCKV Institute of Engineering hard to get?
faqs.answer: Yes, MCKV Institute of Engineering is hard to get admission at the institute. The dmission is based on merit and entrance based. The institute accepts national or state-level entrance exams like JEE Main, WBJEE, MAT, etc., for admission to specific courses. Candidates can visit the official website and fill out the application form before the last date.

faqs.question: What is the latest cutoff information on MBA admissions at MCKV Institute of Engineering?
faqs.answer: For MBA admissions at MCKV Institute of Engineering, the cutoff information is based on the scores from entrance exams like CAT, MAT, XAT, CMAT, and GMAT. Admission at MCKV Institute of Engineering is granted through a combination of these scores and a subsequent counselling process. The total tuition fee for the MBA program is INR 4 lakh.

courses_data.description: MCKV Institute of Engineering offers a two-year course of MTech across only one specialisation. Candidates who have passed graduation with BE/ BTech/ MSc Electronics/ Physics or equivalent from IETE / IE (I) can apply for MTech programme.

faqs.question: How to get admission to M.Tech at MCKV Institute of Engineering?
faqs.answer: To get admission to M.Tech at MCKV Institute of Engineering, candidates must meet the basic eligibility criteria at the time of applying for the course. Candidates must secure a quality score in WBU PGET exam. The college shortlists students based on their past academic merit, followed by entrance exam score.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission to M.Tech at MCKV Institute of Engineering?
faqs.answer: No, direct admission is not valid for admission to M.Tech at MCKV Institute of Engineering. Admissions are completely entrance-based for the programme. Candidates must pass graduation and obtain a good score in WBUT PGET exam.

placement_data.title: MCKV Institute of Engineering Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: MCKV Institute of Engineering has a Placement Team that ensures placement assistance to every student. The institute invites companies from different sectors to conduct the placement process at the Campus premises.

The placements are going on for the Class of 2025. A total of 532 BTech, 9 MTech and 30 MBA students registered for the MCKV Institute of Engineering placements 2025. As per the latest report, the highest and average package offered during MCKV Institute of Engineering placements 2025 stood at INR 66 LPA and INR 5.64 LPA, respectively. 311 recruiters visited the MCKV Institute of Engineering campus so far for 2025 placements and offered 579 job offers to the students of the batch 2025.
The top recruiters of MCKV Institute of Engineering during the past years included TCS, Infosys, Amazon, Wipro, Tech Mahindra, IBM, HCL, etc .

hostel_campus.college_name: MCKV Institute of Engineering Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: Good faculty and library, average placements, but below average canteen.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available on the campus but works well mainly in labs and the library. Classrooms are average, but the library is very good for studying in a quiet environment. Canteen food is below average, and only pure veg meals are available, the campus area is not so big, so the sports facilities are limited.

reviews.review_heading: The college has good and helpful faculty, average placements, a good library, and a poor canteen.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available across the campus, but it does not work. Wi-Fi in the lab and library is good to some extent. The classrooms are average, but the library is really good, and you can study here without any disturbance. The canteen food is below average.

reviews.review_heading: Not satisfied but fine.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are kind of okay and the same goes for the lab. Sometimes all the computers work perfectly fine and sometimes half of them are not working. The library is good enough. No Wi-Fi facilities are provided. I'm not aware of the hostel facilities.

reviews.review_heading: It is not at all a good college for any degree in 2025.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms have school benches and they are very hot in the summers. The infrastructure is not at all comparable to any college nearby. The library is available. Wi-Fi in labs does not work very great. The whole campus is a veg campus which is a downgrade for me with respect to any other colleges.

reviews.review_heading: Detailed Review of MCKV INSTITUTE OF ENGINEERING.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are totally fine. Projectors or smart boards are available for better understanding. Video lectures are good. Wi-Fi facility available for students in the cafeteria and library. All kinds of books and a digital library are also available. In the canteen, foods are good, and the hostel is average. Medical facilities and first aid are also available. The campus is totally veg. You can't find any non-veg items in the whole campus and canteen, but still, the foods are tasty and hygienic....

reviews.review_heading: My college is absolutely good and so much fun.
reviews.review_text: College infrastructure is good. Classrooms are good, but no air conditioners are provided in the classrooms. However, air conditioners are provided in all labs which is good. Our college also provides Wi-Fi and library is good. The hostel is not so good due to some issues and canteen is bad.

reviews.review_heading: Review of MCKV Institute of Engineering.
reviews.review_text: Our college we had Wi-Fi available with a 5G network. Labs were well-maintained, but they were less spacious. Classrooms were a bit smaller compared to the number of students admitted every year. Library was good enough and a peaceful place, every student's favorite place. Quality of food in hostel was not good, nor was it in the canteen. Sports and games amenities were available.

reviews.review_heading: Review of MCKV Institute of Engineering
reviews.review_text: The campus is too small. There was one library and a computer lab. Library was very good and there were many books on different fields.

reviews.review_heading: I will say it's decent as such the campus is not that big but the life here is friendly
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure for the Department of Computer Science and Engineering are average in my opinion Let's start with the classrooms, which are well-ventilated and equipped with the latest teaching aids, including LCD projectors and Wi-Fi connectivity but there is a limit in wifi of only 35 mb. The department also has ten laboratories with updated hardware and software, including over about 50 computers with dedicated standby UPS and internet facility with about 30 Mbps.

reviews.review_heading: Best college providing the best future .
reviews.review_text: In this college, the library is so good, but the lab is not that good. Wi-Fi is good, and the classroom is also very good. The quality of our faculty is excellent, and their teaching techniques are very good. They're well experienced and also helpful. I'm not living in a hostel, so I'm not able to say anything about the hostel, but I heard from my friend that it's not good.

reviews.review_heading: College is good and eco-friendly .
reviews.review_text: In our hostel the Wi-Fi is installed by our seniors and we have to have pay for using the Wi-Fi, those students have to pay 50 to 55 rupees each month. Hostel canteen is good for West Bengal student. If you are coming from different states you may find some difficulty in eating but you can manage. Hostel facility is good but not excellent.

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely satisfied by MCKV Institute of Engineering.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is on the average side. The classroom sizes are decent, and Wi-Fi connections are available in the library and labs only, not in the classrooms. The hostel facility is good; the girls' hostel is inside the college, and the boys' hostel is at a walking distance.

reviews.review_heading: Emotions of college life in words.
reviews.review_text: The Wi-Fi connection is so poor on the college campus, but in the library there is a high-speed unlimited Wi-Fi connection. IT at MCKVIE College is a very good course, and no doubt the lab in every subject is outstanding. But as far as I know, the condition of the hostel is so poor, according to some friends.

reviews.review_heading: Decent College Where Besides Completing Your Course, You Can Focus on Other Activities
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is pretty decent. We have Wi-Fi, a library with high capacity, and clean classrooms. The quality of hostel food and canteen options is also good. If any issues arise, they are taken care of. The hostel is located near the college, so timing is not an issue.

reviews.review_heading: My Dream College and Dream Campus Life.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is the best in our college. There are ACs available in hostel rooms for both boys and girls. All types of food, including veg and non-veg, are available here. This hostel is newly built, so it's very clean and fresh. In the boys' hostel, there are no restrictions, but in the girls' hostel, there are some restrictions for the safety of the girls.

college_info.intro:
Bundelkhand University provides a wide range of courses across streams such as Arts, Science, Computer Applications, Medical, Engineering, Law, Mass Communication, and Management at the UG, PG, and Doctoral levels. The popular programmes at BU Uttar Pradesh are BTech, BSc, and MBA, among others. BU Jhansi offers more than 110 courses.
BU Jhansi offers a full-time, four-year BTech programme at the UG level. The university offers BTech programme across various specialisations like ECE, CSE, Mechanical, Biotechnology, Biomedical, Food Engineering & Technology, and others. Bundelkhand University MBA programme is a two-year programme. The university offers MBA course in International Business, Tourism Management, Financial, Banking & Insurance, Business Economics, and others.
Below mentioned are the Bundelkhand University popular programmes:

student_insights.feedback: Students can work with faculty on research projects
Offered in the final year only
Students are expected to reach out to companies themselves
Strong alumni network that help with placement opportunities
Very Active and resourceful, college is also involved

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Computer Appication (BCA Hons.) - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: There has been a lot of improvement in the faculty now.

review_content.Placements: It is not good for placements, very few companies participate. I completed B.CA (Hons.) in 2022 when the faculty was not so good, but now it has become much better than before. There were no placements during my time at the university. Last time I heard, someone got a package of 6.5 LPA for the B. Teach course.
review_content.Infrastructure: Talking about infrastructure, it is good. There are more courses, and the hostel is also good. The quality of food was also average at that time, but we can say that it was worth eating and it wasn't that bad.
review_content.Faculty: Teachers at our time were both helpful and knowledgeable. The course is relevant to the curriculum and makes students industry-ready. I can say the semester exams are average. This college is not that big, so it is very difficult to say about average. To pass, you must have a minimum of 23 marks in each subject after deducting practical marks.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: It is good for living the best college life.

review_content.Placements: 0.01 % of students get placements from the college campus. No companies visit the college to recruit students from this course only. If we work on our own development, then only we will achieve our dream job. The highest salary offered ranges from Rs. 70,000 to 1.5 lakhs per month. I recommend students do not join this college.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college is good, but there is no development. The hostel is good for boys and not for girls, due to the outer area. Labs are only for seeing and not for gaining information or for developing skills. Only a few digital classrooms are available here.

review_summary.college_name: Bundelkhand University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Arts (B.A.) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Great professors and principal.

content.Placements: There are no placements at all. It is a government college so no placements happen. Even in UNIS, as DU I do not think there are placement opportunities for Bachelor degree holders. This much to be expected. You do not join this college to get a job but to get a degree.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is of old times. No new buildings or halls are being built even now. Wi-Fi is sucky at best only works in the library and surrounding areas with the least speed possible. There are no labs as far as I can remember. Classrooms are spacious but thats all.

individual_reviews.course: B.A. (Hons.) in Hindi - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: In all, I want to say my university is one of the best.

content.Placements: In my course, about 60-70% students got placed, and the package lasts between 5-7 LPA according to person to person. In my course literature, there is a provided job. About 70% got an internship with a variety of companies. In my course, you get the role of poet, story writer, and editor.
content.Infrastructure: At university, you will get all types of facilities free of cost, like free Wi-Fi, labs (all types of labs), in the classroom, there is peaceful environment, and teachers give lectures. Hostel in one room, 2-person share and the bed is average, the water system is so good.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Appication (BCA Hons.) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: There has been a lot of improvement in the faculty now.

content.Placements: It is not good for placements, very few companies participate. I completed B.CA (Hons.) in 2022 when the faculty was not so good, but now it has become much better than before. There were no placements during my time at the university. Last time I heard, someone got a package of 6.5 LPA for the B. Teach course.
content.Infrastructure: Talking about infrastructure, it is good. There are more courses, and the hostel is also good. The quality of food was also average at that time, but we can say that it was worth eating and it wasn't that bad.
content.Faculty: Teachers at our time were both helpful and knowledgeable. The course is relevant to the curriculum and makes students industry-ready. I can say the semester exams are average. This college is not that big, so it is very difficult to say about average. To pass, you must have a minimum of 23 marks in each subject after deducting practical marks.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: It is good for living the best college life.

content.Placements: 0.01 % of students get placements from the college campus. No companies visit the college to recruit students from this course only. If we work on our own development, then only we will achieve our dream job. The highest salary offered ranges from Rs. 70,000 to 1.5 lakhs per month. I recommend students do not join this college.
content.Infrastructure: The college is good, but there is no development. The hostel is good for boys and not for girls, due to the outer area. Labs are only for seeing and not for gaining information or for developing skills. Only a few digital classrooms are available here.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: The college is like any other old GMC.

content.Placements: Basically, it is MBBS. After the 4.5-year course, we have to do a mandatory internship. The stipend offered is Rs. 12,000 per month. After that, we have to serve a 2-year bond, which gives a salary that ranges from Rs. 80,000-90,000 per month, but I am not so sure about that. Students prepare for NEET PG if they wish to pursue specialisation in a field.
content.Infrastructure: Since the college is old, the infrastructure is not so good compared to the new colleges. Although labs, etc., are fully functional, the lecture theatre does not have AC or Wi-Fi. Projectors mostly don't work. Hostels are in a paramedical campus where the UG girls stay till the 3rd year, which has new and better infrastructure. But there is a frequent problem with water and electricity.

admission_overview.title: Bundelkhand University Jhansi Admission Overview 2026
admission_overview.description: Bundelkhand University admission to various courses through an entrance test and direct admission (through merit) in its campus and affiliated colleges. The university conducts its entrance test, for admission to some UG and PG courses. BU Jhansi has eight faculties that offer UG and PG courses in streams like Science, Law, Commerce, Arts, Medical, Agriculture, Education, Technical & Management. The university has more than 300 colleges affiliated with it. Candidates seeking admission to affiliated colleges have to apply separately on the concerned college's website. Apart from this, the university has 40 institutes of its own. Bundelkhand University admission to any of these institutes is done directly from the university's official website.

eligibility_selection.title: Bundelkhand University Jhansi Eligibility & Selection 2026
eligibility_selection.description: BU Jhansi admissions are entrance or merit-based. Aspirants can apply for admission to most of the UG and PG courses through university entrance-exam scores. The university also offers direct admission to a few programmes. The basic eligibility for UG courses is Class 12 whereas, graduation is required for PG programmes. Below are the top Bundelkhand University courses along with their eligibility and selection:

admission_process.title: Bundelkhand University Admission Process 2026

paragraphs: Bundelkhand University admission process is a multi-step process. Candidates are first required to register for the course of their choice. The university conducts its own test to shortlist candidates for a few courses. Check below step-wise admission process for BU Jhansi:
Eligible aspirants need to apply online for the course. Candidates can first register and then fill out the application form. Below is the application fee for Bundelkhand University admission:

Bundelkhand University selects candidates for UG and PG courses either based on entrance exam or merit in the last qualifying exam. For some of the specialisations, BU Jhansi also conductsBU Entrance Exam.Direct admissionis available based on merit for a few programmes.

Once the BU Entrance Exam results are declared, BU Jhansi releases a merit list announcing the names of the selected candidates. Such applicants have to come for counselling and document verification. Candidates have to pay an additional counselling fee of INR 250. Candidates eligible for direct admission are required to contact on the official e-mail ID of the respective department head to fill the provisional admission process.

Bundelkhand University fee includes multiple components like tuition, caution deposit, etc. As a part of admission process, candidates are required to confirm their seat by paying the programme fee. Below isBU Jhansi feeand average package for popular courses:

faqs.question: How can I get admission in BU Jhansi for B.Ed?
faqs.answer: Bundelkhand University admission to B.Ed is based on UP B.Ed JEE score. Since Bundelkhand University is a participating university of UP B.Ed JEE, candidates get a seat through UP B.Ed JEE Counselling. Once the aspirants are shortlisted based on the entrance exam score, aspirants need to come for UP B.Ed JEE Counselling and seat allotment. Candidates will be provided seats based on their choices and rank obtained in the entrance exam. Aspirants need to pay the programme fee to confirm their seat

faqs.question: Can I apply at Bundelkhand University for B.Ed after Class 12?
faqs.answer: Yes, aspirants who have passed graduation or PG in any discipline with at least 50% aggregate. The university follows NCTE regulations for B.Ed admission. Candidates must have the documents proving their eligibility like Class 12 marksheet, passing certificate, etc. for getting verification at later stages of admission.Besides, meeting the eligibility requirements, aspirants must pass UP B.Ed JEE exam. It is a state-level entrance exam conducted once in a year.

Moreover, all OBC category (non creamy layer) candidates are eligible to 10 per cent relaxation in the percentage of marks in the qualifying examination in relation to open category.
