Students can scroll to the exam-wise sections below for details about Bundelkhand University UPTAC Cutoff 2025 and other accepted exams. A few more exam-related updates are in the pointers below:

The Bundelkhand University cutoff 2024 was concluded for JEE Main with the release of the final cutoff list. The cutoff was released as the opening and closing ranks for admission to the BE/BTech, courses. During the Bundelkhand University BE/BTech cutoff 2024, the last-round closing ranks ranged between 216275 and 1281371 for the General HS category students. Of all the BE/BTech specialisations, the one that faced fierce competition was B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering. The first rou

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Bundelkhand Degree CollegeReviewed on 8 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Great professors and principal.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is of old times. No new buildings or halls are being built even now. Wi-Fi is sucky at best only works in the library and surrounding areas with the least speed possible. There are no labs as far as I can remember. Classrooms are spacious but thats all.

reviews.review_heading: In all, I want to say my university is one of the best.
reviews.review_text: At university, you will get all types of facilities free of cost, like free Wi-Fi, labs (all types of labs), in the classroom, there is peaceful environment, and teachers give lectures. Hostel in one room, 2-person share and the bed is average, the water system is so good.

reviews.review_heading: There has been a lot of improvement in the faculty now.
reviews.review_text: Talking about infrastructure, it is good. There are more courses, and the hostel is also good. The quality of food was also average at that time, but we can say that it was worth eating and it wasn't that bad.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by SR Group of Institution JhansiReviewed on 30 Jul 2025)
reviews.review_heading: It is good for living the best college life.
reviews.review_text: The college is good, but there is no development. The hostel is good for boys and not for girls, due to the outer area. Labs are only for seeing and not for gaining information or for developing skills. Only a few digital classrooms are available here.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Maharani Laxmi Bai Medical CollegeReviewed on 30 Jul 2025)
reviews.review_heading: The college is like any other old GMC.
reviews.review_text: Since the college is old, the infrastructure is not so good compared to the new colleges. Although labs, etc., are fully functional, the lecture theatre does not have AC or Wi-Fi. Projectors mostly don't work. Hostels are in a paramedical campus where the UG girls stay till the 3rd year, which has new and better infrastructure. But there is a frequent problem with water and electricity.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by SR Group of Institution JhansiReviewed on 21 Jul 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Placements were good in 2019, and the infrastructure is really good.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of my building is also very well-structured. Hostel facilities are very helpful for our daily work. The taste of hostel food is delicious, cooked with a focus on hygiene, and they always make sure to clean the room.

reviews.review_heading: It's great for studying if you are from a place with less universities and colleges.
reviews.review_text: The faculty members and infrastructure are not too bad. The Wi-Fi is always available, no matter the time. We have labs in our department and smart classrooms, but the interior is not that great either, as it is not painted properly, and desks and tables in a few classrooms are old. The hostel facility is great as per the cost they charge. You can't compare them with top colleges, but they are better than most hostel facilities.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Choudhary Digvijay Singh MahavidyalayaReviewed on 25 Jun 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Satisfied because of the value for money, good lecturer, and infrastructure is good.
reviews.review_text: The college is very vast. The ground is very big. It contains a physics lab, chemistry lab, biology lab, several classrooms, etc. It has a cricket ground, volleyball ground, badminton court, and football ground. The canteen food is also worth it. The college provides good medical facilities.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2020Offered by SR Group of Institution JhansiReviewed on 20 Jun 2025)
reviews.review_heading: The fee of the college is very nominal about Rs. 30,000 to Rs. 50,000 for those who get fee waivers.
reviews.review_text: The hostel of the college is not very good. The hostel life is not what everyone expects although I'm from Jhansi itself so I didn't join it but got to know about the hostel life. It's like a nightmare for many students, but they do have some Wi-Fi facilities.

reviews.review_heading: All about my university (Bundelkhand University)
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is awesome and well-maintained. A personal auditorium is there in our institute. There are 5 personal labs, in which 1 is a Cyber lab, 1 is a Ballistic lab, 1 is a Chemistry lab, and the other 2 are common practical labs. All labs are active, and the auditorium is also active for extracurricular activities.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Sri Guru Harkishan Degree CollegeReviewed on 26 May 2025)
reviews.review_heading: It is a good college for commerce students.
reviews.review_text: The college has a good campus, with lush green grounds, but there is no canteen facility. There are occasional sports events, basically like kho-kho. There is no Wi-Fi on the campus, it's only available for the teachers.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty is good that's the only reason I don't hate my department.
reviews.review_text: Labs are just fine. Some of the chemicals are expired. Library is okay. No Wi-Fi is provided you need to get your own in hostels. Mess food is just like any other, controversial. I like my department because of my teachers but there is nothing I like about my hostel other than my room.

reviews.review_heading: I'm dissatisfied.
reviews.review_text: The university provides hostels for both girls and boys. There are a total 5 hostels for girls Virangna Khali Ari Bai, Samta, Annex, and OBC. Infrastructure is good. The quality of food is not that much of good. Wi-Fi isn't working. Classrooms are okay. Medical facilities are also not that good in hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Campus is okay but the department is average with no placement.
reviews.review_text: Hostel is okay if only you can adjust to their long list of rules and regulations. The girl's hostel mess is so average. In the summer, the problem we face is electricity. The hostel gate closes at 6:50 PM only and if you want to take leave, you'll have to follow a very long and unnecessary procedure.

reviews.review_heading: Nice and decent for any course.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of the college and my course is good. There are different labs for the practices and computer labs. There is a personal auditorium and the classrooms are very nice and clean. Faculty of the hostel is very polite and gives support to whatever you need.

data.description: The faculty members of Bundelkhand University are very knowledgeable, friendly and extremely qualified. Their teaching methodology involves a case-study approach, presentations, class participation, industrial visit, live projects, simulation, etc.

likes.text: Companies like CM Technology, Cafe Coffee Day, Prakash Infratech Solution, and many small companies visit the college for placements.

faqs.question: Q: What is the fees range for courses offerred by the Sapthagiri College of Engineering?

faqs.answer: The seat distribution at Sapthagiri College of Engineering follows a specific quota system for the BE course. 45% of the total seats are reserved for Karnataka students through the KCET (CET) quota. Another 30% is open to both Karnataka and non-Karnataka students via the COMEDK quota. The remaining 25% of BE seats are filled through the Management quota. This structured approach ensures that the college maintains a mix of local talent and students from across the country.
faqs.question: Q: What is the seat reservation policy for BE at Sapthagiri College of Engineering?

faqs.answer: Sapthagiri College of Engineering offers BE specialisations in Computer Science and Engineering, Information Science, Electronics and Communication, and Electrical and Electronics. Additionally, Sapthagiri College of Engineering provides options in Civil Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, and Biotechnology. This variety allows students to select a BE path that best matches their interests and career goals while studying in a supportive academic environment.
faqs.question: Q: Which engineering branches can I choose for my BE at Sapthagiri College of Engineering?

faqs.answer: Yes, the institute popular in Karnataka is Sapthagiri College of Engineering. The institution has been established in the year 2001 and has accreditation to NBA. Plus, it is affiliated to Visvesvaraya Technological University. Undergraduate and post graduate courses in engineering and technology are offered by the institute. Good placement records have been seen as most of the students get absorbed in Infosys, TCS, and Wipro. It has now grabbed a rank after more than 90 percent of the students got placed in top companies in the year 2023.

admission_overview.title: Sapthagiri College of Engineering Admission Overview 2026
admission_overview.description:
Sapthagiri College of Engineering, Bangalore admissions are entrance-based. The college offers UG and PhD/ Research programmes. These are offered in the fields Engineering. The college offers B.E/BTech as its flagship programme. The application process can be completed online and offline. Sapthagiri College of Engineering is affiliated to Visvesvaraya Technological University - VTU. The college accepts students through CET and COMEDK for the UG Engineering programmes. Interested students can go through the following sections to know more about the eligibility and admission process for Sapthagiri College of Engineering. Download:
Sapthagiri College of Engineering Brochure

eligibility_selection.title: Sapthagiri College of Engineering Eligibility & Selection Criteria 2026
eligibility_selection.description: Sapthagiri College of Engineering course admission is subject to fulfilment of the preset admission criteria. The college offers seats through a rank in either KCET or COMEDK for the flagship B.E programmes. Some of the seats are reserved under the management quota, admissions to which are decided by the college. Students have to clear the admission requirements to get a seat at the college. Students can check the table below to know about the eligibility and selection criteria for Sapthagiri College of Engineering Bangalore courses:

courses_table.eligibility: Class 12 with a minimum aggregate of 45% (40% for reserved categories) with Physics and Mathematics as compulsory subjects + any one of the following subjects - Chemistry/ Biotechnology/ Biology/ Electronics/ Computer
PG degree in a relevant field from a recognised university*

faqs.answer: No, students don't need to score 75% in Class 12 to get Sapthagiri College of Engineering admission. The minimum required percentage is 45% (40% for reserved categories). Anyone above 45% + valid entrance scores can apply.
faqs.question: Do I need to get 75% in Class 12 to get admission in Sapthagiri College of Engineering?

faqs.answer: Yes, students can get admission in Sapthagiri College of Engineering without JEE. The college accepts admissions through KCET and COMEDK. So, JEE scores are not required to get admission in the college.
faqs.question: Can we join Sapthagiri College of Engineering without JEE?

faqs.answer: No, getting admission in Sapthagiri College of Engineering is not hard. The admission chances depend on the intake, programme, and competition. But it is generally considered to be easy to moderately hard to get a seat at the college. This is mainly due to the limited intake.

Students can go the official site of theSCE, Bangaloreand fill up the online application form. The form has to be submitted with documents and application fees before the last date. The physical copy of the form can be collected from the admission office.

Selected students have to report for verification of documents and pay theSapthagiri College of Engineering admissionfeesto complete the process.

The admission criteria is as below:Class 12 with 45% + Physics & Mathematics + Chemistry/ Biotechnology/ Biology/ Electronics/ ComputerKCET/ COMEDK

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission in Sapthagiri College of Engineering B.E.?
faqs.answer: Yes, students can get direct admission in Sapthagiri College of Engineering B.E. The college reserves some seats under the management quota. To get admission through this, students have to meet the eligibility and appear for the personal counselling.

faqs.question: What are the minimum marks needed for BE admission at Sapthagiri College of Engineering?
faqs.answer: Sapthagiri College of Engineering has made it mandatory for General category students to have at least 45% aggregate in their optional subjects in order to get enrolled in the BE course. For students from Karnataka belonging to SC, ST, and OBC categories, the minimum percentage required in order to get enrolled in the BE course is 40%. These are the standards that Sapthagiri College of Engineering has kept in order to maintain academic standards in all the Engineering courses.

faqs.question: What is the seat reservation policy for BE at Sapthagiri College of Engineering?
faqs.answer: The seat distribution at Sapthagiri College of Engineering follows a specific quota system for the BE course. 45% of the total seats are reserved for Karnataka students through the KCET (CET) quota. Another 30% is open to both Karnataka and non-Karnataka students via the COMEDK quota. The remaining 25% of BE seats are filled through the Management quota. This structured approach ensures that the college maintains a mix of local talent and students from across the country.

faqs.question: What documents are needed for the BE application at Sapthagiri College of Engineering?
faqs.answer: For admission into a BE course at Sapthagiri College of Engineering, the documents required areClass 10th and Class 12th standard marks sheetsEntrance exam rank cards (KCET/COMEDK/JEE)Transfer certificatesHowever, in the case of particular quotas, valid caste certificates or income certificates are required. Keep multiple copies of your photographs and identity documents like your Aadhaar card for registering.

faqs.answer: The fees range for courses offerred by the Sapthagiri College of Engineering is around INR 128000 - INR 334104.

The college offers entrance-based admissions. Selected students have to report for verification and pay the admission fees to complete the process.

The highest and average package offered during the recent Sapthagiri College of Engineering placements stood at INR 35 LPA and INR 5 LPA , respectively. faqs.question: How is the placement facility at Sapthagiri College of Engineering?
faqs.answer: As per Shiksha verified reviews, Sapthagiri College of Engineering has an impressive review rating of 3.74 by 95 students.

faqs.question: Which industries frequently recruit BE students from Sapthagiri College of Engineering?
faqs.answer: BE students at Sapthagiri College of Engineering find opportunities across diverse sectors. IT and technology giants frequently hire from the Computer Science and Information Science branches. Meanwhile, core companies in manufacturing, construction, and infrastructure regularly recruit graduates from the Mechanical and Civil Engineering departments. The college's strong industry ties ensure that BE students from all specialisations have a fair chance at starting their careers with reputable national and international companies.

faqs.question: How does the placement cell prepare BE students at Sapthagiri College of Engineering?
faqs.answer: The placement department at Sapthagiri College of Engineering focuses on making BE students "industry-ready" through rigorous Campus Recruitment Training. This includes specialised coaching in coding, logical reasoning, and soft skills. They also organize mock interviews, group discussions, and resume-building workshops. By the time BE students reach their final year, they have usually undergone several rounds of technical and aptitude training designed to help them confidently face real-world recruiters during the busy campus drive season.

faqs.question: Does Sapthagiri College of Engineering offer international placement support for BE?
faqs.answer: Yes, Sapthagiri College of Engineering has an International Career Centre that is specifically designed to cater to the needs of BE students by offering training that is at par with international standards. The students can get a better understanding of the requirements of working abroad by joining this centre. The college has entered into various MoUs that will provide its BE students a competitive advantage over others, enabling them to secure jobs in multinational corporations that are beyond India's traditional job market.

reviews.review_heading: Really good faculty and sir is good. Everything is good and I enjoy this college.
reviews.review_text: Lab for computer system is good and dinner is also good. It is a good place. Playing and running are there and we can have nice day. All facilities are good. All hostel have good surroundings. This college has instruments, and the campus is good.

reviews.review_heading: Very good and the most beautiful campus.
reviews.review_text: Our infrastructure of the college is very good. Our campus is very big and very good with all the infrastructure. Wi-Fi, labs, showrooms, libraries, gym, games, sports, and medical facilities are there. Mess is also available in our college 24X7. Sports and games are also there.

reviews.review_heading: It is a very good college.
reviews.review_text: Our college campus is very good and very big infrastructure. All the labs are there and the computers are very good. Classrooms and Wi-Fi are available. Classrooms have very smart boards. Sports, games, gym rooms, and medical facilities are very good. Mess and canteen will be available 24X7.

reviews.review_heading: This college is good, newly constructed, and has modern buildings.
reviews.review_text: Hostel is good but does not have enough rooms. As a result, some students who joined in the third round could not get hostel accommodation. They had to opt for PGs or other hostels outside the college. Food in our college hostel is slightly better compared to other college hostels. However, it is not sufficient for maintaining good health. Meals are too oily and lack sufficient vegetables.

reviews.review_heading: Things you should know about Sapthagiri college.
reviews.review_text: We have really good classrooms; the helpers here always wipe and clean the floors and railings. As I'm a day scholar, I don't know much about the host facilities. The library is indeed very knowledgeable and convenient to study in. We have all the books that we need through the completion of our course.

reviews.review_heading: There is really good infrastructure at this college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college was overall good. Wi-Fi, labs, libraries, canteens, etc. Facilities were given to the students here at our college. All these offerings were of good quality. On the college campus, sports and medical facilities are available for the students.

reviews.review_heading: Our college should improve placements.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good, wi-fi is available, coming to labs is okay, not bad, and the library is small. Because college is under construction, education is good; I am talking only about mechanical engineering, not about other branches, and there is no ground for parking or sports.

reviews.review_heading: Happy life at saptha was a key to success.
reviews.review_text: The premises offered numerous amenities, including spacious corridors, a large ground, and an amphitheater. The teachers were commendable, and the environment and culture were both positive. Additionally, the teachers and friends provided valuable support, contributing to the development of various skills and strengths for future endeavors.

reviews.review_heading: Academic Excellence Unveiled: A Review of Sapthagiri College of Engineering.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is decent. I guess because the campus is about 7-8 acres, which is a small area, but the buildings are well maintained. Separate labs are there for all departments. The college is under construction for the university. After becoming a university, the infrastructure will be good. Regarding the hostel, it is outside the college campus, around 300–400 m for boys, and the girls hostel is inside the campus only.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Sapthagiri College of Engineering.
reviews.review_text: We can play many games on campus. Our college provides facilities for sports like kabaddi, basketball, and cricket. The hostel is available in our college. It provides good food.

reviews.review_heading: Infrastructure is under construction so it's not good but placements are good.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is not so good as it is under construction, it will be good within 2 years and labs have all the equipments and library also provides all the books and contents needed for the theory subjects. E-library is also provided, canteen is good but not that  big but the food is good and hygienic. Sports and games are supported depending upon the students interest and every year sports tournaments are conducted.

reviews.review_heading: A good engineering college for anyone. Can expect everything from here.
reviews.review_text: It has a good infrastructure overall. Like computer labs, classrooms, Auditorium amphitheater, mechanical labs, etc., are available. Also, It is getting renovated now. So expecting more sophisticated facilities. The new photos from the upcoming project derives everybody attention.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is average in terms of infrastructure and faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college was average. Now, It is new and very good. Our college had Wi-Fi, labs, good classrooms, and a library. The food served in the hostel was not great. Wi-Fi facility was provided in our hostel. The sports ground was small. The sports department was good.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has good faculty members, and I would recommend it.
reviews.review_text: The library is well-equipped and good. Wi-Fi facilities have been provided by the college. Classrooms are comfortable and well maintained so that students can feel comfortable and feel free to ask their doubts. There is also a basketball court.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is excellent with NAAC A grade.
reviews.review_text:
Our college is located in front of the beautiful Chimney Hills of Bangalore. We will find almost every shop around this college. Many restaurants and food places are available in this college. Our campus has 6.25 acres of land. This college is getting transformed into a university, so this 
campus is under construction. The new university will have many features like modern classrooms, indoor sports complex, many cafeterias, sports facilities, and beautiful gardens. Boys hostel is not good, and ...

college_info.intro:
Aliah University comprises 3 departments, including Basic Science, Engineering & Technology, and Humanities & Social Science. The departments of the university offer a wide range of courses at UG, PG, and PhD courses across various streams. MBA, BTech, and BSc are among the most popular programmes offered at the university.
Aliah University Kolkata offers a full-time, four-year BTech programme at the UG level. The BTech programmes offered at the university cover core courses in the areas of Civil Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, and Computer Science & Engineering. The university offers a five-year integrated MBA to the students.

review_content.Placements: In the mechanical engineering department, about 70 to 80 percent of students are placed. faqs.answer: Yes, for admissions to the BBA+MBA integrated course at Aliah University, scores of the AUAT entrance exam are compulsory. To get enrolled in the BBA+MBA integrated course, candidates are required to complete the prescribed eligibility criteria, i.e., candidates must complete their Class 12 from any stream. Additionally, they must have secured an aggregate of 50%. The final admission is based on candidates achieved scores in the university's in-house entrance test, i.e., AUAT.
faqs.question: Q: Is AUAT compulsory for admission to BBA course at Aliah University?

faqs.answer: AUAT counselling process will be conducted after the AUAT result. Most likely in August 2026. Aliah University Admission Test (AUAT) counselling process will be held at the official website of Aliah University- aliah.ac.in.
faqs.question: Q: When will the AUAT counselling process start?

faqs.answer: For Aliah University BBA admission, the university accepts the scores of entrance examinations called AUAT, followed by counselling. The Aliah University Admission Test, or AUAT, is conducted by Aliah University, Kolkata, to offer students admission into an integrated BBA+MBA course. For admissions to this course, the AUAT syllabus comprises of basic mathematics, verbal and nonverbal reasoning, commercial arithmetic, and elementary knowledge of the area of study.

review_summary.college_name: Aliah University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. (Hons.) in Zoology - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Biological Sciences in Aliah University.

content.Placements: About 30 percent of students got placed in the previous year. The highest salary package is 5 LPA, the minimum package is 1.5 LPA, and the average package is 3 LPA. Students get internships by themselves, and some of the teachers help to get internships. TCS, ITC, and Tech Mahindra are the top recruitment companies.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi connected and AC-conditioned library. Labs are in moderate condition. There are washing machines in our university hostel. Classrooms are well maintained. Food quality is at a moderate level in the hostel canteen. Middle-level sports opportunities. First-aid and medicine service available.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: My experience at Aliah University as an Electrical Engineering student.

content.Placements: Around 30 percent of students get placed in the previous year. The highest package is 7 LPA, the lowest package is 1.5 LPA, and the average package is approximately 3 LPA. Students get internships by themselves, and some teachers help by sharing resources. The offered roles are power system engineer, technical support, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our department is very good and well-maintained. There is Wi-Fi and AC in the library. Labs are also okay. Hostel facilities are good, very clean, and well-maintained, but there is no Wi-Fi connection in the hostel. There is a first aid medical service in our university.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: My BCA journey at Aliah University.

content.Placements: Approximately 30 percent of students from previously passed out batches are placed on campus, the highest package is 8 LPA and the lowest is 1.5 LPA, top recruiting companies are Tech Mahindra, Cognizant, TCS, etc., 50 percent of students got internships, and top offered roles are software tester, app developer, web developer, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is super clean, Wi-Fi-connected library and lab, but no Wi-Fi in the hostel, there are water purifiers and washing machines in the hostel, decent types of no good, not much bad, there is a first-aid medical service at the university, and PC in the computer lab needs to be changed.

admission_overview.college_name: Aliah University Course Admission 2025: Admission Process, Eligibility, Selection Process, Dates

admission_process.title: Aliah University Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: The Aliah University admission 2025 process is going on. The University offers including Science & Technology, Management, Humanities & Social Sciences and Engineering among others. Apart from this,Aliah Universityalso offers a few value added programmes. Candidates seeking admission to various course including, need to appear for Aliah University Admission Test" (AUAT). The university offers undergraduate, postgraduate and doctoral programs in the subjects mentioned above.

Aliah University admission 2025 is entrance-based for all theUG and PG courses. Candidates seeking admission to the University need to appear for Aliah University Admission Test (AUAT). Aliah University courses along with their selection criteria and fees are given below:
Minimum 60% aggregate in Class 12 with Physics, Chemistry, Mathematics
Minimum 60% aggregate in Class 12 with Physics, Chemistry, Mathematics
Class 12 in a relevant stream with a minimum 50% aggregate
Bachelor’s degree with a minimum 45% aggregate
BE/ BTech in a relevant stream
Minimum 45% aggregate in Class 12 with Physics, Chemistry, Biology & English

Aliah University fees include multiple components, such as tuition fee, security deposit, hostel fee, mess fee, and more. While other fee components could be refundable, non-refundable, to be paid semester-wise or annually. Tabulated below is the Aliah University course-wise fee for the admission year 2025-26:

Aliah University course admissions 2025 for some of its courses is done based onmerit and entrance exams. Check below the complete Aliah University admission process:Application:The mode of application is online. Candidates must register online and then fill out the online application form.Selection rounds:Appear for theAUATuniversity exam and followed by selection rounds and then wait for the release of their resultsAdmission confirmation:Once the selection rounds are done, the shortlisted candidates are called for document verification. Aspirants need to pay acourse feeto confirm their seat in the university.

faqs.question: Can I get into Aliah University with 70% in class 12th?
faqs.answer: Yes, you can get into Aliah University with70% in class 12th. The university offers admission to various programmes based on both entrance exams and merit scores. For example, for some courses like B.Tech, the selection is based on theAliah University Admission Test (AUAT) and WBJEE exam scores, while for other courses like BCA, the selection is based on the merit of candidates' marks in the last qualifying examination (Class 12).Therefore, it is advisable to check the specific admission criteria for the desired programme on the official website of Aliah University or other reliable sources.

faqs.question: Which university offers the highest average placement package to MBA graduates among Adamas University and Aliah University?
faqs.answer: The average placement package offered to MBA graduates at Aliah University is INR 3.5 LPA. On the other hand, the average placement package offered to MBA graduates at Adamas University is INR 4.5 lakh. Therefore, Adamas University offers the highest average placement package to MBA graduates compared to Aliah University. Note: Aliah University only offers an integrated BBA+MBA course, not an MBA as a standalone course.

description: Aliah University cutoff 2025 is available on this page for admission to multiple courses. Refer to the sections below to view the Aliah University WBJEE cutoff 2025, along with other exams for different courses, rounds and categories, etc. Other exam-related updates are below:

Aliah University WBJEE cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final cutoff list. The cutoff was released for selecting students for B.E. / B.Tech courses. For General Home State category, the last round closing ranks were in the range of 7099 to 16170 for B.E. / B.Tech admission. Considering the lowest cutoff rank of 7099, B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering emerged as the most challenging specialisation for admission. In the first round, the closing rank for the same was 5764

Aliah University B.E. / B.Tech cutoff 2025, along with past two years cutoff details are tabulated below for different courses, specialisations, rounds and categories, etc. For B.E. / B.Tech admission, the top three most competitive specialisations were B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering, B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering and B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering, with WBJEE last round closing ranks of 7099, 9052 and 11430, respectively. The cutoff ranks mentioned here is

hostel_campus.college_name: Aliah University Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: Biological Sciences in Aliah University.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi connected and AC-conditioned library. Labs are in moderate condition. There are washing machines in our university hostel. Classrooms are well maintained. Food quality is at a moderate level in the hostel canteen. Middle-level sports opportunities. First-aid and medicine service available.

reviews.review_heading: My experience at Aliah University as an Electrical Engineering student.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our department is very good and well-maintained. There is Wi-Fi and AC in the library. Labs are also okay. Hostel facilities are good, very clean, and well-maintained, but there is no Wi-Fi connection in the hostel. There is a first aid medical service in our university.

reviews.review_heading: My BCA journey at Aliah University.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is super clean, Wi-Fi-connected library and lab, but no Wi-Fi in the hostel, there are water purifiers and washing machines in the hostel, decent types of no good, not much bad, there is a first-aid medical service at the university, and PC in the computer lab needs to be changed.

reviews.review_heading: Good college with very helpful faculty and teachers, and friendly students.
reviews.review_text: Our department has good facilities like a well-equipped lab, smart class with a projector, high-speed Wi-Fi and a good library. Hostel rooms are very clean. The mess food is average. Medical facilities and sports -+options are provided. Overall, the infrastructure is quiet and satisfying for students.

reviews.review_heading: Good college with very helpful faculty, teachers, and friendly students.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is good. Wi-Fi, classrooms and a useful library are available. Hostel rooms are clean and comfortable. Mess food is average good. Basic medical support and sports facilities like football and cricket games are available. The campus environment is peaceful and suitable for study.

reviews.review_heading: BCA at Aliah University, my true thought.
reviews.review_text: Labs are okay, but lab maintenance is bad and needs an updated device in the lab. Conditions of the classrooms are good. The library is air-conditioned and has a 24/7 Wi-Fi facility, but it needs more books. There is a lack of books. The hostel facility is super, but there is no Wi-Fi and CCTV support in the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and helpful faculty, placements need a boost.
reviews.review_text: The university has good infrastructure for my course, with well-equipped laboratories, spacious classrooms, and a library stocked with relevant books. Most academic buildings have Wi-Fi and basic digital facilities to support learning. Hostel rooms are clean, furnished with study tables and cupboards, and provide a safe environment with 24/7 security. The hostel has drinking water, common areas, and a mess for daily meals, though food quality could be improved. Overall, the facilities are adequa...

reviews.review_heading: Aliah University, located in Kolkata, offers a B.Tech. program in Mechanical Engineering.
reviews.review_text: Great institution with modern infrastructure and a supportive faculty. The campus life is enjoyable, with good hostel facilities and extracurricular activities. The university's strong focus on academic excellence makes it an excellent choice for students. It is highly recommended!

reviews.review_heading: Aliah University - The dream of many students.
reviews.review_text: This university has very good infrastructure; you can also say that it has mind-blowing infrastructure. Whether you talk about classrooms, teaching through digital boards, good laboratory facilities, or the hostel facility, it feels like you are staying in a five-star hotel.

reviews.review_heading: Very satisfied with the facilities, faculty members, and campus.
reviews.review_text: It has big, beautiful, and clean campus. Campus is smoke free and eco-friendly. Classrooms are comfortable, and Wi-Fi is available. Library is the best space for students to revise or work during off period. It also has centralized air-conditioning. Hostels are clean, and rooms are pretty well spaced as well. Quality of food in canteen and mess is really good. Cooking conditions are very hygienic.

reviews.review_heading: Aliah University is the best university I have ever studied at.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms, labs, library, Wi-Fi, and other facilities are 100% working and of good quality. The infrastructure of the university building is also maintained and repaired every year. Hostels are also good, the rooms and beds are well-made, and furnished rooms are given to students. Sports facilities are also good.

reviews.review_heading: Aliah University is good for everyone for any course.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of this university is nice. The classroom, library, and Wi-Fi are newly maintained every time. The hostel quality is so good for all the students in this university. The mess food is good for health. Medical facilities and sports are also nice.

reviews.review_heading: It is an underrated university with a lack of government funding.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our university is okay. We have smart as well as well-furnished classrooms. We have a library and the whole campus in the Wi-Fi range. The best thing about this university is that it has good hostel infrastructure and facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the infrastructure and faculty, but placements in 2025 are average.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available in the seminar room, library, and on the university's ground floor. Overall, the food quality in the canteen is good. The medical facilities are also helpful. Many sports are played in the university by the students, such as cricket, football, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Supportive faculty and good infrastructure, but disappointing placement outcome.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms are spacious and clean. Wi-Fi is only available at some parts of the campus. There are computer labs and a well-stocked library with physical books but the AC doesn't work. The hostel facilities are decent, I don't hear much complain about the hostel services. The college has grounds for cricket, football, and has a canteen and a cafeteria too. The food and the coffee are good and affordable for the students. I've never seen a medical facility on our campus. The best thing from my...

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about Aliah University, New Town

likes.text: Many IT companies visit our college every year like TCS, Wipro, Cognizant, Capgemini, Byjus, etc.
We have a placement program where they taught how to tackle interviews and overall best college.

likes.text: Free Wi-Fi available, well equipped labs, neat and clean classrooms, huge library.
Our college also provides hostel facilities for only some students, and the infrastructure of the hostel is quite good.

likes.text: If you paid attention in class and practiced all topics well, then semester exams are easy to pass, but you have to work hard.
Our teachers and faculty members are highly qualified and good persons by heart and by teaching method.

likes.text: The best thing about my course is, it make the students industry ready, they can both opt for private or government jobs.
Events- good, Fest- good, campus crowd- huge, connectivity- huge, campus surroundings- beautiful, scholarship- available, extracurricular activities- done.

paragraphs: Aliah University does not offer a 100% scholarship to all students. However, the university provides merit cum means scholarship for meritorious and financially weaker students. In addition, the university has a Brotherhood Fund to support students who are facing financial difficulties due to their economic conditions. Therefore, if you are aiming for a scholarship, it is always wise to explore all of these available options, the government schemes, and external funding opportunities. Besides this, you can check college reviews on our website for further information
The BA application fee is equivalent to the Aliah University Admission Test fee for 2025. The AUAT application fee is tabulated below:

The fee structure for BBA courses at Aliah University is a combination of several components, such as the tuition fee, hostel fee, admission fee, and other charges. The total tuition fee for BBA is INR 59,400. Additionally, the hostel fee for BBA students is INR  INR 20,000. The fee amount mentioned is sourced from the official website/sanctioning body and is subject to change.  Therefore, it is indicative.

college_info.intro:
The popular programs at JSPM’s JSPM’s Bhivarabai Sawant Institute of Technology and Research are the flagship Bachelor of Engineering (BE) and Master of Engineering (ME) courses. These programs lay a solid foundation for students who wish to pursue a course in the field of Technology or Engineering. The BE and ME programs are equivalent in their acceptability to the BTech and MTech courses.
Given below is further information regarding JSPM BSIOTR popular programs:

placements.overview:
JSPM Wagholi placements 2025 are currently ongoing and further information is still awaited. As per the latest updates, over 202 job offers have been made to students during 2025 placements.

As per the JSPM BSIOTR placements 2024 report, 236 total students were placed, with a decent placement rate of 74.44%. The highest package stood at INR 10 LPA. Some of the top recruiters at JSPM’s Bhivarabai Sawant Institute of Technology and Research include Accenture, TCS, Capgemini, Hexaware, Tech Mahindra, Bajaj, Amazon, Wipro, Avaada, Cognizant, GE Aviation, among others.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Information Technology - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: My views and captures of my college.

review_content.Placements: Nearly 80-90% of students in our Information Technology course get placed. The highest package goes to a student from the IT department at 42 LPA, while the average package is around 12 LPA, and the lowest is 3-4 LPA. Companies like Capgemini and 10+ others visit for placements. Around 50-60% of students secure internships, with most getting placed in Capgemini.
review_content.Infrastructure: In our department, all software and hardware labs have Wi-Fi facility with a good network. Classrooms are big in size, accommodating up to 120 students. The hostel is excellent for girls, with strong security, and the warden is friendly and caring. The mess food is average, but we are okay with it. We also have a large cricket ground.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Placements are good, and the faculty members are okay.

review_content.Placements: Placements in the college are good, and nearly 70-80% of students get placed this year. Placements for the computer branch are okay. Other branch students get placed in companies like TCS, Wipro, Infosys, and other companies.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college has a nice service of Wi-Fi. The infrastructure is also good. It provides the best quality of food in the food court. The college also has a canteen with good infrastructure and good food. Classrooms on the campus are also good. There is freshness in surroundings.

review_summary.college_name: JSPM Wagholi Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electronics and Telecommunication Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Good infrastructure and better by 2015.

content.Placements: 1000+ students placed. 44 lacks package offered. Amazon, TCS, Cognizant, and other core-based companies are available and have placed many students in our college. TPO, various company contacts, that's why various companies are placed. Various courses are offered in our college, like artificial intelligence, BCS, B.Sc., Data Science, and MBA.
content.Infrastructure: Library is available. Wi-Fi is available in our college. Cleanliness very well. Teaching staff is well. Hostel cleanliness is very well in our college. Medicine facility ambulance is available in our college. Canteen is available in our college. Sports ground provides various games, which provide our college with various games and tournaments.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: It is a great college with supportive faculty, an industry-ready curriculum, and good facilities.

content.Placements: 60% of students in Computer Engineering were placed in the previous year. In the previous year, the highest package was 6 LPA, the average package was 4 LPA, and the lowest package was 3 LPA offered to students. Companies like TCS, Infosys, Wipro, and Cognizant, which are service-based companies, visit the college during placement rounds. 50% of students got internships. The Computer Department also conducts activities like coding competitions and industrial visits.
content.Infrastructure: There are separate floors for each department, and there is a well-equipped computer lab. The college provides Wi-Fi for students. The college classrooms are under CCTV and have a clean environment. The college has a separate library for students, with thousands of books available for students.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Information Technology - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: My views and captures of my college.

content.Placements: Nearly 80-90% of students in our Information Technology course get placed. The highest package goes to a student from the IT department at 42 LPA, while the average package is around 12 LPA, and the lowest is 3-4 LPA. Companies like Capgemini and 10+ others visit for placements. Around 50-60% of students secure internships, with most getting placed in Capgemini.
content.Infrastructure: In our department, all software and hardware labs have Wi-Fi facility with a good network. Classrooms are big in size, accommodating up to 120 students. The hostel is excellent for girls, with strong security, and the warden is friendly and caring. The mess food is average, but we are okay with it. We also have a large cricket ground.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Placements are good, and the faculty members are okay.

content.Placements: Placements in the college are good, and nearly 70-80% of students get placed this year. Placements for the computer branch are okay. Other branch students get placed in companies like TCS, Wipro, Infosys, and other companies.
content.Infrastructure: The college has a nice service of Wi-Fi. The infrastructure is also good. It provides the best quality of food in the food court. The college also has a canteen with good infrastructure and good food. Classrooms on the campus are also good. There is freshness in surroundings.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Good placement in 2020 and having good facilities.

content.Placements: 700,000 is the average package offered to the students. JSPM's Bhivarabai Sawant Institute of Technology and Research (BSIOTR) in Wagholi, Pune, has demonstrated commendable placement records over recent years. Here's an overview of the placement statistics: 2021-22: Out of 489 students, 401 were placed, resulting in a placement percentage of approximately 82%. 2020-21: Out of 601 students, 438 secured placements, leading to a placement percentage of about 72.87%. Salary Packages: Highest Package: In the 2021-22 academic year, the highest salary package offered was 40 LPA. Average Package: The average salary package during the same period was around 3.5 LPA.

admission_process.title: JSPM Wagholi Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: JSPM Wagholi admission 2025enquiry form is currently open. The college offers various courses, BE and ME at the UG and PG level. To get admission to JSPM Wagholi, candidates must sit and appear for an entrance exam as per respective courses. The college offers nine courses (including specialisations) in various streams of Engineering, IT & Software. The application process atJSPM Bhivarabai Sawant Institute of Technology and Researchis conducted online. Read the following article to know more aboutJSPM Wagholicourse admission2025.

The college courses' admissions are based on entrance exam scores such as JEE Main, MHT CET and GATE, MHTCET MTech. Along with that, candidates must also fulfil the minimum eligibility requirements of the respective courses. The following table mentions the eligibility and selection ofJSPM Wagholi courses:
Students can check detailed JSPM Wagholi admission process infographic below:

JSPM Wagholi charges different fees for the different programmes offered at the UG and PG levels. Candidates are first required to submit the application fees during the time of registration. JSPM Wagholi tuition fees range between INR 1.6 lakh and INR 3.1 lakh. Given below are theJSPM Wagholi fees:
Note:This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

Note:This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

JSPM Wagholi's admission process includes registration and merit-list preparation of the entrance exam as per respective courses. Candidates must follow the below steps to get a seat in the JSPM Wagholi:
Aspirants can apply for BE and ME courses at the official website.

The selection criteria at JSPM Wagholi are based on entrance exam scores. However, candidates have to complete the last educational qualification as per the respective courses set by the college. Students are selected based on the entrance exam of JEE Main, MHT CET for BE courses and GATE, MHTCET MTech courses.

Once selection rounds are over, the institute releases a merit list. Students can checkJSPM Wagholi cutoffdetails here. To allot and confirm the seat candidates are required to pay the application fee at the admission receipt centre.

faqs.question: What can students do after JEE Main session 2 result?
faqs.answer: After JEE session 2 is completed, only those candidates who are aiming for IITs need to start preparing for JEE Advanced after clearing JEE Main. Those who are above the 98th percentile should start preparing for JEE Advanced as soon as possible. Those below this, between the 95th and 98th percentile, should focus on attempting more mock tests and previous year question papers so that they have a better chance of clearing JEE Advanced

faqs.question: How are the placements at JSPM Wagholi?
faqs.answer: JSPM Wagholi offers good annual placements for its BTech and M.Tech courses. In 2023, the participating recruiters offered over 320 job offers to the 2023 batch of BTech and M.Tech so far. faqs.question: How are M.Tech placements at JSPM Wagholi?
faqs.answer: According to the data available, M.Tech placements at JSPM Wagholi are good. Companies like TCS, Capgemini, and others come to the college for interviews, and at least 50% of students were placed. The average salary is around 2-3 lakh. The highest salary package offered was 40 LPA, and almost 90% of students got placed in this course. JSPM Group of Institutes has one of the best engineering colleges in Pune, and the institute has assembled a team of highly experienced and qualified professionals from industry ensuring up-to-date and relevant academic delivery. The Training and Placement Director at JSPM University Pune has placed over 150 companies for campus placement till date, with the highest package being 10.71 LPA. JSPM’s Kautilya Institute of Management and Research - [KIMR] Wagholi, Pune also has good placements. Companies like Housing Development Finance Corporation (HDFC), Tata Teleservices, VSNL (Tata Communications), and Axis Bank visit the campus for placements.

reviews.review_heading: It is a great college with supportive faculty, an industry-ready curriculum, and good facilities.

The college classrooms are under CCTV and have a clean environment. The college has a separate library for students, with thousands of books available for students.

reviews.review_heading: My views and captures of my college.
reviews.review_text: In our department, all software and hardware labs have Wi-Fi facility with a good network. Classrooms are big in size, accommodating up to 120 students. The hostel is excellent for girls, with strong security, and the warden is friendly and caring. The mess food is average, but we are okay with it. We also have a large cricket ground.

reviews.review_heading: Placements are good, and the faculty members are okay.
reviews.review_text: The college has a nice service of Wi-Fi. The infrastructure is also good. It provides the best quality of food in the food court. The college also has a canteen with good infrastructure and good food. Classrooms on the campus are also good. There is freshness in surroundings.

reviews.review_heading: Good placement in 2020 and having good facilities.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available on all campuses, and classrooms have smart boards. The college has a big library. JSPM's Bhivarabai Sawant Institute of Technology and Research (BSIOTR) in Wagholi, Pune, offers a range of facilities to support students' academic and extracurricular activities.

reviews.review_heading: Average college with average facilities and average placement. Teachers are good and helpful.
reviews.review_text: The labs do not have that great infrastructure, but the PCs are good. The library is very nice; we have all the labs with good PCs, but the infrastructure is old. The food court is great, with various types of fast food, and it also encourages sports, with a big ground and sports courts.

reviews.review_heading: Expectations were high but the reality of the college.
reviews.review_text: Various facilities like food court, library, well-maintained labs, Gymkhana, clean and fresh classroom, playground, etc. Are available. For cultural programmes seminar hall is also available. In the boy's hostel washing machines, water purifiers, well-cleaned rooms, and Wi-Fi facilities are available.

reviews.review_heading: The life of BSIOTR student.
reviews.review_text: The college campus infrastructure here is very good and has a greenery nature area that has been surrounding it everywhere. There are big classrooms, and every classroom has been equipped with a camera and Wi-Fi. The staff members and faculty members are very humble and have a helping nature towards students.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied, increase in placement rate from 2022, good campus infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: There are separate classrooms for each department, and each classroom has a smart board and high-speed Wi-Fi. The labs are well-equipped with updated PCs and accessories. The college library has a variety of books helpful for students studying for competitive exams such as MPSC, UPSC, and GATE. The college canteen is good but not as great compared to other colleges.

reviews.review_heading: JSPM’s Bhivarabai Sawant Institute of Technology and Research, a must visit college.
reviews.review_text: The department provides all the basic and important facilities. It has Wi-Fi, various labs for practical work, and a separate programming lab for each subject. The college provides mattresses and Wi-Fi in the private hostel for boys.

reviews.review_heading: The most genuine review.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is quite good, with facilities like Wi-Fi, various types of laboratories, and a library. Hostel facilities are available only for female students, but no food is provided by the hostel. The quality of food in the food court is good. Students interested in sports can participate through the college team.

reviews.review_heading: Our college gave me an absolute feeling of being a good student.
reviews.review_text: For me, the infrastructure of our college building is not very good. Classrooms are average. There were no digital boards in every class. Now, they have increased digital boards in classrooms. In the field of information technology, we mostly need labs like Linux Lab, computer lab, etc. The lab condition is good. Some PCs are not working properly so students are facing problems. Our college should provide boys' hostels. There is no boys hostel provided by our college. There is only a girls' host...

reviews.review_heading: The college review of truth.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is very nice and beautiful, as shown in the reviews. The library is nice, but now our college is building a new big library for all. The lab and WiFi are decent. As I am not in the hostel, I can't tell about hostel life. Sports and games are also taken well on the ground.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college for academics, not for enjoyment.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is okay except for the water, which is not purified, and the geyser is available only until 9 am in the morning. To leave the campus, you need to video call your parents and show them, then they give you a GATE pass. You need to show it to the watchman and then write an entry. This protocol is for girls.

reviews.review_heading: This college is very good because of good teaching staff, Sports ground, Events, etc.
reviews.review_text: My department offers a range of amenities, such as Wi-Fi, computer labs, classrooms, and a library. The hostel facilities are also commendable, providing well-equipped rooms with tables, chairs, fans, inverters, hot water, and drinking water. Additionally, the food quality is excellent.

college_info.intro:
ADTU has multiple course options for students from different streams and fields. Assam Down Town University Guwahati flagship courses are Master of Business Administration (MBA) and Bachelor of Technology (BTech) programmes. . BTech is offered at the UG level for the duration of 4 years. BTech programme is given in streams like Civil Engineering, Electronics and Telecommunication Engineering & Computer Science and Engineering. After completing the programme students can work in both government & private sectors. BTech students can work as Software Engineers, Data Scientists, or can take up various fields relevant to their stream.
MBA is offered for the duration of 2 years at PG level in four specialisations, which are:

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Assam Down Town University offers UG and PG courses in different fields such as Engineering, Management, Pharmacy, Nursing, Allied Health Sciences, Paramedical, Hospitality, and Skill Development. At the UG level the university offers courses like BBA, BTech, BSc, BPharma, BTech, etc. These courses are offered for the duration of 3-4 years.

faqs.answer: A:    ADTU considers the TJEE Cutoff for admission to various BSc programmes for all categories. The ADTU TJEE Cutoff in 2022 ranged from 1068 to 4650 for the General AI category candidates. The easiest specialisation was BSc in Food Nutrition and Dietetics and the hardest was BSc in Microbiology. Students can refer to the table below to know the last round closing ranks for the General AI category according to the TJEE Cutoff 2022. Course NameLast Round Closing Rank 2022B.Sc. in Biotechnology3688B.Sc. in Food Nutrition and Dietetics4650B.Sc. in Critical and Intensive Care Technology4278B.Sc. in Microbiology1068Bachelor of Dialysis Technology2446Bachelor in Medical Laboratory Technology (BMLT)4600Bachelor in Optometry (B.Optom)3403Bachelor of Operation Theatre Technology2949B.Sc.0 in Trauma, Emergency and Disaster Management2413Bachelor of Physiotherapy (BPT)3418Bachelor of Radiography and Advance Imaging Technology2872
faqs.question: What is the ADTU TJEE Cutoff?

faqs.answer: A:    Assam Downtown University follows a merit-based selection process for the allocation of MBA seats. The university offers limited seats for the MBA programme. Students who satisfy the eligibility criteria are further screened based on their academic performance. Further, these students are also required to produce relevant documents. The university offers 60 seats for the MBA programme. NOTE: The above-mentioned seat intake has been sourced from the official website. It may change and, hence, is inductive.
faqs.question: On what basis are Assam Downtown University MBA seats allocated?

faqs.answer: A:    Assam down town University (ADTU) admissions are open for all courses. For MBA admissions there is no entrance test required.  Admission is done on the basis of aggregate score in graduation which should be around 50 %. To get admission in BTech course at AdtU, JEE mains conducted by NTA is considered with a minimum of 45% aggregate from a recognised university. TJEE counselling is considered for BSc admission at Assam Down Town University (ADTU).
faqs.question: What is the entrance exam for Assam Down Town University (ADTU)?

faqs.answer: A:    The university also offers a BSc programme at the UG level. Selection for BSc in Biotechnology, Critical & Intensive Care Technology, Microbiology, Dialysis Technology, and Operation Theatre Technology is based on the TJEE cutoff. The authorities have not released the latest ADTU BSc TJEE cutoff 2024. However, as per the 2022 TJEE cutoff report, the competitive closing rank of BSc in Microbiology stood at 1068 for the General All-India category.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Solid placements, modern labs, and great campus life are provided by ADTU.

review_content.Placements: In Assam down town University, I am from the B.Tech CSE course from the 2024 batch. 85 percent of students got placed. The highest package is 12.76 LPA, and the lowest package is 3 LPA. The average package is 4.5 LPA. Top recruiting companies for our course are TCS, Wipro, Infosys, Capgemini, and ITC. 60 percent of students got internships in companies like TCS, IntelliPaat, etc., and many converted to PPOs. There is strong training and support from the placement cell. It is solid for the northeast students.
review_content.Infrastructure: Classrooms have AC and smart boards. Labs have more than 300 high-configuring PCs, Cisco and Microsoft labs, and 24x7 100 Mbps Wi-Fi. The library is big with digital access and is open till 10 PM. The hostel has 3-sharing rooms with attached bathrooms and Wi-Fi. The mess is hygienic and repetitive, but okay. It serves non-vegetarian food for 4 days. The canteen serves affordable and tasty food. There is a nurse on campus and a downtown hospital nearby. The college provides grounds for games like cricket, football, badminton, and basketball. It also has a gym. For the infrastructure and hostel, I would easily rate 4.5 out of 5 for Northeast.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: University is not bad, but it could be better.

review_content.Placements: In my course, we have 2 sections, A and B, with a total of 152 students. The lowest package is around 3 LPA, the average is 4 LPA, and the highest is 10-12 LPA. Top companies were Jtekt, PwC, Jaro Education, Recruit CRM, etc. I think 30 % of students got the internship. Associate software engineer was the top role offered.
review_content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure for my course are top-notch. We have 6-7 labs with Wi-Fi init. Every department has its own library as well as the general library of the university. But the hostel mess is a disappointment, there are fields for different kinds of games in the university.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Good faculty, helpful teachers. Average placement, but can achieve higher, with good infrastructure.

content.Placements: I am in B.Tech CSE, I had 62 percent in my 12th and chose ADTU to study CSE with a specialization in Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning. The one campus placement offers are not that good, but not bad either. If you maintain a good GPA, then the chances of getting a good placement are higher, ranging from 3.3 LPA to 11 LPA sometimes.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is good in every aspect. ADTU has Wi-Fi connection all around the campus and per classroom, smart boards and projectors per class, a library is big, has a gym, swimming pool, badminton court, football ground, and everything. The hostel facility is good too, they have a geyser, washing machines, and a dryer. You can get an AC facility in the hostel.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) with IBM - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Very good college, satisfied with the infrastructure and campus out there.

content.Placements: Placement cell is good, it helps the students in placement time, and helps them to secure a good position in a company with a very decent average package. Students feel very motivated with the help of the placement cell and faculty. They give their best.
content.Infrastructure: The university is situated in a very good location with greenery and natural beauty everywhere with good views and cafes in each block and also good and hygienic food in the canteen at a very good price that anyone can afford without any hesitation or budget issues.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Solid placements, modern labs, and great campus life are provided by ADTU.

content.Placements: In Assam down town University, I am from the B.Tech CSE course from the 2024 batch. 85 percent of students got placed. The highest package is 12.76 LPA, and the lowest package is 3 LPA. The average package is 4.5 LPA. Top recruiting companies for our course are TCS, Wipro, Infosys, Capgemini, and ITC. 60 percent of students got internships in companies like TCS, IntelliPaat, etc., and many converted to PPOs. There is strong training and support from the placement cell. It is solid for the northeast students.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms have AC and smart boards. Labs have more than 300 high-configuring PCs, Cisco and Microsoft labs, and 24x7 100 Mbps Wi-Fi. The library is big with digital access and is open till 10 PM. The hostel has 3-sharing rooms with attached bathrooms and Wi-Fi. The mess is hygienic and repetitive, but okay. It serves non-vegetarian food for 4 days. The canteen serves affordable and tasty food. There is a nurse on campus and a downtown hospital nearby. The college provides grounds for games like cricket, football, badminton, and basketball. It also has a gym. For the infrastructure and hostel, I would easily rate 4.5 out of 5 for Northeast.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: University is not bad, but it could be better.

content.Placements: In my course, we have 2 sections, A and B, with a total of 152 students. The lowest package is around 3 LPA, the average is 4 LPA, and the highest is 10-12 LPA. Top companies were Jtekt, PwC, Jaro Education, Recruit CRM, etc. I think 30 % of students got the internship. Associate software engineer was the top role offered.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure for my course are top-notch. We have 6-7 labs with Wi-Fi init. Every department has its own library as well as the general library of the university. But the hostel mess is a disappointment, there are fields for different kinds of games in the university.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Faculty members are really nice in this college.

content.Placements: The placement rate in my course is not that high. 50% student get placed in repeated companies like TCS, Infosys, Wipro, Tech Mahindra, along with some startups. The highest package offered here is 20 LPA, while the average package is 6.5 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure of my college is great. The classrooms are spacious neat and clean. The food is average nutritious and hygienic, but sometime lacking variety and taste. Medical facilities are available on campus with a first aid center. Overall, everything is nice.

admission_overview.title: ADTU Admission overview 2026
admission_overview.description: Assam Down Town University (ADTU) admission process 2026 is both entrance-based and merit-based. Interested candidates can fill out the online form for admission on the official website of ADTU. Assam Down Town University (ADTU) offers several courses at UG, PG, doctoral and diploma levels including BSc, BDes, BTech, MBA, MSW, MA etc. For BTech admission, candidates need to appear for the Assam CEE or JEE mains exam. For other courses, such as BSc, BA, BPharma, and MSc admissions are based on performance of the last qualifying examination. AdtU courses admission are offered through seven academic departments, including Faculty of Commerce, Management, Humanities and Social Sciences, Faculty of Engineering & Technology, Faculty of Sciences, Faculty of Pharmaceutical Science, Faculty of Nursing and more.

admission_process.title: ADTU Admission Process 2026

paragraphs: To apply for ADTU admission, fill an online application form, which is available on the university's website. There are two admission portals available on the official website:Domestic AdmissionandInternational Admission. Indian candidates must choose for Domestic portal. The admission process is based on both entrance scores and merit lists. Applicants must complete Class 12 with relevant aggregate scores for admission to UG courses. Find below the step-by-step process forAssam Down Town University (ADTU) admission:
Step 1: Application:Apply online through the official website of ADTU @adtu.in
Step 2: Selection:Selection is done on the basis ofperformance in the last qualifying examfor most of the UG and PG courses. BTech admission is required to have a valid score inAssam CEEorJEE mains.
Step 4: Payment of Admission Fee:Candidates need to pay admission for to their desired course at Assam Down Town University (ADTU).
Assam Down Town University (ADTU) fees include multiple componentstuition fees,hostel fees, etc.

Faculty members are knowledgeable, approachable, and dedicated to helping students understand the subjects thoroughly. They make genuine efforts to ensure that we are not only prepared for exams but also develop practical skills that are essential for our careers. Many teachers use real-life examples and encourage active participation in the classroom, which makes learning more engaging.

reviews.review_heading: It has good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The placement cell of our college has made consistent efforts to invite reputed companies for campus recruitment, and we truly appreciate their work. Some top recruiters that visited our campus include TCS, Wipro, Infosys, Tech Mahindra, Capgemini, Cognizant, and HCL. These companies have provided good opportunities for students, especially in the IT and service sectors.

data.description: The faculty members at ADTU are degree holders having PhD, Master's & Diploma. The university appoints well-trained & expert faculty members who gives quality education to the students. The faculty focuses on giving both theoretical & practical knowledge to the students.

paragraphs: Assam Down Town Universityranks 233 out of 272 colleges in 2023. It offers total of 64 courses at the diploma, UG and PG.
The annual educational fees of Assam Down Town University are -
The eligibility criteria of all the courses are completing of 10+2. And, for B.Pharma the eligibility criteria is completing of D.Pharma.

The total MBA tuition fee at Assam Downtown University ranges from INR 1 Lacs to INR 4.5 Lacs for two years. Other than this, the fee structure may include other charges, such as admission fees, security deposits, etc. Besides the tuition fee, students are required to pay one-time fees of INR 60,000. The mentioned fee is sourced from the official website of the university/sanctioning body. It is still subject to change and, hence, is indicative.

The total BSc tuition fee at Assam Downtown University ranges from INR 2.5 lakh to INR 10.4 lakh for the entire course duration. Apart from this, the fee structure may include other charges, such as admission fees, security deposits, etc. Besides the tuition fee, candidates are required to pay a one-time fee, which is ranges from INR 50,000 to INR 1.6 lakh. Tabulated below is the ADTU BSc fee breakdown:
NOTE: The mentioned fee is sourced from the official website of the university/sanctioning body. It is still subject to change and, hence, is indicative.

Yes, Assam Downtown University provides scholarships to its enrolled students who are officially registered for the BBA programme from the university. These candidates can apply for scholarships through the Common Scholarship Test (CST). The university aims to provide brilliant candidates with such financial aid. However, the university allows a total of 120 enrollments each year. On the other hand, any Class 12 can also apply for the scholarships.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Electronics and Telecommunication Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Review of Government College of Engineering, Nagpur

review_content.Placements: GCOEN has had a good placement record for the last few years. Recently, one passed-out student from the ENTC branch of GCOEN got placed in Sony for 48 LPA. Placements are good but only depend on your skills and the companies’ requirements. Not many big companies like Google or Microsoft visit here, but many companies do come for placement drives, so students get a big opportunity to secure placements.
review_content.Infrastructure: I am not satisfied with the campus because I had dreamed it would be much better for my engineering life, but still, one thing is that it is more than worth it for the course fee. It’s not so bad that I would not choose it, but it is less attractive compared to other colleges. The classrooms and labs are good, and the hostels are also good with Wi-Fi all over the campus.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Review of Government College of Engineering, Nagpur.

review_content.Placements: GCOEN has a decent placement record with a fair number of students getting placed in recent years. While TCS is a primary recruiter other companies also hire from the institution. Overall, the placements are quite good for students as long as they have the necessary skills. A student with the right skills will definitely get placed.
review_content.Infrastructure: Although the course fee is more than worth it for the facilities, GCOEN's infrastructure might not be as grand as one would expect from an engineering college. The campus has three academic buildings, the Main building houses the Civil and Mechanical departments, the Annex building contains the Electronics, Electrical, and Computer Science departments, and a third building is currently under construction. There is one boys' hostel and one girls' hostel, a play area, and well-equipped labs.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electronics and Telecommunication Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Real review based on my college life.

content.Placements: Honestly speaking, the placement of our college is improving. Last year's placement batch had 25 students with an average package of 3-4 LPA, and the highest placement of our college is 44 LPA. However, I’ve noticed that core branches have better placement rates than tech branches. So, this is the overall situation regarding placements.
content.Infrastructure: The college area is 12 acres. The infrastructure is good, but compared to other private colleges, it is not much better. There are hostels for girls and boys, and canteen (mess) facilities are only available for hostel students. In my opinion, the education quality is good, so there is no need for excellent infrastructure.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electronics and Telecommunication Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Government College of Engineering, Nagpur

content.Placements: The placement of Government College of Engineering Nagpur is average, not much, but many students have had placements in the past, approximately 200 students are placed in good MNCs. Its overall placement record is going upward, and its placement alumni is very strong. So, if the applicants are skillful and deserving, they will surely get placements.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is not good, it’s just bad. Every engineering student thinks their college should be good, but here it is very below average compared to other government and private engineering colleges. But yes, one thing is that it is more than worth it in the course fee. Computer labs are well-equipped, in fact, the best.
