description: Government College of Engineering, Nagpur MHT CET Cutoff 2025 has been announced for B.Tech admission covering all rounds and categories for students belonging to the AI or the HS quota. For other exams, the cutoff data can be viewed in the exam-wise sections. More updates are below:

MHT CET is the entrance exam for candidates seeking admission to the BE/BTech and other courses. The cutoff was released across different categories under the Home State quota. For the General category, the Government College of Engineering, Nagpur B.E. / B.Tech cutoff 2025 ranged between 89.49 and 96.41, with the most sought-after branch for admission being Computer Science, which had the highest cutoff percentile of 96.41. Similarly, with a lowest last-round cutoff percentile of 89.49, Mechani

Government College of Engineering, Nagpur MHT CET cutoff 2025 was released as percentiles, which means the higher the cutoff percentile, the more competitive the course is for admission and vice versa. Considering the last round cutoff data of 2025, Computer Science turned out to be the most competitive for admission, with a cutoff closing at 96.41. For the same competitive branch, the last round cutoff was 97.86 in the General category under the HS quota.
Some of the important dates related to MHT CET 2026 for admission are provided below. Candidates can keep track of the upcoming dates to be eligible for admission.

Before finalising any institute, a candidate should compare different colleges with each other to know which one suits them the best. Students can use the filters below to compare different colleges that accept MHT CET percentile for admission to B.E. / B.Tech course.

reviews.review_text: The college area is 12 acres. The infrastructure is good, but compared to other private colleges, it is not much better. There are hostels for girls and boys, and canteen (mess) facilities are only available for hostel students. In my opinion, the education quality is good, so there is no need for excellent infrastructure.

reviews.review_heading: Government College of Engineering, Nagpur
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is not good, it’s just bad. Every engineering student thinks their college should be good, but here it is very below average compared to other government and private engineering colleges. But yes, one thing is that it is more than worth it in the course fee. Computer labs are well-equipped, in fact, the best.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Government College of Engineering, Nagpur
reviews.review_text: I am not satisfied with the campus because I had dreamed it would be much better for my engineering life, but still, one thing is that it is more than worth it for the course fee. It’s not so bad that I would not choose it, but it is less attractive compared to other colleges. The classrooms and labs are good, and the hostels are also good with Wi-Fi all over the campus.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Government College of Engineering, Nagpur.
reviews.review_text: Although the course fee is more than worth it for the facilities, GCOEN's infrastructure might not be as grand as one would expect from an engineering college. The campus has three academic buildings, the Main building houses the Civil and Mechanical departments, the Annex building contains the Electronics, Electrical, and Computer Science departments, and a third building is currently under construction. There is one boys' hostel and one girls' hostel, a play area, and well-equipped labs.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Government College of Engineering, Nagpur.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is average. It doesn't compare to other engineering colleges, especially government ones. It is decent in its feel. As it is a government college, it consists of 2 hostels and 3 buildings for Civil, Mechanical, Electrical, Electronics, and Computer Science, and also for M. Tech.

reviews.review_heading: Supportive faculty members and helpful environment.
reviews.review_text: Placement scenario in the Electronics and Telecommunication (ETC) branch is decent. Around 60-70% students get placed every year. Top companies like TCS, Infosys, Capgemini, and Cognizant visit for recruitment. The average package is around 3.5 LPA, and some students also get internships in core companies.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Government College of Engineering, Nagpur.
reviews.review_text: College is not big, but it's pretty good compared to the fee. The college has three buildings, 2 hostels, and a mess. 1st main building is of civil, mechanical engineering, and administration. 2nd building is an annex of the CSE, EE department, etc. The 3rd building is under construction for the M.Tech course.

reviews.review_heading: Many extracurricular activities are done by students.
reviews.review_text: There are good facilities like a strong Wi-Fi connection, clean labs with presentation screens, and a neat and clean library. As a non-hostel student, I can't comment on hostels, but I can say that the mess and canteen facilities are very good. Sports facilities are also nice, and anyone can practice anytime.

reviews.review_heading: The genuine review of Government College of Engineering, Nagpur.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available everywhere on campus. There is centralised computer lab and the library is also available on campus. The hostel is the best part of the college. Free Wi-Fi is available. The mess food quality is also good. Sports event named Sphoorti is also conducted and ground conditions are also good.

reviews.review_heading: Great Infrastructure and Facilities, but Faculty Needs Improvement.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of my college is very good. The college is surrounded by plants and trees. My college provides the best books in the library and the best computer lab. The college has high-generation computers for students, and in the computer lab, there is also one other special room for a communication skills lab.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied by infrastructure, placements are average, but faculties are helpful.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is present on college campus. The labs of college are not that good; digital classrooms are there. The library and centralized computer centre are also there. The quality of food which is available in mess is average. There is a sports event called Sfoorti. In this event number of indoor and outdoor games are there, such as chess, carrom, table tennis, khokho, cricket, football, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied with the faculty, college and the infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: College is completely new and is still under development. Complete campus is yet to be constructed, the college lacks proper facilities and has the worst management. Hostel life is good but the hostel mess is yet to be managed properly and most of the work is done by the students themselves.

reviews.review_heading: College has satisfactory facilities for the students.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure for the mechanical engineering course was good at our college. College offers all the necessary facilities to its students. Wi-Fi, labs, library, hostel, canteen, etc. were given at our college to their students. Hostels of the college were having furnished rooms and were neat and clean.

reviews.review_heading: Below-average college as compared to other gov. colleges.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available throughout the whole campus; computer labs are good with fast PCs; classrooms are digital; and the library is good too. There is no canteen available yet as of 3/3/24, boys hostel has an intake of 180 students and has 6 floors; the girls hostel has intake of 100 students and has 4 floors Both hostels have lifts, and the cleanliness is good. Only 1 flaw in the boys hostel is that it currently has only 2 drinking water machines,  1 on the 2nd floor and one on the 5th floor. Ther...

reviews_list.review_title: A college with good extracurricular activities.

review_content.Placements: Every year, about 50% of students get placed. This year, the number was lower due to the recession. The highest package in 2024 was 8 LPA. The top recruiting companies are Siemens, Adani, Tata Technologies, NVIDIA, Tech Mahindra and many more. Internships are to be researched by students. The roles offered are those of GET engineers, RND engineers and many more.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is a bit old so it can be renovated. The condition of hostels is also not very good. They are old, as mentioned earlier. Library services are good. Mess food is also not very good. Basically, the canteen services were stopped by 2023, now they may be resumed. Sports and other extracurricular activities are promoted.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: The best college of Aurangabad.

review_content.Placements: 82 to 85% of the students were placed in my college in computer engineering. The highest package around is 18 LPA and the average package at our college is 5 to 6 LPA. The top recruiters are TCS, Mahindra, Infosys, Wipro, etc. 60 to 70 percent students got internships from our course and in different local companies .
review_content.Infrastructure: The facility and infrastructure available at Government engineering College of Aurangabad were decent. The Wi-Fi facility is not available in our hostel, labs and classrooms are very well maintained, and good infrastructure is provided in our college to students. The quality of the facility in my hostel is very good. The food are not available in hostel canteen; we have to join another mess from outside the college. Sports and game activities are very good at our college. There are different cricket grounds for students, a volleyball court, a basketball court, different badminton courts, and table tennis courts available in college.

review_summary.college_name: Government College of Engineering Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Our college has good infrastructure and a good campus.

content.Placements: In our college, skills are mostly focused on, and also the academic development of students. But placements are mostly based on students' skills and not on the percentage or CGPA. The highest package offered for students who get placed in our college is 10 LPA. The lowest package is 4 LPA. Roles like software developer, full stack developer, Python developer, and SQL developer are offered here.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is supportive. Wi-Fi facility is available in our college. Everything is good. The hostel has all the required facilities and has a good source of water. Our department is computer science, so the server is installed in our department as students need a higher internet speed for their work.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electronics and Telecommunication Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Nice college with good placement and happy college life.

content.Placements: The scenario of the placements is mixed; like if you have good skills and a good CGPA, then you will have a nice placement. The maximum placement in 2024 was 10.2 LPA and the minimum was 1.5 LPA. For core branches like Mechanical, Electrical, and Civil, there are more placements than for IT branches, but it's satisfactory and good as well. Top recruiters for the placements are Nvidia, L&T, Kirloskar, E&H, Tata Technologies, consultancy firms, and Wipro. There are lots of internship companies like Siemens, Torrent Power, Yashsreee, Principal, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities are sufficient to grow in our college. Classrooms are nice, with Wi-Fi and projectors available for learning, and they are big with good benches and stuff. The library and labs are very nice as they have a good amount of equipment and a large number of books available, and also nice infrastructure. But the hostel is not sufficient for boys. For them, it's the best hostel as it has all facilities available, but in the boys' hostel, there are limited facilities with limited seats, and you need merit for it. The canteen is nice as well as the mess in the hostel.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electronics and Telecommunication Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: A college with good extracurricular activities.

content.Placements: Every year, about 50% of students get placed. This year, the number was lower due to the recession. The highest package in 2024 was 8 LPA. The top recruiting companies are Siemens, Adani, Tata Technologies, NVIDIA, Tech Mahindra and many more. Internships are to be researched by students. The roles offered are those of GET engineers, RND engineers and many more.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is a bit old so it can be renovated. The condition of hostels is also not very good. They are old, as mentioned earlier. Library services are good. Mess food is also not very good. Basically, the canteen services were stopped by 2023, now they may be resumed. Sports and other extracurricular activities are promoted.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: The best college of Aurangabad.

content.Placements: 82 to 85% of the students were placed in my college in computer engineering. The highest package around is 18 LPA and the average package at our college is 5 to 6 LPA. The top recruiters are TCS, Mahindra, Infosys, Wipro, etc. 60 to 70 percent students got internships from our course and in different local companies .
content.Infrastructure: The facility and infrastructure available at Government engineering College of Aurangabad were decent. The Wi-Fi facility is not available in our hostel, labs and classrooms are very well maintained, and good infrastructure is provided in our college to students. The quality of the facility in my hostel is very good. The food are not available in hostel canteen; we have to join another mess from outside the college. Sports and game activities are very good at our college. There are different cricket grounds for students, a volleyball court, a basketball court, different badminton courts, and table tennis courts available in college.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Good infrastructure and nature with greenery everywhere.

content.Placements: Nice course, as mechanical engineering is a core branch. In my batch, there are a total of 63 students. Many companies come here, like Greaves Cotton Limited, and many of our college seniors have been placed with Adani Company. And college also takes extracurricular activities into account.
content.Infrastructure: Average facilities: there is a big field for cricket and football, as well as basketball, volleyball and kabaddi. The infrastructure is also good and everywhere there is greenery. Every class contains a projector and smart TV for explanation.

admission_overview.college_name: Government College of Engineering Admission 2025: Fee, Selection Criteria, Selection, Eligibility

admission_process.title: Government College of Engineering, Aurangabad Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Admission to theGovernment College of Engineering Aurangabad, or GECA, is primarily entrance-based. Government College of Engineering Aurangabad offers undergraduate, postgraduate and doctoral-level programmes such as BTech, MTech, MCA, and PhD under various disciplines.GECAadmissions are based on national-level entrance tests, likeMHT-CET,GATE,MAH MCA CET, etc. The university offers more than 15 courses at the UG, PG and PhD level in the streams of Engineering, IT & Software, Business and Management. The admission criteria for the BTech course are through MHT CET scores. Programmes such as MCA, BTech,MTech etc are offered byBAMU Aurangabad.

The university offers courses in full-time and part-time modes over 15 courses. Some of the popular programmes of GECA are BTech, MTech, and MCA among others. Furthermore, the university also offers PhD courses under the Electrical Engineering department. Candidates can read the table below to learn more on GECA admission criteria from the table presented below for the year 2024:
NOTE:The information available in the above table is sourced from the official website.

GECA Aurangabad offers BTech, MTech, MCA, and PhD under various disciplines. Candidates who plan to get admission in any of these courses must appear for the respective entrance exams and qualify for their cutoff. The table below showcases theGECA admission eligibilityand selection criteria:

Government College of Engineering (GECA) fees vary depending on the course and specialisations. The college may charge multiple components, such as hostel charges, library fees, and a security deposit. The college may charge some of these components only once at the time of admission, while the remaining need to be paid either annually or semester-wise as per the college's guidelines. Find below GECA fees for the offered programmes:

The courses like BTech, MTech, MCA, among others are offered by GECA Aurangabad Candidates can check the detailed admission process here. Apart from this, students can check the brief admission process for BTech, MTech, MCA courses at GECA Aurangabad below:
Admission is through counselling based on the rank obtained in Maharashtra Common Entrance Test (MHT CET).

faqs.question: Are admission in Government College of Engineering open?
faqs.answer: Government College of Engineering admission 2025 is open for ME/MTech program through Common Engineering Admission Procedure (CEAP) under the GATE Category. Eligible candidates can apply online on the official website.

faqs.question: Does Government College of Engineering Aurangabad provide a fee refund if a students wishes to withdraw their admission?
faqs.answer: Yes, Government College of Engineering Aurangabad does provide a refund in case of withdrawal of admission. However, the refund is subject to the fulfilment of certain conditions. Tabulated below are the guidelines to be followed as per the fee refund policy of the university:Percentage of refund of aggregate feesPoint of time when notice of withdrawal of admission is served to the University as per the UGC regulations100%15 days or more before the formally notified last date of admission90%Less

courses_data.description: Government College of Engineering, Aurangabad offers a Full-time MTech that lasts two years. The eligibility criteria for the course is graduation with a 45% aggregate and the selection procedure is through aGATEscore followed by counselling.

faqs.question: What is the M.Tech course fee at GECA Aurangabad?
faqs.answer: The M.Tech course fee at Government College of Engineering, Aurangabad is in between INR 57,000 to INR 1.4 lakh. The total Tuition fee is calculated on the basis of first year. Actual amount may vary. The fees might include components other than tuition fees.This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

faqs.question: What is the M.Tech mode of study at GECA Aurangabad?
faqs.answer: Government College of Engineering Aurangabad offers M.Tech course for two-years. The mode of study for the course is full-time and part -time. The courses are offered in various specialisations such asCivil Engineering,Mechanical Engineering,Structural Engineeringetc..

faqs.question: What happens if a student fails internal exams in Government College of Engineering?
faqs.answer: Paper Marks pattern is like 15+15+10+60. ISE (Inter sem exam) or also called as Class Test (CT) which are of 15 Marks for nearly all subjects and which held twice in one sem, Teacher's Assessment of 10 Marks and End sem exam of 60 Marks. Total of 100 Marks for 1 subject. If you miss 15 marks exams then for genuine reasons you can give Re-CT exams, which held nearly 5,10 days after CT exam and then about TA 10 marks, it is given on the basis of your assignments and attendance which are of 75% com

faqs.question: Can I join Government College of Engineering directly?
faqs.answer: No, you cannot join Government College of Engineering in Aurangabad directly without meeting the eligibility criteria and going through the admission process. Admission to the Government College of Engineering Aurangabad is primarily entrance and merit-based. Candidates must be qualified in Class 12 with required aggregate marks and must obtain a valid score in MHT-CET Entrance Exam. The college also accepts JEE Main scores for admission to its BTech programs.

faqs.question: Who is eligible for GECA?
faqs.answer: GECA Aurangabad offers BTech under various disciplines. Candidates who plan to get admission in any of these courses must appear for the respective entrance exams and qualify for their cutoff. The table below showcases theGECA admission 2024 eligibilityand selection criteria for BTech:CourseAccepted Entrance ExamSelection CriteriaBTechClass 12 with 45% aggregateMHT-CET score followed by counselling-JEE Main,CBSE 12, Maharashtra HSCThe university offers courses in full-time and part-time modes over 15 courses. Some of the popular programmes of GECA are BTech, MTech, and MCA among others. Furthermore, the university also offers PhD courses under the Electrical Engineering department.

faqs.question: Does Government College of Engineering accept JEE score?
faqs.answer: Yes, the Government College of Engineering accepts JEE Main scores for admission to its BTech programmes. Almost all government and some private institutions have now based their admission process on the JEE Main. It offers undergraduate, postgraduate and doctoral-level programmes such as BTech, MTech, MCA, and PhD under various disciplines. GECA admissions are also based on national-level entrance tests, like MHT-CET, GATE, MAH MCA CET, etc.

faqs.question: How can students get admission to Government College of Engineering, Aurangabad?
faqs.answer: Admissions for PG courses are based on GATE, MHTCET M.Tech results. GECA admissions are based on MHT CET exam results for UG courses and PG courses admissions are based on GATE exam results.

paragraphs: nbsp;The college has not released its 2023 placement details on the official website yet. However, 2022 placement details are available. CSE emerged as the top branch with an 80% placement rate.

faqs.question: How are M.Tech placements at Government College of Engineering?
faqs.answer: The scope of M.Tech courses in India is vast and varied. Placements with good profiles/packages can be achieved by doing M.Tech . The highest package of an M.Tech graduate is 28 LPA, the average was 6.70 LPA, the median was 5.5 LPA and the lowest was 3.5 LPA. The M.Tech placements at Government College of Engineering, Aurangabad, have been steadily improving over the years. The key highlights of Government College of Engineering Aurangabad placements 2022 are as follows: Number of students placed: 228 Placement rate (Overall): 48% Median Package INR 6.5 LPA (BTech) INR 5 LPA (MTech).

description: GECA Cutoff 2025 has been released for all rounds and categories for admission to MCA courses based on the MAH MCA CET exam. Students can also scroll down the page to know the cutoff of various other accepting exams. A few more exam-related updates are below:

During the Government College of Engineering, Aurangabad BTech 2023, B.E. in Computer Science Engineering became the most competitive specialisation. This year, the Round 1 and the Last Round closing scores for B.E. in Computer Science Engineering were 97.73 and 97.52, respectively for the General Home State category students.

GECA MHT CET cutoff 2023 has been concluded after the release of Round 3. The cutoff was released for multiple specialisations among which, B.E. in Computer Science Engineeringand B.E. in Information Technology became the most competitive specialisation. This conclusion was derived after considering their last round closing scores.

GECA MAH MCA CET Cutoff 2025 has been released for all rounds and categories for students belonging to the All India and Home State quota. According to the MAH MCA CET Cutoff 2025, the cutoff for MCA course admission ranged from 93.41 to 92.34 for the candidates belonging to the General HS category.
To know more cutoff information about other categories, rounds, and quotas, see the table below:

As per the MCA Cutoff 2025 for the General category candidates under the Home State quota, the cutoff in the last round of admission was 92.34, whereas, in 2024, admissions were closed at a percentile of 94.91, and in 2023, the last round cutoff was 84.63. This pattern over the years suggests that the competition for MCA admission is fluctuating over the past 3 years. reviews.review_heading: Our college has good infrastructure and a good campus.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is supportive. Wi-Fi facility is available in our college. Everything is good. The hostel has all the required facilities and has a good source of water. Our department is computer science, so the server is installed in our department as students need a higher internet speed for their work.

reviews.review_heading: Nice college with good placement and happy college life.
reviews.review_text: The facilities are sufficient to grow in our college. Classrooms are nice, with Wi-Fi and projectors available for learning, and they are big with good benches and stuff. The library and labs are very nice as they have a good amount of equipment and a large number of books available, and also nice infrastructure. But the hostel is not sufficient for boys. For them, it's the best hostel as it has all facilities available, but in the boys' hostel, there are limited facilities with limited seats, a...

reviews.review_heading: A college with good extracurricular activities.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is a bit old so it can be renovated. The condition of hostels is also not very good. They are old, as mentioned earlier. Library services are good. Mess food is also not very good. Basically, the canteen services were stopped by 2023, now they may be resumed. Sports and other extracurricular activities are promoted.

reviews.review_heading: The best college of Aurangabad.
reviews.review_text:
The facility and infrastructure available at Government engineering College of Aurangabad were decent. The Wi-Fi facility is not available in our hostel, labs and classrooms are very well maintained, and good infrastructure is provided in our college to students. 
The quality of the facility in my hostel is very good. The food are not available in hostel canteen; we have to join another mess from outside the college. Sports and game activities are very good at our college. There are different cr...

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and nature with greenery everywhere.
reviews.review_text: Average facilities: there is a big field for cricket and football, as well as basketball, volleyball and kabaddi. The infrastructure is also good and everywhere there is greenery. Every class contains a projector and smart TV for explanation.

reviews.review_heading: Good placement, company visits college, good faculty.
reviews.review_text: Hostels are available for ₹1600, with Wi-Fi provided. All classrooms have access to a library with special study arrangements. The campus is well-maintained, and the hostel has water coolers, free Wi-Fi, fans, and clean rooms and toilets. Security for the girls' hostel is high, and sports and NSS clubs are available.

reviews.review_heading: Placement officer is bad, placement is low.
reviews.review_text: The college provides Wi-Fi in classrooms and labs, but the library lacks Wi-Fi. Hostel rooms have LAN access, but there is no canteen facility. The rooms are not very clean but are acceptable for staying.

reviews.review_heading: Best experience and many lessons are learned here. GECA is an emotion.
reviews.review_text: The college's infrastructure is good, but it has become old over time, but maintenance is still done on a regular basis. No Wi-Fi, only internet is usable on computers. The library is very big, but MCA text books are not available sometimes. In the hostel, we have a water problem; they do not provide water. Mess food is of very poor quality. We have a big canteen but it has become old now.

reviews.review_heading: The college has great faculty, though facilities are average.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is average. All facilities are available at our college, including Wi-Fi. Computer labs are available, and classrooms are big and spacious. Hostel facilities are also available, with furnished accommodations and good food in the mess.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Government College Of Engineering, Aurangabad.
reviews.review_text: The college building is very old but it gets regular maintenance. Still, there are some issues with the infrastructure that need to be fixed. Our classrooms are good in the computer lab; all PCs have internet access. The hostel is very affordable; you do not get this kind of facility at these rates, but the food quality needs to improve.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the faculty and management.
reviews.review_text: Our college boasted an impressive infrastructure, with the management ensuring that all essential facilities were readily available to students. The campus was expansive, classrooms spacious, and the library and labs well-equipped. Additionally, the college provided hostel accommodation, with the mess serving delicious food.

reviews.review_heading: Best college for pursuing MCA.
reviews.review_text: As a government college, all kinds of facilities were available at our college. The college has a big and beautiful campus. The college campus has a canteen on it. The hostel facility was offered by the management. The college has computer labs that are properly operated. The food in the mess was good to eat.

reviews.review_heading: The best college that I needed.
reviews.review_text: The hostel building is not that good but the buildings for teaching are good we have different buildings for all branches and also a common classroom complex and gym ad library plus canteen, the canteen food is delicious. And sports facilities are also good.

reviews.review_heading: The college that wasn't my dream college but I am happy to be here.
reviews.review_text: We do have Wi-Fi facility but they are mostly reserved for the particular faculty and for educational purpose. We have a huge classroom complex, consisting various computer labs and training classes. The food in the canteen is awesome and timely doctor visits are organized by hostel faculty. And we have gymkhana for badminton and volly ball court and also basketball ground.

reviews.review_heading: Really good college and faculty.
reviews.review_text: The college has a library and Wi-Fi facilities for students to use for free. There are many labs for all the subjects and courses. The quality of hostel is not much good but the food is good. It has various grounds for cricket, badminton, volleyball and gym.

reviews_list.review_title: Strong placements, supportive faculty members, and excellent infrastructure for holistic growth.

review_content.Placements: In the past 2-3 years, Dhole Patil College of Engineering has shown impressive growth in placements. Top companies like Cognizant, L&T, Capgemini, and Infosys have actively recruited students, offering roles across IT and core engineering domains. The average package has steadily improved, with several students securing 4 LPA to 6 LPA. The college's dedicated training and placement cell conducts regular aptitude training, soft skills sessions, and mock interviews to prepare students effectively. New companies visiting the campus each year reflect the college's growing industry connections. Overall, DPCOE offers strong placement support and promising career opportunities for its engineering graduates.

reviews_list.review_title: I am dissatisfied with placements.

review_content.Placements: Placements are below average here. Packages are around 1.8 to 4 LPA, and only around 5-10% get placed in an average company. Placements are a joke in this college. Most of students seek off-campus placements over here. The college doesn't give it much priority. This college has very poor placements. Most of placements are from average companies, and packages are below average. Only 5-10% of students get placed here with below-average packages. Getting a good package from campus drive is very rare here.
review_content.Faculty: Teachers are average based on their knowledge, and teaching quality isn't that good. The curriculum is old and isn't relevant in today's market. There's no program to make students industry-ready. The semester exams are pretty difficult too, with a 50-60% passing.

review_summary.college_name: Dhole Patil College of Engineering Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Collectively, I can say that this college is the best in academics, infrastructure, placements, etc.

content.Placements: Nearby, 100% students are placed. The highest package is 14 LPA, the average package is 3 - 4.5 LPA, and the lowest package is 2.5 LPA. Wipro, Infotech, Accenture, etc., recruit. Internships via the Internshala platform in new start-ups and also in big companies to 70 - 80% students.
content.Infrastructure: Well-equipped labs, digital classrooms equipped with digital screens, libraries continuing the previous year's question papers, research papers, etc., are available for the Computer Engineering department. Mess and canteen make a variety of food available for students every day. Dhole Patil College of Engineering have quality infrastructure, fully developed medical facilities, and large grounds for sports and events.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Placements are not good, but we can develop our skills here and get an off-campus placement.

content.Placements: I think this college is not the best, but it is better. The percentage of students who got placed is around 40 percent. The highest package is around 10 LPA. Companies like TCS, etc., hire students for internships. The college is the best. In this college, we can do internships from the 1st year.
content.Infrastructure: Rooms in this college are good, and the other things are also, so I want to give 5 stars to these things in college. When I came to this college for the first time, the food in the mess was too good. I thought that I was new, so I loved it. However, over the last three months, I did not find any difference in the quality of the taste.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Information Technology - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Strong placements, supportive faculty members, and excellent infrastructure for holistic growth.

content.Placements: In the past 2-3 years, Dhole Patil College of Engineering has shown impressive growth in placements. Top companies like Cognizant, L&T, Capgemini, and Infosys have actively recruited students, offering roles across IT and core engineering domains. The average package has steadily improved, with several students securing 4 LPA to 6 LPA. The college's dedicated training and placement cell conducts regular aptitude training, soft skills sessions, and mock interviews to prepare students effectively. New companies visiting the campus each year reflect the college's growing industry connections. Overall, DPCOE offers strong placement support and promising career opportunities for its engineering graduates.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electronics and Telecommunication Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: I am dissatisfied with placements.

content.Placements: Placements are below average here. Packages are around 1.8 to 4 LPA, and only around 5-10% get placed in an average company. Placements are a joke in this college. Most of students seek off-campus placements over here. The college doesn't give it much priority. This college has very poor placements. Most of placements are from average companies, and packages are below average. Only 5-10% of students get placed here with below-average packages. Getting a good package from campus drive is very rare here.
content.Faculty: Teachers are average based on their knowledge, and teaching quality isn't that good. The curriculum is old and isn't relevant in today's market. There's no program to make students industry-ready. The semester exams are pretty difficult too, with a 50-60% passing.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electronics and Telecommunication Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: It has decent infrastructure and facilities. It should provide better placements.

content.Placements: I graduated in 2024 from the Electronics and Telecommunication Department at Dhole Patil College of Engineering. Around 60% of students from my course got placed. The highest package is 6 LPA, the lowest is 2 LPA, and the average package is 3 LPA. Major recruiters included IT and electronics. The top role offered is senior executive.
content.Infrastructure: The campus has Wi-Fi, but connectivity may vary across different areas. It has spacious classrooms with projectors and proper seating arrangements. There is a well-stocked library with textbooks, reference books, and journals related to electronics and telecommunication engineering. Hostel rooms are decent, with basic amenities like beds, tables, and cupboards. Maintenance can be improved. The college has grounds for cricket, football, and volleyball, along with indoor games like table tennis and chess.

admission_overview.college_name: Dhole Patil College of Engineering Course Admissions 2025: Fees, Eligibility, Dates & Selection Process

admission_process.title: Dhole Patil College of Engineering Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Dhole Patil College of Engineering admission 2025is a blend of merit and entrance basis. Also known asDPCOE, the college offers BTech, MTech and MBA courses in affiliation withSavitribai Phule Pune University. Students seeking admission to the UG and PG courses offered at the college must fulfil their eligibility requirements as per the admission guidelines. DPCOE admission is entrance-based. Students are admitted through scores of state/ national-level entrance exams such asMHT CET,JEE Main,MAT, etc., for respective courses. Given below is the detailed information about courses, eligibility, fees, and admission procedure of DPCOE:

DPCOE course admissionis primarily entrance-based. UG & PG courses are based on the entrance exam scores and candidates' past academic records. Students seeking to apply for the offered course must fulfil the admission criteria. Interested candidates can check out the following section for detailed eligibility criteria and the accepted entrance exam forDPCOE courses:

Dhole Patil College of Engineering feesinclude components such as tuition fees, security deposit, hostel fees, mess fees, etc. Candidates shall be able to pay the fee annually or semester-wise. The one-time charges, such as library security deposit, institute security deposit, grade card, and more have to be paid once at the time of admission. The following table showcasesDPCOE feesfor the offered courses:
Note:This information is sourced from the official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

Dhole Patil College of Engineering offers a limited number of seats for its programme. The seat intake may vary depending on the course and specialisation selected by the students. The following table showcases theDhole Patil College of Engineering seat intakefor its courses:
Note:This information is sourced from the official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.
The Dhole Patil College of Engineering admission process consists of multiple rounds. Check the detailed steps for DPCOE admission 2025 in the following section:

The DPCOE application process is conducted in an online mode. Candidates must apply online on the official website of the institute. The application form is available online for all the UG & PG courses at DPCOE.

Dhole Patil College of Engineering admission is entrance-based for UG & PG courses. The institute accepts scores of state/ national level entrance exams for Engineering and Management courses. Apart from this, candidates must also fulfil the minimum eligibility criteria for the respective courses. The BTech aspirants must also register and appear for CAP Counselling process.
After the completion of all the selection rounds, the selected candidates must pay an admission fee to confirm their seats.

faqs.answer: For admission to BTech course at Dhole Patil College of Engineering, candidates must fulfil the minimum eligibility criteria. faqs.question: What is the admission process for MBA at Dhole Patil College of Engineering?
faqs.answer: Dhole Patil College of Engineering admission to MBA course is based on entrance exam scores. Candidates are offered admission based on a valid score in either MAH CET/ MAT or CMAT entrance exam. Students must fulfil the minimum eligibility criteria and qualify for any one of the respective entrance exam to get admission to MBA at DPCOE.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission at Dhole Patil College of Engineering for MBA?
faqs.answer: No, direct admission is not possible for MBA at Dhole Patil College of Engineering. To get admitted to MBA course at Dhole Patil College of Engineering, candidates must qualify for either state-level MAH CET or national-level MAT or CMAT entrance exams. Admission to MBA at DPCOE is strictly based on scores of respective entrance exams. There is no other way out to get admission to this course.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for admission to MBA at Dhole Patil College of Engineering?
faqs.answer: The eligibility criteria for  MBA at Dhole Patil College of Engineering is that candidates willing to get admission to MBA at Dhole Patil College of Engineering must pass graduation with minimum 50% aggregate from a recognised university. There is a five percent relaxation for students belonging to ST/ SC/ OBC/ NT categories. These candidates must obtain minimum 45% aggregate in their final exam of graduation.

faqs.question: Is there any way of applying offline for the Dhole Patil College of Engineering- DPCOE application form?
faqs.answer: No, there is no offline method for applying to Dhole Patil College of Engineering. All candidates have to apply through the official website of the college. Post COVID years the application process has shifted entirely to online mode. Candidates can register on the official websites of the college, fill the online application forms, pay the course-wise application fee and appear for the exam to get admitted. faqs.question: What can students do after JEE Main session 2 result?
faqs.answer: After JEE session 2 is completed, only those candidates who are aiming for IITs need to start preparing for JEE Advanced after clearing JEE Main. Those who are above the 98th percentile should start preparing for JEE Advanced as soon as possible. Those below this, between the 95th and 98th percentile, should focus on attempting more mock tests and previous year question papers so that they have a better chance of clearing JEE Advanced

placement_report.college_name: Dhole Patil College of Engineering Placement & Salary Insights

placement_data.title: Dhole Patil College of Engineering Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: According to Dhole Patil College of Engineering NIRF report 2024, the median package offered during Dhole Patil College of Engineering BTech and MTech placements 2023 stood at INR 3 LPA and INR 4 LPA , respectively. The institute has concluded its placement process for the batch passing out in 2023. As per the latest report, the highest package offered during Dhole Patil College of Engineering placements 2023 stood at INR 7 LPA . Further, the participating recruiters presented a total of 149 job offers to the students of the batch 2023. The top recruiters of Dhole Patil College of Engineering in 2023 included TCS, Airtel, Maveric Systems, Hatchway Windoors, ZF Steering Gears, Q Connect, Sky Eagle Constructions, Reliance, etc .

faqs.question: How are B Tech placements at Dhole Patil College of Engineering- DPCOE?
faqs.answer: Dhole Patil College of Engineering has a good record of placements. During the 2023 placements, the participating recruiters offered a total 149 placement offers to the students. The highest package they received stood at INR 7 LPA. In 2022 the highest salary offered was around INR 14 LPA.The top recruiters of Dhole Patil College of Engineering in 2023 included TCS, Airtel, Maveric Systems, Hatchway Windoors, ZF Steering Gears, Q Connect, Sky Eagle Constructions, Reliance, etc... The college also offers students placement and training opportunities year-round through its Training & Placement (T&P) Cell.

faqs.question: Does Dhole Patil College of Engineering- DPCOE have good placements?
faqs.answer: Dhole Patil College of Engineering has a good record of placements. During the 2023 placements, the participating recruiters offered a total 149 placement offers to the students. The highest package they received stood at INR 7 LPA while in year 2022 it stood at INR 14 lpa. Many different companies visit the campus for providing placements to the studnts which includes some big companies like Airtel and Hatchway. The college provides placement to almost all its students so yes the placement is good at DPCOE.

faqs.question: How many companies participated in Dhole Patil College of Engineering placements 2023?
faqs.answer: In 2023, 74 recruiters participated in Dhole Patil College of Engineering's (DPCOE) placement drive. The highest CTC and average CTC bagged by the students in 2022 was INR 13.50LPA and INR 3.60LPA respectively Some of the companies that participated in DPCOE's 2023 placements include Infosys, Wipro, IBM, Cognizant, Vodafone, HCL Technologies, Amazon, MphasiS. Other top recruiters in 2023 include TCS, Airtel, Maveric Systems, Hatchway Windoors, ZF Steering Gears, Q Connect, Sky Eagle Constructions, and Reliance. In addition you can read the college reviews from our website to learn more

Considering the lowest cutoff rank of 183826, B.E. in Computer Engineering turned out to be the most competitive branch for admission. In the first round, the cutoff rank for the same branch was 171460.
Considering the JEE Main last round cutoff 2025 for the General AI category students, the top most competitive course for admission was B.E. / B.Tech, with a cutoff rank closing at 183826.

For the General category, the Dhole Patil College of Engineering B.E. / B.Tech cutoff 2025 ranged between 76.77 and 87.3, with the most sought-after branch for admission being Computer Science, which had the highest cutoff percentile of 87.3. Considering the last round cutoff data of 2025, Computer Science turned out to be the most competitive for admission, with a cutoff closing at 87.3. For the same competitive branch, the last round cutoff was 86.27 in the General category under the HS quota.

Admissions at Dhole Patil College of Engineering for B.E. / B.Tech are done on the basis of MHT CET percentiles. For the next academic session, students can find out more about the MHT CET 2026 important dates in the table below:

reviews.review_heading: Collectively, I can say that this college is the best in academics, infrastructure, placements, etc.
reviews.review_text: Well-equipped labs, digital classrooms equipped with digital screens, libraries continuing the previous year's question papers, research papers, etc., are available for the Computer Engineering department. Mess and canteen make a variety of food available for students every day. Dhole Patil College of Engineering have quality infrastructure, fully developed medical facilities, and large grounds for sports and events.

reviews.review_heading: Placements are not good, but we can develop our skills here and get an off-campus placement.
reviews.review_text: Rooms in this college are good, and the other things are also, so I want to give 5 stars to these things in college. When I came to this college for the first time, the food in the mess was too good. I thought that I was new, so I loved it. However, over the last three months, I did not find any difference in the quality of the taste.

reviews.review_heading: Strong placements, supportive faculty members, and excellent infrastructure for holistic growth.
reviews.review_text: DPCOE offers a well-maintained campus with smart classrooms, modern labs, a central library, and high-speed Wi-Fi. Facilities are available like seminar halls, a startup incubation center, sports grounds, and a gym that support overall student development. Campus is clean, green, and conducive to learning. Hostels are safe and comfortable, with separate accommodation for boys and girls. Rooms are furnished, and mess facilities provide hygienic food. Security is available 24X7, and common areas s...

reviews.review_heading: I am dissatisfied with placements.
reviews.review_text: Placements are below average here. Packages are around 1.8 to 4 LPA, and only around 5-10% get placed in an average company. Placements are a joke in this college. Most of students seek off-campus placements over here. The college doesn't give it much priority. This college has very poor placements. Most of placements are from average companies, and packages are below average. Only 5-10% of students get placed here with below-average packages. Getting a good package from campus drive is very rar...

reviews.review_heading: It has decent infrastructure and facilities. It should provide better placements.
reviews.review_text: The campus has Wi-Fi, but connectivity may vary across different areas. It has spacious classrooms with projectors and proper seating arrangements. There is a well-stocked library with textbooks, reference books, and journals related to electronics and telecommunication engineering. Hostel rooms are decent, with basic amenities like beds, tables, and cupboards. Maintenance can be improved. The college has grounds for cricket, football, and volleyball, along with indoor games like table tennis an...

reviews.review_heading: Your college review and respond.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the hostel is very big. There is a good ground. It is very big for playing cricket. Classrooms are also very big. Wi-Fi and smartboards are there in the classroom. The library is big. Many categories of books are present. The quality of the hostel facility is almost good. The food is very tasty.

reviews.review_heading: Life in DPCOE as a student.
reviews.review_text: Big campus with a great library, gym, and grounds for football, badminton, basketball, and volleyball. Overall, pretty good campus area and classrooms, with one smart classroom available for each department at least. A hostel is available, great accommodation, but the food is average. The college canteen is also present but not so many options and average pricing. Hostel fees are around 1 lakh per year.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely fine college for the average student who has got nearly 80 to 85 percentile in CET.
reviews.review_text: The faculty of the college is very supportive to students. They pay attention to every student in the college. I am not a hostel boy, but I am local, therefore I know about the college hostel. The hostel is also nice and clean. The food in the hostel is healthy. And the canteens are also clean.

reviews.review_heading: The meals served are good.
reviews.review_text: Above average, excellent for sports, best sports activities, average Wi-Fi, decent food. Nice library with a digital library option available. The infrastructure is good with a variety of food options in the canteen. There are projectors in every classroom, and computer labs are equipped with LAN connections and average PCs with moderate performance. Classrooms are peaceful with minimal outside noise.

reviews.review_heading: Excellent choice for students seeking a comprehensive engineering education.
reviews.review_text: The hostel of the college is located within the campus, with a capacity of 250 students. All facilities are available, including a mess, and Wi-Fi is enabled on campus. This college is moving towards a lavish infrastructure to provide for students. It also provides a bus facility.

reviews.review_heading: My experience at Dhole Patil College of Engineering.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good with a variety of food options in the canteen. There are projectors in every classroom, and computer labs are equipped with LAN connections and average PCs with moderate performance. Classrooms are peaceful with minimal outside noise.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the college facilities and the encouragement. I highly recommend this college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is well maintained and all the facilities are provided. We have football courts, basketball courts, a tennis court, a library, a canteen, and all other facilities provided in our college. There are also medical drives conducted and medical facilities can be available.

reviews.review_heading: Best college and supportive staff to encourage students for various educational events.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is remarkable; they have continuously upgraded their infrastructure to suit the needs of education. Ganesh Temple marks the culture of college. They have a big library to accommodate the maximum number of students; the hostel is clean and near the college, which eliminates the need to travel.

reviews.review_heading: College with Green Campus, Infrastructure, Good Faculty and Great Placement.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi facilities are available in our college. Hostel rooms are good, and the meals served are tasty and healthy. Sports and games are an important part of hostel life. The college has 2 basketball courts, 1 football court, and 1 pickleball court.

reviews.review_heading: It is an average college with good teaching faculty.
reviews.review_text: The facilities in the college hostel are average; Wi-Fi is provided, the hostel is nearby the college so we can use libraries of college quality facilities in the hostel. The average quality of food is also acceptable (eatable), like every other college. The quality of the mess is also very good.

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about Dhole Patil College of Engineering

likes.text: Many companies like Wipro, Tata, Infosys, and Byjus visit to hire students.
The college provides good placement depending on students' grades and skills.

The whole campus is enabled with the Wi-Fi facility, classrooms, various labs, library, lift(only for officials), cool and purified water, hostel, canteen, xerox centre, etc.

The college always helps students with training and placement activities like guest lectures, seminars, and aptitude test practise, among many more.

overview_faqs.answer: There are multiple components included in fees for JIS University DPharm, such as tuition fee, caution money, etc. Candidates have to pay some amount of total fee after selection to lock their seat. The university has the right to revise its fee structure in an academic year.Following table mentions JIS University DPharm tuition fee amount:CourseTotal Tuition FeeDPharmINR 1.7 lakhNOTE: The mentioned fee is as per the official website/sanctioning body. overview_faqs.question: What is the fee for BMLT at JIS University?
overview_faqs.answer: For the final admission to a UG course of BMLT, students are required to pay the fee at the time of admission. The total fee for a three-year BMLT course at JIS University is INR 2.46 lakh. This fee is applicable for all three years of the course and contains other components that students need to pay at the time of admission. This course fee is calculated based on the semester-wise fee break up for the BMLT given in a fee notification on the official website for the year 2021-22. There is an application fee that needs to be paid at the time of filling the application form.

overview_faqs.question: Is JIS University good for MBA? Is it worth joining?
overview_faqs.answer: JIS University has concluded its placement drive for the batch passing out in 2023 with 50.79% placements rate. As per the latest report, the the highest and average package offered during JIS University placements 2023 stood at INR 7 LPA and INR 4.5 LPA, respectively. The top recruiters of JIS University in 2023 included Wipro, TCS, Outlook Group, Paytm, Alstom Transport Solutions, Mphasis, Cognizant, Tech Mahindra, Cipla, Pantaloon, Nestle, Dabur, NRS Medical College, Sagar Dutta Medical College and Hospital, Cafe Coffee Day, etc. Disclaimer: The stats mentioned above is the overall placement stats. Hence, it is not course-specific.

overview_faqs.question: Does JIS University provide admission on partial fee payment for BBA programme?
overview_faqs.answer: Yes, the university offer seat confirmation on payment of part payment. The full payment has to be paid on the deadline given by the university. It is mentioned in the selection letter. JIS University BBA seat intake is 120 as per the official website/sanctioning body. It is still subject to changes and hence, is indicative. It must be noted that the university reserves the right to revise the seat count.

review_summary.college_name: JIS University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Review of my great JIS University.

content.Placements: 65 percent of students got placed from my course in the previous year, who were our seniors. The highest package is 6 LPA, the lowest is 3.4 LPA, and the overall average package is 4.5 LPA in my course. Various companies offered placements from our college. Almost 65 percent of students got internships at my university.
content.Infrastructure: JIS University has modern facilities and well-structured infrastructure to support quality education and the holistic development of students. The hostel facilities are comfortable, with clean rooms, adequate water supply, and common areas for students. The mess and canteen offer a variety of food options maintaining both quality and hygiene. Medical facilities are available within the campus, ensuring timely healthcare support for students.

individual_reviews.course: BBA- LLB - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: The best law university in Kolkata.

content.Placements: In the legal field, there is no concept of placement like the management or B.Tech course. But, still, the university provides the placements and internship facilities on its part. Students get placement from this, not only that, the university provides corporate-based companies for their placement.
content.Infrastructure: Every facility is good. The students get free Wi-Fi access throughout the university. The books are available properly. The classrooms are enough according to the student ratio. The canteen and hostel facilities should be improved.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Review of JIS University.

content.Placements: Every stream is there. The highest package is 24 LPA, and the lowest is around or above 5 LPA. Top recruiters are Amazon, TCS, Cabgimini, etc. There are many companies to get an internship, not just one. There are many chances to take this course. If you want to take a high-level job, then you can take this course.
content.Infrastructure: There are particular classrooms for each section and department, and Wi-Fi is also available. A library is also available. If you want to read a book, then go to the library and sit silently. 2 time the price and twice the tiffin is available there. In the morning, they give tiffin, and also in the evening.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Review of JIS University.

content.Placements: Our JIS University is specially for pharmacy students because mostly 99% get placement. In B.Tech, the placements are very lower than in pharmacy most likely 35%. There are many companies referred for placement. Average package most likely 2 LPA - 3 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has its own Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and a separate library for separate courses. Wi-Fi is available for faculty and students also. There are separate lifts for teachers and students. At first the hostel of JIS is not so good but now the hostel of JIS University is very good. There is also a separate Wi-Fi system in all the rooms. But JIS University does not have its own playground.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Satisfied, great placement assistance, qualified faculty, best infrastructure, and superb college.

content.Placements: 60% students got placed, and 35% opted for higher studies. As far as my knowledge goes, the highest package offered is of 26.5 LPA, and 2.5 LPA is the lowest package offered. The average package offered is 4.5 to 6.5 LPA. Top recruiters include TCS, Gamut, Ericsson, LTI Mindtree, Cognizant, IBM, EY, Wipro, Amazon, etc., 60% or more in Prodigy InfoTech, Pinnacle Labs, Cod soft, Prasar net, etc. Graduate Trainee, AO Associate Engineer, Programmer Analyst Trainee. Etc.
content.Infrastructure: One of the best infrastructures in eastern India. Computer Lab with all Apple PC, and 6 more labs with high-end PCs (Intel I5). Wi-Fi throughout campus (Speed 200 Kbps - 1.2 Mbps). There are more than 100 routers on the 10th floor. 3 gallery style AC classrooms and others are non AC. So good that Tollywood Mega Star JEETs film RAVAN was filmed, and also other small web series and podcasts were done. Library is good, and books are available. Hostel and Food are average.

admission_overview.college_name: JIS University Course Admissions 2025: Fees, Eligibility & Selection Process

admission_process.title: JIS University Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: JIS University admissionsare open for the 2025 session. The university offers various courses such as BTech, BPharma, MBA, PhD etc at the UG, PG and PhD level. Apart from the UG and PG courses the university also offers three diploma courses,i.e., diploma in Hotel Management, diploma in Food Production and Bakery and diploma in Fodd and Beverages services.JIS Universitycourse admissions selection criteria are entirely based on the university-level entrance exam called JIS University entrance test JET-2025 for UG and PG courses. This is to note that, the aptitude test followed by GD/personal interview will be practised for every course admission at JIS University.

The application process atJIS Universityis an online procedure. The deadline for submission of online application form for PhD courses usually ends in December (tentative). The PhD courses are offered in full-time and part-time. Read the following article to know more aboutJIS University course admission2025.

JIS Agarpara admissionsto all the courses are based on the entrance exam for UG and PG courses. The university also offers BTech CSE and BPharma Lateral Entry courses. The admission criteria for PhD courses are based on JISU-RET -research entrance exam (offline exam). Along with that, candidates must also fulfil the minimum eligibility requirements of the respective courses. The following table mentions the eligibility and selection for some of the popularJIS University courses:
Class 12 with 60% aggregate with Physics, Chemistry as compulsory subjects
Class 12 with 50% aggregate from a recognised Central/ State Board or its equivalent
Class 12 with 60% aggregate with PCM/PCB/PCMB/ Agriculture
Class 12 with 60% aggregate and Physics and Maths should be the compulsory subjects

JIS University admission process includes university level-entrance base exam registration, GD andpersonal interviewfor admission confirmation. Candidates must follow the below steps to get a seat inJIS University course admission:
Candidates are required to apply online on the official website of the institute for UG and PG courses. JIS University's PhD online application portal usually begins in December.

The university shortlists candidates based on the JET +GD/PI. The admission criteria for PhD courses are based on the JISU-RET -research entrance exam (offline exam). It is always desirable and helps prospective students and their parents to evaluate the benefits and plans being offered for future education.

Once selection rounds are over, the university releases a merit list. Shortlisted aspirants need to come for document verification and pay theJIS University feeto confirm their seats in the university.

faqs.answer: There is a huge department of DPharm holders in pharmaceutical companies/industry. The Diploma holders can apply for jobs in different profiles. reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is always available in college. The hostel is good, but it's off campus. The food is good for health. In college, so many events and sports are conducted by the college. A district-level playing chance is also available.

reviews.review_heading: Our college environment is very student-friendly.
reviews.review_text: There are high-tech labs and classrooms with a projector. Many professors do not use digital screens or a projector. The food quality of the mess is average, and it has many options.

reviews.review_heading: Good campus life and beautiful vibe.
reviews.review_text: The quality of the labs is good. The library is good, but the classes are not that good.   Some classes have AC, but the maximum classes have a fan, and not all students can sit on chairs that are available on some days. All floors are cleaned all the time, and all types of sports events are included.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by JIS School of Medical Science and Research, JIS UniversityReviewed on 29 Jul 2025)
reviews.review_heading: New college with good facilities, but needs better clinical integration.
reviews.review_text: A central library with medical textbooks, national and international journals, and e-journals is present. Wi-Fi is available. Two well-structured lecture theaters with smart classrooms are present. Subject-wise labs and a dissection hall are present with individual demonstration rooms. Subject-wise departmental libraries are also present. Two fully furnished AC/non-AC hostels are present (one for boys and one for girls). Every room has an attached bathroom. Common rooms and indoor games rooms ar...

reviews.review_heading: It is regrettable to take admission in JIS University.
reviews.review_text: It claims that it has Wi-Fi and classrooms. It will not provide students with Wi-Fi in reality. Laboratories do not have essential equipment, which is required for learning technology and practicals. Studying at JIS in the BMLT course is totally worthless. But the hostel is okay to stay in, and seniors are also friendly to enjoy college life. JIS is the best option, but not for a career.

reviews.review_heading: JIS University is very good for your future. Placement records are great.
reviews.review_text: Food in the hostel is available. We have a big ground in front of our university. The university hostel is clean and clear. The hostel is 5 minutes from our university. You get 3 meals every day, and the university also has its canteen where you can get delicious food.

reviews.review_heading: Review of JIS University.
reviews.review_text: The college offers a separate hostel facility for boys and girls. Nutritious food is served in a centrally located mess. The hostel fee is Rs. 4500/- per month payable quarterly and the one-time admission fee is Rs. 5000/.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, the college is very good.
reviews.review_text: The Computer Science and Engineering department is well-equipped with modern infrastructure. To support both academic and research activities. The department and the entire campus have Wi-Fi with high-speed internet access, available to both students and faculty. There are multiple well-maintained computer labs with updated systems and licensed software such as Visual Studio, MATLAB, and Eclipse. Labs support programming, data structures, AI, ML, and networking practicals. Classrooms are spaciou...

data.description: Yes, the candidates are required to take the JIS University Entrance Test (JET) for admission to the DPharm course. The selection in the diploma course is done based on the entrance score. Apart from this, aspirants must also be Class 12 pass with at least 60% aggregate with Physics and Chemistry as compulsory subjects, and Maths/Biology as third subject. To know about direct admissions, aspirants shall contact the admission office of the university.

Alumni support junior in hitting placed in our college, Also in the end of the course they gave u a placement tranning include interview process for better future companies.

paragraphs: JIS University offers course-wise scholarships, JIS Alumni Scholarship for Group Institutions and BTech Lateral Scholarship Scheme for the state of Tripura. A maximum of 100% scholarship is offered on the tuition fee. The students are offered JIS University scholarships based on their academic merit.
The university offers scholarships for BTech, MBA, BBA, LLB and other courses.
Download: JIS University Course-Wise Scholarships for more details

The university will provide BTech Lateral Scholarship Scheme to students getting admission in BTech (LE) course and belonging to the state of Tripura. Check below the highlights of the BTech Lateral Scholarship Scheme:
Candidate must be a resident of state of Tripura with a valid Aadhaar Card
Candidate must secure minimum requisite qualification for admission in BTech Lateral course
Note: To continue availing of the existing scholarship, the student must not have any year lag.
Apart from course-wise scholarships, the university also offers Alumni Scholarships. Check below the details:
The university offers a 20% alumni scholarship on tuition fees to students. Check below the criteria to apply for the scholarship:

Scholarship criteria: A degree/diploma course from any of the institutions under JIS Group and admission in a second degree course in any of the institutions under JIS Group including JIS University from the academic year 2020-21 onwards (BBA to MBA, BSc to MSc/ MBA, BTech to MBA or if any) is required.
Note: A student can avail any one kind of scholarship and will not be able to combine one scholarship with other.

A scholarship of INR 10,000 per semester is applicable only to the students who have studied their three years Diploma in Engineering in any of the institutions under the JIS Group. Students get a total scholarship of INR 60,000.
Disclaimer: The scholarship stats mentioned in the above page are obtained from the official website and are subject to change.
tables: INR 7,000 each (semester 1 and semester 2) INR 6,500 each (semester 5 to semester 8)

college_info.intro:
Alliance University courses are offered at various levels and through its various constituent schools. The University has more than 10 schools and offers programmes at UG, PG, and PhD levels through them. Some of the most popular Alliance University schools are Alliance School of Business, Alliance School of Engineering and Design, Alliance School of Law, Alliance Ascent College, etc.
Alliance University popular programmes are BTech, MBA, and BA LLB. The university offers these programmes in full-time mode and strives to provide comprehensive learning to students. Further, some of the most popular specialisations offered in the Alliance University BTech programme are given below:
Apart from this, the university also offers a 2-year MBA programme at the PG level. Alliance University MBA programme includes industry interactions, case study analysis, group presentations, field projects, and company visits to develop the practical skills of the students. Candidates can check the Alliance University Bangalore popular programmes in the table given below:

Students are expected to reach out to companies themselves

Loved in first year but not in later years

reviews_list.review_title: Everything here is well .

review_content.Placements: 25% to 50% students were placed LG, deloitte, dell Many internships Software developed, devops engineer Sales company also student were placed As per my knowledge my seniors are getting placed in good companies if you have skills you will be selected many companies visit our college to hire .
review_content.Infrastructure: The college provides very good and clean facilities. The hostel has many rooms, which are available in 1, 2, 3, and 4 sharing options. The food quality is not too bad; every day we have a variety of veg and non-veg. Overall, the food is manageable. The food facility in my college is good because we have many options, and once a day we will get non-veg, maybe at lunch or dinner. There will be food fest stuff, overall good.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (AI and Future Technologies) (Kalvium) - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Satisfied with the college and the campus.

review_content.Placements: About 85 percent students got placed and the top companies are like IBM, Urban Company.
review_content.Infrastructure: College life is very good. Campus is full of greenery and the campus is very beautiful. The hostel facilities are also good. Labs are well-equipped. Rooms are cleaned every week. Mess is also good here, they provide good food 4 times a day.
review_content.Faculty: Faculty members are good here and they are ready for one-on-one doubt discussion. They provide proper support. Exam papers are of good level. It provides all tests for all concepts covered.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Law (LL.B) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: It's a great college overall.

review_content.Placements: The placement cell is really good, as long as the students cooperate with the college and the placement cell. On record, the highest paid salary is 60 LPA. I know one of my seniors who is getting paid 80 LPA also. It completely depends on merit. EY is one of the top recruiting companies. They provide different ways to engage students in placement. If the student shows interest. Right now, I am going through a corporate mentorship where one of the top directors of a company comes to guide me and explain how vast my scope is.
review_content.Infrastructure: It's a green campus. Obviously, it's very calm and beautiful to be around. You get to see students from all over the world. The food is top-notch. They provide South Indian and North Indian food for the students. Non-veg food is provided almost every day.
