individual_reviews.title: Great university with vibrant campus life.

content.Placements: There is a dedicated team for it who help the student throughout internships and placement. Almost everyone gets the placement if they are eligible and want to go for it. It all depends on how well students perform and are capable of cracking it.
content.Infrastructure: It has one of the best infrastructures, well maintained and student centric campus with well organized classrooms, AC, Wi-Fi, library, labsbloomberg terminals, study rooms, cafes, inside the campus, ending machines. Hostels are available for both boys and girls, single, double, triple and all kinds of rooms are available. Seminars, workshops, industrial visits, and events are conducted to keep students engaged and enhance their learning and also have different types of clubs.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (IOT) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: It offers a good learning environment and strong placements.

content.Placements: The highest package offered is 60 LPA. The lowest package is from 3-4 LPA. The average package offered is 8 LPA. The top recruiting companies for our course are Amazon, Deloitte, KPMG, and Accenture. Many students also get internships in firms like IBM, HDFC Bank, and TCS, mainly in analyst, IT, finance, and consulting roles.
content.Infrastructure: Our course has good Wi-Fi, smart classrooms, updated labs, and a big library. Hostel rooms are clean, and the mess food is decent. Sports areas, a gym, and medical help are always available, which makes the campus overall comfortable. There is greenery in the hostel.

individual_reviews.course: B TECH IN COMPUTER SCIENCE AND ENGINEERING - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Everything here is well .

content.Placements: 25% to 50% students were placed LG, deloitte, dell Many internships Software developed, devops engineer Sales company also student were placed As per my knowledge my seniors are getting placed in good companies if you have skills you will be selected many companies visit our college to hire .
content.Infrastructure: The college provides very good and clean facilities. The hostel has many rooms, which are available in 1, 2, 3, and 4 sharing options. The food quality is not too bad; every day we have a variety of veg and non-veg. Overall, the food is manageable. The food facility in my college is good because we have many options, and once a day we will get non-veg, maybe at lunch or dinner. There will be food fest stuff, overall good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (AI and Future Technologies) (Kalvium) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Satisfied with the college and the campus.

content.Placements: About 85 percent students got placed and the top companies are like IBM, Urban Company.
content.Infrastructure: College life is very good. Campus is full of greenery and the campus is very beautiful. The hostel facilities are also good. Labs are well-equipped. Rooms are cleaned every week. Mess is also good here, they provide good food 4 times a day.
content.Faculty: Faculty members are good here and they are ready for one-on-one doubt discussion. They provide proper support. Exam papers are of good level. It provides all tests for all concepts covered.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Law (LL.B) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: It's a great college overall.

content.Placements: The placement cell is really good, as long as the students cooperate with the college and the placement cell. On record, the highest paid salary is 60 LPA. I know one of my seniors who is getting paid 80 LPA also. It completely depends on merit. EY is one of the top recruiting companies. They provide different ways to engage students in placement. If the student shows interest. Right now, I am going through a corporate mentorship where one of the top directors of a company comes to guide me and explain how vast my scope is.
content.Infrastructure: It's a green campus. Obviously, it's very calm and beautiful to be around. You get to see students from all over the world. The food is top-notch. They provide South Indian and North Indian food for the students. Non-veg food is provided almost every day.

admission_overview.college_name: Alliance University Course Admissions 2026 (Open): Registration, Fees & Selection Criteria

admission_overview.title: Alliance University Admission Overview 2026
admission_overview.description: The university provides UG and PG programs across streans, namely Management, Engineering, Commerce, Law and more. The university offers more than 20 courses. The admission process at Alliance University is a mix of merit-based and entrance exams for various courses such as BTech, MBA etc. Further, factors such as overall profile, academic background, work experience, entrance exam score, versatility, and achievements are also considered for the final selection of the applicant. Alliance University Bangalore admission 2026 is entrance-based for most of the courses. Alliance University accepts national-level entrance exams and conducts AUSAT, Alliance AMAT and ARAT to select candidates for a few courses. The university offers more than 20 courses through various schools at UG, PG and doctoral levels in multiple streams like Engineering, Management, Commerce, etc.

eligibility_selection.title: Alliance University Eligibility & Selection 2026
eligibility_selection.description: Alliance University Bangalore offers courses in Engineering, Management, Accounting and Commerce, Science etc. Students seeking admission must meet the course-specific eligibility and selection conditions. Moreover, candidates who are looking for PhD admission need to sit and appear for the Alliance Research Aptitude Test + PI + evaluation of the research synopsis on the proposed dissertation work. Other scholastic and extracurricular records and work experience will be taken into account. admission_process.title: Alliance University Bangalore Admission Process 2026

paragraphs: The admission process includes the application process, selection round, cutoff, merit list or counselling, and other steps. Check below the Alliance University admission process:

The mode of application is online for all courses (apply.alliance.edu.in). Candidates must pay an application fee of INR 1,000 to apply for admission. Once the candidate completes the payment, aspirants will receive a notification email acknowledging the payment.

The applicant will have to select a date for their Alliance Selection process (A full-day immersion where students will solve real-life problems and be evaluated by a panel on their overall performance. It is designed to help and appreciate the candidature better and also provide a glimpse of the innovative approach to evaluation, teaching and learning.)

Once the Alliance Selection Process is completed, the Admissions team will evaluate every profile and results will be declared on the same day. Students can either be Selected, Waitlisted or Rejected*.
*Rejected students cannot apply to the same program in the same year.
Step 2.1: Alliance University PhD Admission Process

Candidates must sit and appear for the Alliance Research Aptitude Test for PhD course admissions. The application fee is INR 3,000. Once the candidates qualify for the entrance exam, they further need to sit for a personal interview + evaluation of the research synopsis on proposed dissertation work and other parameters such as scholastic and extracurricular records and work experience are used for admission. The final selection of the candidate will be based on the overall performance in the admission selection process.

All applications are reviewed by the selection committee. Candidates are evaluated based on the candidate’s performance in the national entrance exam or Alliance entrance exam, academic performance through school and college and their involvement in extra-curricular activities and the performance in various aspects on the selection day.

faqs.question: How can I get admission in Alliance University Bangalore?
faqs.answer: A pass in bachelor’s degree or equivalent with 50% aggregate (45% in case of SC/ ST candidates) is required to apply for the MBA course. Aspirants must hold the documents proving their eligibility for verification at later stages of admission. Apart from fulfiling the qualifications, candidates also need to pass MAT,  CAT,  Alliance-MAT,  XAT,  NMAT,  CMAT,  KMAT or GMAT for admission to MBA course followed by Oral Extempore Presentation and personal interview. The school also considers the academic performance of the aspirants for providing admission.

faqs.question: Can I get into Alliance University with 60% in class 12?
faqs.answer: Applicants looking for admissions through COMEDK exam need to have at least 50% aggregate marks in Physics, Chemistry & Mathematics (45% for SC, ST and OBC candidates of Karnataka) as compulsory subjects and at least 50% marks in aggregate of the 10+2 level examination (45% for SC, ST and OBC candidates of Karnataka) or passed 10+3 Diploma examination with Mathematics as compulsory subject with at least 50% marks in aggregate (45% for SC, ST and OBC candidates of Karnataka) and should have passed these subjects individually.

description: Alliance University, Bangalore cutoff 2025 is available on this page for admission to several UG & PG courses. Candidates can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the course, exam, round and category-wise cutoff details. Further exam-related updates are below:

Alliance University, Bangalore Karnataka PGCET cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final cutoff list. For admission to the MBA/PGDM course, the last round cutoff rank was 26690 in the General AI category. For the HS quota, the last round cutoff for the same course stood at 10317 in the General category. Comparing both the quotas, it is clear that the cutoff rank was less competitive for admission to the General AI category students as compared to the HS quota.

Karnataka PGCET is the accepting exam for MBA/PGDM admission at Alliance University, Bangalore. In 2025, the last round cutoff for MBA/PGDM admission was 26690 in the General category under the AI quota. In 2024, the cutoff rank for the same course was 11560.
For more categories, rounds, and quotas, candidates can use the provided filters to view the cutoffs.
Candidates preparing for 2026 admission can refer to the table below to view some of the important dates related to Karnataka PGCET 2026.

Alliance University, Bangalore accepts Karnataka PGCET entrance exam scores for admission to the MBA/PGDM courses. Candidates can refer to the table below to check out the consolidated year-wise Karnataka PGCET cutoff lists.

As per the KCET last-round cutoff 2025 for B.E. / B.Tech admission, B TECH IN ARTIFICIAL INTELLIGENCE AND MACHINE LEARNING has the lowest cutoff rank of 26742 for the General AI quota. The lower cutoff rank indicates strong competition for admission.
For other categories, rounds and quotas, use the filter options below:

According to the Alliance University, Bangalore B.E. / B.Tech Cutoff 2025, the closing rank for B.Tech. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering stood at 61682 among the students belonging to the General AI quota.

For the HS quota, the cutoff rank for the same specialisation was 39198. Comparing both the quotas, the last round cutoff rank for General AI category students was less competitive for admission than the HS quota students.

hostel_campus.college_name: Alliance University Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: Great university with vibrant campus life.
reviews.review_text: It has one of the best infrastructures, well maintained and student centric campus with well organized classrooms, AC, Wi-Fi, library, labsbloomberg terminals, study rooms, cafes, inside the campus, ending machines. Hostels are available for both boys and girls, single, double, triple and all kinds of rooms are available. Seminars, workshops, industrial visits, and events are conducted to keep students engaged and enhance their learning and also have different types of clubs.

reviews.review_heading: It offers a good learning environment and strong placements.
reviews.review_text: Our course has good Wi-Fi, smart classrooms, updated labs, and a big library. Hostel rooms are clean, and the mess food is decent. Sports areas, a gym, and medical help are always available, which makes the campus overall comfortable. There is greenery in the hostel.

reviews.review_heading:
Everything here is well 
.
reviews.review_text: The college provides very good and clean facilities. The hostel has many rooms, which are available in 1, 2, 3, and 4 sharing options. The food quality is not too bad; every day we have a variety of veg and non-veg. Overall, the food is manageable. The food facility in my college is good because we have many options, and once a day we will get non-veg, maybe at lunch or dinner. There will be food fest stuff, overall good.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the college and the campus.
reviews.review_text: College life is very good. Campus is full of greenery and the campus is very beautiful. The hostel facilities are also good. Labs are well-equipped. Rooms are cleaned every week. Mess is also good here, they provide good food 4 times a day.

reviews.review_heading: It's a great college overall.
reviews.review_text: It's a green campus. Obviously, it's very calm and beautiful to be around. You get to see students from all over the world. The food is top-notch. They provide South Indian and North Indian food for the students. Non-veg food is provided almost every day.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied because of the faculty, good placements, really good infrastructure, and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is so good, the college is filled with greenery, and there are facilities of CCTV, Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and a library. The quality of facilities in the hostel includes food and laundry facilities as well. Food quality is so good available in the mess and canteen. There is always a doctor available for medical purposes, and also there are different grounds and coaches available for games and sports, including all the facilities. The college also has a gymnasium, Zumba, and ...

reviews.review_heading: Alliance University, Bangalore.
reviews.review_text: College adds proper meals to the food menu of students, especially those studying in the hostels. They take too much care about the physical and mental health of the students. College also adds other physical activities like sports, library hours, and yoga classes to help relieve their stress.

reviews.review_heading: Alliance University B.Tech, is it absolutely worth studying here?
reviews.review_text: Everything is just amazing infrastructure-wise. I would suggest that it doesn't matter to you until you need it. So it is great here to take admission, and campus is so widespread. Infrastructure is good, food is better at college hostel mess, and there are many other food stalls on campus.

reviews.review_heading: Very bad faculty members but good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text:
Block is not good, 6 floors for every period. They change from one floor to another. I will say that BBA is good. I won't recommend it for B.Tech,
law is good. Some hostels are very bad and now this year they have built new hostels. I recommend better to take PG hostels.

reviews.review_heading: Here at Alliance, faculty members are good really, good infrastructure, and excellent college life.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is very good. Hostels are also beautiful. Wi-Fi is available 24X7. The hostel food is good. They also conduct food festivals for a penny a month. They provide 4 times a day. Medical facilities are also good. There are many sports clubs, you can join any club.

reviews.review_heading: College is fun, and you can explore many things, but studies are more important here.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is too good, and the campus is also big. Facilities are good as well. You can access the library till 12 o’clock.

reviews.review_heading: It has good infrastructure and good upcoming placements.
reviews.review_text: Everything is good. Wi-Fi is super on the entire campus. North and South food is available in the canteen. Classrooms have a good infrastructure. We will not see the library in our lives. The infrastructure is peaceful. It has everything for sports and games. It has a big ground to play and enjoy.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty members are good. The campus life is not that great. We do have events going on here.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is really good, and it is not like other colleges. The Mac lab is provided. We can go and work anytime we want. The library is open all the time. The security is really great. Classrooms have good ventilation and help to keep students seated for long hours.

reviews.review_heading: A really good college with great infrastructure and vibes.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is really good, I would say, as it is designed and architected in an amazing way. The college has a peaceful vibration and many plants and trees. You will get Wi-Fi coverage in every nook and corner of the college, except for the bathrooms. Talking of bathrooms, they are available almost every 100 meters and are very clean as well. There are a lot of games to play, football, badminton, cricket, tennis, table tennis, basketball, and much more.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with the college placements, and the infrastructure is really nice.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is quite good. The mess food is good compared to other mess food. There are various sports facilities available, with different coaches for different sports. There is a clinic inside the campus and an ambulance, which is available 24/7.

paragraphs: Alliance University offers various scholarships to meritorious students to support their education. Various scholarships are provided to students such as Merit-based Scholarships, Category-based Scholarships, Alumni Scholarships, Employee Scholarships, etc. Students who wish to enroll in any course at Alliance University will have to score a good percentage as a part of the selection process. Apart from this, students should also meet other criteria that Alliance University has chosen to avail of the scholarship. Alliance University will provide a concession in fees based on marks scored in the qualifying exams.
Given below are the types of scholarships offered at Alliance University:

These scholarships are offered to support outstanding students who have demonstrated exceptional academic performance, talent, or other achievements. The university offers merit-based scholarships under three categories given below:
Alliance University Scholastic Aptitude Test Freeships
CUET Scholarship for all UG Programmes:

Alliance University offers Programme Specific Merit Scholarships to students seeking admission in various courses such as BA LLB (Hons.), BBA LLB (Hons.), LLB, BTech, BA, BSc, BFA, BVA, BDes, and many more. The college has different eligibility criteria for several entrance exams, including CLAT, LSAT, JEE Main, SAT, UCEED, NIFT, NID DAT, and IPMAT.
Positions in the South Zone or National Youth Festival (University Level)
B.Sc. (Hons.) - Psychology B.Sc. (Hons.) - Film and Television Production
LL. M. & Master in Public Policy

Alliance University provides scholarships to its alumni, their spouses, children, and siblings specifically for tuition fees only, allowing them to focus on achieving their academic and professional goals.
Alliance University offers a scholarship facility for our employees to the doctoral as well as executive programmes offered at Alliance University.
Note: The scholarship is valid during the service of the employees. Children of the employees should go through the selection process and must be selected.
tables: Alliance University Scholastic Aptitude Test Freeships (All Undergraduate Programmes)

admission_overview.college_name: Maharashtra Institute of Technology Admission 2025: Application Process, Eligibility & Fee

admission_process.title: Maharashtra Institute of Technology Aurangabad Admission process 2025

paragraphs: MIT Aurangabad admission 2025 is entrance-based.Maharashtra Institute of Technology (MIT), Aurangabad offers a range ofUG, PG, andPhDlevel courses includingBTech, MTech, MBA, and BVoc. Usually, admission toMITbegins inMayand the new academic yearstarts in July. Admission to the courses is based onnational and state-levelentrance exams. Students can take admission through centralcounsellingconducted by the Directorate of Technical Education (DTE)/State CET Cell, Mumbai, or directly at the institute level.

All the courses at the institute are offered under its nine departments. The institute provides scholarships and fee discounts to students from a minority community or getting admissionthrough CAP. Registration areopenfor UG and PG courses offered by the institute.
Students canregister online. The institute provides admissionsdirectlythrough acentralised admission process(CAP).Below mentioned are MITAurangabad coursesand fees:
Class 12 with a minimum of 50% aggregate (45% aggregate for backward class and disabled person)
Three-years diploma in Engineering/ Technology with a minimum of 50% aggregate (45% aggregate for backward class and disabled person)
Bachelor’s degree with a minimum of 50% aggregate (45% aggregate for backward class and disabled person)
Class 12 or diploma in Science and equivalent
Graduation with a minimum of 50% aggregate (45% aggregate for backward class and disabled person)
*The above-mentioned figures might change subject to directives from the concerned Govt. Regulating Authorities.

The institute placement begins in July in the pre-final and goes on till the end of the academic year. The highest package offered to students was INR 12.2 lakh in the Maharashtra Institute of Technology 2020 placement.
Note: Candidates must note that this information is sourced from the official website of the institute/university-sanctioning body and is subject to change.
Find below the course-wise MIT seat details:
Note: Candidates must note that this information is sourced from the official website of the institute/university-sanctioning body and is subject to change.
Students need to fill out an online application form on the official website of MIT-Aurangabad with all the relevant information.

After filling out the MIT registration form, students must appear MIT entrance exam, followed by other selection rounds. Based on the entrance exam scores results will be declared on the official website of MIT and a merit list will be prepared through a counselling process.
A provisional offer letter will be provided to students based on their performance in the selection rounds. Those who receive the offer letter will have to make the first fee installment.
The university releases the final offer letter after the completion of document verification. The University sends the offer letter to the student's registered email address. In the last

faqs.question: What can students do after JEE Main session 2 result?
faqs.answer: After JEE session 2 is completed, only those candidates who are aiming for IITs need to start preparing for JEE Advanced after clearing JEE Main. Those who are above the 98th percentile should start preparing for JEE Advanced as soon as possible. Those below this, between the 95th and 98th percentile, should focus on attempting more mock tests and previous year question papers so that they have a better chance of clearing JEE Advanced

description: Maharashtra Institute of Technology Aurangabad cutoff 2025 is finally out for aspirants seeking admission to the BTech and Integrated BTech courses. The JoSAA Round 1 seat allotment result 2025 has been released as opening and closing ranks across different categories belonging to the AI and HS quotas. Candidates can scroll down to this page to view the Maharashtra Institute of Technology Aurangabad JEE Main cutoff 2025 for various specialisations and categories. A few more updates are below:

The Maharashtra Institute of Technology Aurangabad cutoff 2024 was concluded for JEE Main with the release of the final cutoff list. The cutoff was released as the opening and closing ranks for admission to the BE/BTech, courses. During the Maharashtra Institute of Technology Aurangabad BE/BTech cutoff 2024, the last-round closing ranks ranged between 150474 and 327760 for the General AI category students. Of all the BE/BTech specialisations, the one that faced fierce competition was B.Tech. in

The JEE Main cutoff 2024 was released for the General, OBC, ST, SC, EWS, and PWD categories in the AI quota. Considering the last round 2024 cutoff, B.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence(AI) and Data Science was the most sought-after BE/BTech specialization with a closing rank of 150474 for the general AI quota. The closing cutoff for the same stood at 194339 in 2023 and 195763 in 2022. On analysing the cutoff data of three years, B.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence(AI) and Data Science demonstrated

Maharashtra Institute of Technology accepts JEE Main scores, followed by JoSAA and CSAB counselling rounds for admission to BTech and Integrated BTech courses. Candidates seeking admission to Maharashtra Institute of Technology Aurangabad can refer to the table below for tentative JEE Main schedule.

Maharashtra Institute of Technology Aurangabad JEE Main cutoff 2024 is now over for BTech, Integrated BTech, and BArch courses. For JEE Main, a total of five counselling rounds were conducted. Additionally, two CSAB counselling rounds were also conducted to fill the vacant seats. Candidates can refer to the table below to download the consolidated year-wise counselling rounds for Maharashtra Institute of Technology.

MHT CET is the entrance exam for candidates seeking admission to the BE/BTech and other courses. The cutoff was released across different categories under the All India quota. For the General category, the Maharashtra Institute of Technology Aurangabad B.E. / B.Tech cutoff 2025 was 19.45, with the most sought-after branch for admission being Polymer Technology. Refer to the table below to see the first and last-round cutoff percentiles for various B.E. / B.Tech specialisations for General catego

Maharashtra Institute of Technology Aurangabad MHT CET cutoff 2025 was released as percentiles, which means the higher the cutoff percentile, the more competitive the course is for admission and vice versa. Considering the last round cutoff data of 2025, Polymer Technology turned out to be the most competitive for admission, with a cutoff closing at 19.45.
Some of the important dates related to MHT CET 2026 for admission are provided below. Candidates can keep track of the upcoming dates to be eligible for admission.
The cutoff PDFs below can be downloaded to view the cutoff details of the last three years for multiple rounds. This will help students understand the past years' cutoff trends.

Maharashtra Institute of Technology Aurangabad cutoff 2024 has been released for GATE CCMT. Maharashtra Institute of Technology Aurangabad MTech cutoff 2024 is released across various specialisations, among which, M.Tech in Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning turned out to be the most competitive specialisation with a cutoff score of 385 for the General AI category students.

The Maharashtra Institute of Technology Aurangabad CCMT cutoff 2024 is out for admission to the MTech courses. The toughest course to get into Maharashtra Institute of Technology in the Special Round 1 cutoff list is M.Tech in Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning.
Candidates can use the filters below to check out the Maharashtra Institute of Technology Aurangabad round, year, and category-wise cutoff scores.
Maharashtra Institute of Technology accepts GATE scores, followed by the CCMT (Centralized Counselling) process for admission to the MTech/ MArch and MPlan courses.
Candidates seeking admission to Maharashtra Institute of Technology Aurangabad can refer to the table below for important GATE CCMT dates 2024.

The Maharashtra Institute of Technology Aurangabad MAH MBA CET cutoff 2025 is provided in the table below for MBA/PGDM admission, among other courses. The cutoff was released across different categories. For the General AI category, the last-round cutoff percentile for MBA admission was 34.41. For the same course, the cutoff stood at 43.64 in the first round. More details are given below:

Candidates can refer to the table below to view and compare the last three years of MAH MBA CET cutoff data for admission to the MBA course. In 2025, the last round cutoff for MBA admission at Maharashtra Institute of Technology Aurangabad was 34.41. For the same course, the last round cutoff was 5.6 in 2024, while in 2023, the cutoff was concluded at 1.43.

Maharashtra Common Entrance Test (MAH CET) is a state level management entrance test for admission to MBA/MMS courses. The MAH MBA CET 2025 cutoff has been released for all rounds and categories. Students can view other important dates for MAH MBA CET 2026 in the table below:

hostel_campus.college_name: Maharashtra Institute of Technology Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: My college is good. You can get a nice faculty to communicate with.
reviews.review_text: In the classroom, there is a projector. The projector will be presented through a laptop and it is very easy to understand the concept and logic through the projector. The facility of Wi-Fi connection is the best for students. In the virtual labs, there are computers and a projector. There is a library too and in that library there are so many types of books. The food quality is so good. Every food item is so tasty to eat.

reviews.review_heading: Review by a genuine student of MIT CSN.
reviews.review_text: The campus is large, green, and well-equipped with labs, Wi-Fi, a library, sports facilities, and hostels. That's all.

reviews.review_heading: There is a good learning environment.
reviews.review_text: Some students' behaviour in college is bad. The environment is not very clean. Students are not allowed to sit outside. Some classrooms are poorly maintained with broken lights and switchboards, which need improvement. The campus life here is average. My interaction with my classmates is normal for studying.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the college environment.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good enough, and colleges have a big campus surrounded by trees and greenery. Give a positive and good vibe. The hostel and mess are also good, but not that good for students. They have Wi-Fi with a good internet connection. Labs are also average.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college in all aspects.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is very good. There are two big buildings for this college. The college campus is very big at least 10 to 15 acres. There are Wi-Fi-enabled labs. Although Wi-Fi is not available in the classrooms. The college features a spacious library and well-structured classrooms.

reviews.review_heading: Review of MIT Aurangabad.
reviews.review_text: The college campus has good infrastructure, and the facilities provided to students and faculty are overall good. But sometimes the facilities are poorly managed. Wi-Fi is provided, but only a few can access it. The hostel is good enough for both girls and boys.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Maharashtra Institute of Technology, an autonomous institute, Chatrapati Sambhaji Nagar.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and facilities are often good. The campus is truly impressive. The campus features modern classrooms equipped with advanced technology. Departments are covered by Wi-Fi. The hostel is average. The mess is also average for students. Also, we have a sports room and various facilities like a cricket ground for tennis, basketball, and volleyball. There is an indoor sports room.

reviews.review_heading: average college in all condition.
reviews.review_text: the facilities provided by the college for mechanical department are not very good as compare to cse department. the quality of the facility of labs for mechanical department not really good. the classrooms or ok. the library of the college is very nice collection of the books is very large. college have decent sports and games not much focuses on sports play in annual function only.

reviews.review_heading: Best college for placements.
reviews.review_text: The hostel of the college is near to the college. It is 5 minutes walk from the college. The hostel infrastructure is very good. The hostel is very clean. There are all facilities in the college and hostel. The quality of food in the mess is really good.

reviews.review_heading: Autonomous college is the best.
reviews.review_text: The next main thing needed is the college facilities. This college provides higher facilities for CSE students. Wi-Fi is provided in labs. We have big classrooms. The college has a library. It has a vast no of collections. The mess quality is good. The college has two separate canteens.

reviews.review_heading: Average college for civil engineering students.
reviews.review_text: The college is big, surrounded by a large area for infrastructure. There is a games club for students in the infrastructure. The college is autonomous and provides all the facilities for students. Facilities like unlimited Wi-Fi access in the practical labs and classrooms are available with advanced technology, and up to 60 students can sit.

reviews.review_heading: Maharashtra Institute of Technology Aurangabad: A Place for Excellence.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is the best. Classrooms are highly advanced with the latest technologies. Labs are equipped with the latest technologies and equipment. There are 2 canteens with a lot of food and drinks on the menu with proper hygiene. Medical facilities are available for students in case of emergencies. High-speed Wi-Fi is available for students.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Maharashtra Institute of Technology, Aurangabad.
reviews.review_text: The college does not have Wi-Fi on campus; it has lab connections instead. I have never stayed in the hostel, so I don't know the quality of the hostel infrastructure, but the college infrastructure is very nice and supports students in their studies.

reviews.review_heading: Mit College of Aurangabad.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is pretty good with proper cleaning, and also the course provided by college is extremely perfect. The hostel is pretty good with proper cleaning, and also the course provided by college is extremely perfect. Also gives the perfect college for students.

reviews.review_heading: MIT -  an autonomous institute of technology.
reviews.review_text: The institute has a large campus with a five-story building and a large playground. There is no Wi-Fi for students, but staff have Wi-Fi access. There are four chemistry labs and four computer labs. The library is open 24 hours a day.

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about Maharashtra Institute of Technology

likes.text: TCS, RedHat, Cognizant, Infosys, Wipro, Tech Mahindra, and many more companies visit our campus for recruitment.

There is good quality food in canteen and there is a special game zone in college .

likes.text: Teachers are helpful, qualified and knowledgeable; almost all teachers are at least Masters-qualified.

reviews_list.review_title: Things you should know before joining NMAM Institute of Technology, NITTE University .

review_content.Placements: Around 60 percent of the students are placed, and the average salary is around 3 to 4 LPA. The top recruiting companies are IT companies, but recently companies from UAE and Dubai came to our college to recruit biotech students. It is a cold drink company, and they wanted people for it.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is great. Like the hostel rooms, washrooms, classrooms, everything is great. We have AC classrooms, and there is one big library, one library where they keep journals, one for computer, one discussion room, and we also have department library. The only bad thing is we don't get proper Wi-Fi in college or hostel. Even the food in mess is bad, but the games and sports facilities are great. There are gyms, basketball court, and football court.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Bangalore days in NMMA College.

review_content.Placements: Our campus placements are new every year, and recruiters are new every year. The average package of our college is 9 LPA from robotics. The AI department has an average 22 LPA package. If I want placement in college itself, our major recruiters are from Japan, as our seniors were placed in Japan mostly, so we are also planning the same. Our college offers internships, especially summer internships for a year, and I'm currently completing an internship that has already been a year long. We can opt for another.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is very different, as it is built in forest areas near coastal areas, and it is full of greenery. Hostel facilities are very good compared to other hostels. We get delicious food and menu changes every month. We get to eat different dishes in a week, there are 3 days of non-vegetarian food like chicken, and another 3 days of fish.

reviews_list.batch_info: M.Tech. in Structural Engineering - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: M.Teach Course admission information about location, facilities, placement, etc.

review_content.Placements: In my IT batch, about 82% were placed. The average is 5.2 LPA, the lowest is 3.2 LPA, and the highest is 11.5 LPA. Recruiters: Teach Mahindra, Wipro, and Accenture. 68% obtained internships at startups, Infosys, and HCL. Among the positions were QA tester, web developer, data analyst, and software engineer.
review_content.Infrastructure: The library was well-stocked, classrooms had projectors, and the labs and Wi-Fi were good. The mess food was occasionally good, but the hostel was clean. There was space for badminton and cricket, a decent canteen, basic medical assistance, and limited sports equipment.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Biotechnology - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Really good research-oriented environment.

content.Placements: Nearly 30 percent of students are placed in our course. The highest package of our course is 7 LPA. The average package is probably around 4.5 LPA. The lowest package is 3.5 LPA. The top recruiting companies for the course are Biocon and Merck. Almost 60 percent of the students got an internship at either industrial companies or at research centers in India.
content.Infrastructure: The Department of Biotechnology has around 5-6 labs for various subjects. Research is highly promoted to students at all academic years. Wi-Fi for both students and faculty is provided. The Department of Biotechnology also has a departmental library.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Biotechnology - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Really good college.

content.Placements: 50 percent students are placed. 20 LPA is the highest, 2 LPA is the lowest, and 10 LPA is the average package offered for my course. Bicon, Fixar, Sipla, and some more really good companies come for placement in my course. All the students got internships because of their potential.
content.Infrastructure: All the facilities are really good, high standard, and well maintained. They clean it all, good and maintain it well. All these facilities are also really well maintained and very good for the students. It’s nice to enjoy all the things in and around the campus.

admission_process.title: NMAM Institute of Technology Admission Process 2026

paragraphs: NMAM Institute of Technology admission 2026is open.NMAM Institute of Technologyadmission is primarily entrance-based. The institute accepts NUCAT entrance exams for admission to all of its courses, namely BTech, MTech, MCA and MBA. NMAM Institute of Technology offers multiple specialisations. Candidates can apply for admission online mode.

Candidates interested in getting into NMAM Institute of Technology are required to follow the NUCAT exam and NMAM Institute of Technology application process. Check out the below table for details onNMAM Institute of Technology course admissionwhich is inclusive of its eligibility & selection:

NMAM Institute of Technology course admissions 2026 for all of its courses is done based on entrance exams. Check below the complete NMAM Institute of Technology admission process:Application Process:
The mode of application for theNUCAT entrance examis online. Candidates must register online and then fill out the online application form.
Appear for the NUCAT entrance exam and appear for the college-based selection rounds and then wait for the release of their results
Once the selection rounds are done, the shortlisted candidates are called for document verification. Aspirants need to pay a course fee to confirm their seats.

courses_data.description: Admission to the BTech Lateral Entry program is granted purely on the basis of merit in the All India Entrance Test - NUCAT (Nitte University Common Admission Test). To apply for NUCAT, aspirants must complete and submit the Online NUCAT registration form. The program commences in July/August, on the date prescribed by the University. It offers 12 specializations under BTech courses.

hostel_campus.college_name: NMAM Institute of Technology Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description: The hostel of the college is well equipped with every basic facility available at four different locations inside the campus. Separate hostel blocks are available for the boys and girls, UG and PG students. Every hostel block complex runs separate vegetarian and non-vegetarian mess. Exclusive cultural events, self development programs, academic support activities for the hosteliers are conducted in regular basis. All the hostel blocks are covered by campus Wi-Fi network.

library.description: The Library of the college has over 60000 volumes and subscribes to over 250 general and technical journals (both foreign and Indian). It is equipped with digital library facilities with a subscription to large number of e-journals through INDEST and DELNET.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Basketball Court, Cricket Ground, Football Ground, Hockey Ground, Standard Athletic Turf Track

reviews.review_text: The library was well-stocked, classrooms had projectors, and the labs and Wi-Fi were good. The mess food was occasionally good, but the hostel was clean. There was space for badminton and cricket, a decent canteen, basic medical assistance, and limited sports equipment.

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied with the faculty and placements in the 2024-2025 batch.
reviews.review_text: The building is old with average facilities; we do have AC and Wi-Fi, as well as filtered water. However, the hostel food is very poor, and the token system does not allow us to eat according to our wishes. The curfew time is very early; it feels like we are treating ourselves like 4-year-old kids.

reviews.review_heading: Facilities are really good. The amazing at hosting events and gives great opportunities to students.
reviews.review_text: Labs are very clean and neat. Libraries are very organized. There is no Wi-Fi in classrooms. There are 2 types of Indian food, North and South. The food at the hostels is amazing. There is also a small medical clinic for the native students inside the campus.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure some faculties are not good and and some good no extra holidays and only 3 days
reviews.review_text: Nice infrastructure during non rainy days. During rainy days there was a bad sell of birds poop in the college there are lot of birds on those during the offering season the campus was good they clean all the *** etc. And clean the campus fully and their also was the temple.

reviews.review_heading: The college provides good placements.
reviews.review_text: The campus is located far from cities like Manglore and Udupi which is a drawback. The campus has been maintained well. Labs are well-equipped and air-conditioned. Hostel mess provides 3 meals a day and there are both options for South and North meals.

reviews.review_heading: A review on NMAMIT NITTE: Fees, infrastructure, and campus life.
reviews.review_text: The college has very good infrastructure and buildings with good computers and laboratories. Classrooms and well-ventilated, making it convenient for study. Washrooms are clean and hygienic. The college provides a hostel facility with fantastic food.

reviews.review_heading: Life at NMAMIT - Graduation batch of 2024.
reviews.review_text: The college has a good infrastructure including fully equipped laboratories and a huge library. The is a strong Wi-Fi installed in the library and the hostel. Classrooms are decent and have projectors and centralized air-conditioning. The food in the canteen is hygienic and tasty. There is a sports complex on the campus with a gym, a cricket pitch, and a basketball court among many other sports facilities. College is well-equipped with labs and is a great learning space. Library is well-equipped...

reviews.review_heading: If you want to complete your B.Tech peacefully with decent placement join this college.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is best, compared to other colleges in this area. Labs are very good with good Wi-Fi connection (with high-end CPUs which can perform complex programs also i7). Classrooms are very good with AC and projector and good quality benches. Library is decent.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with placements. It provides a good quality of education.
reviews.review_text: We have Wi-Fi on the college premises. We have well-equipped labs with computers and centralised air-conditioned. We have a library and also an E-library, so we can access the library from anywhere. The quality of food in the hostel is good. We get breakfast, evening snacks, and dinner. There is an ambulance for immediate medical services.

reviews.review_heading: NMAMIT : Dream Reflector .
reviews.review_text: The department has many labs as required for its courses. Wi-Fi is available at every computer-based lab and there is a separate departmental library. Classrooms are fitted with projectors in each class. The library is full of books and foreign journals, with a capacity of 300 students at a time.

reviews.review_heading: My Overall Mediocre Experience .
reviews.review_text: We have pretty good labs and classrooms, but they don't turn on the AC in class, which is a major drawback in Karkala. Wi-Fi is simply for the sake of it. It's not at all fast for others to use. Only Ethernet cables are fast. The library is very old and compact with very bad librarians. The hostel is average in terms of infrastructure and food. The food is mediocre. It's a coupon-based system.

college_info.college_name: NMAM Institute of Technology Scholarship Details

paragraphs: To appreciate academic excellence, the university reserves 20% of the total seats for each programme or branch for candidates who top the NUCAT exam. High-achievers who secure the top positions in NUCAT are eligible for a scholarship, which covers 20% - 40% of the prescribed fee. This scholarship is a way for the university to recognize and reward the hard work and dedication of students who have achieved the highest scores in NUCAT.
